name: MAGA Patriots
subject: They want to ruin our way of life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, what has this country become...

We have criminals punching innocent women in the face.
Illegal immigrants murdering and raping our citizens.
Murderers are getting let off easy.

Our society is out of control - _**and Joe Biden and the Democrats are to blame.**_

Instead of putting criminals behind bars, they’ve helped elect attorneys and judges who let them run free with a cash bonus.

Instead of empowering law enforcement and border patrol, they’ve pushed to defund them both.

**It’s time for America to wake up, Peter.**

**We need the leadership of Donald Trump back.**

name: Adam Frisch
subject: I am humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado

In 2022, the race between Lauren Boebert and me went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.

Hello,
Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Colorado's 3rd congressional district.
In 2022, the race between Lauren Boebert and me went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.
It was the closest race in the entire country.
We've now scared off Boebert, and I know we can win this seat in November – but this race just got a lot harder, so I am counting on your continued support to be able to build a campaign strong enough to take on the Super PACs and win this critical House seat.
[**Please, click here and make a donation now to our campaign. When we win this critical House seat and finally replace Boebert in Congress with someone who will put a stop to the angertainment circus, you’ll be able to say you were a part of it from the start.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82527993/465567450/1610638071?refcode=em20240406pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=368cfebb-72f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhjZmViYi03MmY0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOf4shFOpLsBJ_kUtpNkKXM1HqyALFORQhjgzRn4grA=)

name: Stop Jim Jordan
subject: Jordan warns "illegal aliens" are hiding in schools
body:
| |
---
It’s you. You’re the problem. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc5MTEyMjQ3MjI2NTQ2ODAsXCJyXCI6MTE3OTExMjM1OTI3NzM3Mzc4fSIsInMiOiJjMDE2ZjZhZTVkODNhYjFiIn0)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc5MTEyMjQ3Mjc4OTc1NjIsXCJyXCI6MTE3OTExMjM1OTI3NzM3Mzc4fSIsInMiOiIxNjIyM2YzNTEzMDY2Njk4In0)
---
|
---
Friend,

It’s no secret that our immigration system is broken and desperately in need of bipartisan legislation to fix it.

That’s exactly why President Biden and a bipartisan group of Senators led by Sen. Chris Murphy (D-CT) and Sen. James Lankford (R-OK) led the way to produce a very strong common sense bill to address migrant crossings at the U.S.-Mexico border.

**So-called “conservatives,” led by the likes of Jim Jordan, killed the bill only days after demanding new border security provisions in budget negotiations.

** Why did they do this? Because Donald Trump said the quiet part out loud: without a sense of crisis at the border, Republicans won’t be able to use immigration as a campaign issue to help Trump.

But it is clear that do-nothing Republicans like Jim Jordan, who has himself never passed a single bill into law, also have nothing to offer Americans apart from venomous hatred and xenophobia, rallying the MAGA faithful to scream about the crisis they themselves are responsible for creating.

Now, this is all we can expect from Jordan and the “Freedom” Caucus extremists: unabashed fearmongering. After a few migrants entered a school in a New Mexico border town, causing no harm and posing no threat, nutty MAGA extremists have declared that _every parent with kids in school anywhere in the country_ are somehow at grave risk:__**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc5MTEyMjQ3MzMxNDA0NDMsXCJyXCI6MTE3OTExMjM1OTI3NzM3Mzc4fSIsInMiOiJlMTViOGU5MmFiYjhlNjczIn0)
**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc5MTEyMjQ3MzczMzQ3NDgsXCJyXCI6MTE3OTExMjM1OTI3NzM3Mzc4fSIsInMiOiJmZTk1NzczODczMzQ4NDM4In0)
|
---
|
---
|
---
Jim Jordan and his allies want you to live in fear—fear of migrants, fear of crime, fear of Joe Biden, fear of women exercising their rights and freedoms. They want Americans afraid of just about everything they don’t like, and then to give them power so they can exert even more control over our lives.

We can’t let them win. They want nothing more than to control our bodies, our freedoms, and to make us conform to a repulsive and abhorrent social agenda.

Tamie Wilson is running an incredibly strong campaign to defeat Jim Jordan this year. Jordan and his allies know it—that’s why they fought like hell to defeat her in the primary. **[Tamie will stand up against this bigotry and fearmongering to help build a better future for ALL of us. Can you stand with her and support this effort with a contribution of $25, $50 or more?](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc5MTEyMjQ3NDI1Nzc2MjksXCJyXCI6MTE3OTExMjM1OTI3NzM3Mzc4fSIsInMiOiIxYjZhMzcyYWM2YzdjZmZkIn0)**
|
---
| | | [ **RUSH A CONTRIBUTION** ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc5MTEyMjQ3NDY3NzE5MzQsXCJyXCI6MTE3OTExMjM1OTI3NzM3Mzc4fSIsInMiOiIzMTc3NDA3MDBlODNkMzU1In0)
---
|
---
Thank you for fighting back against the MAGA extremists and helping beat Jim Jordan for good.
**
Team Tamie Wilson for US******
|

subject: I wanted to share this Bible verse with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=c17294f611dc4b26b7d0445911f415e9&_e=HbwmVZf5mOat-zLBga5UIdafE3WNxlAzVcNoGtce2munkxbx0En-vAW2xc4pwiaBbTBQHyrBEu5MKf2YDwjQyfgTjFgzGkTKIfVNLDxzWE6QdgscWqZIZ_7lMYcZKqwgPdcmNrxt6pg39clCvUP6gbCc1C1-ZlyZVwBLHSXbFM3LX_zxiX85cutSZXj9Z3xeDHRry5vv3UlcxpxI-gaW5fMFFxfmaao53eQRKFjqvksrfjbcwKjS-paAHU-UvczGJl7zJQ7UXj9i_I7vfIFOAyp5cgYsf-zyV2iJsfohAgK2Qoteoaj9Dkz4ut2SWbGrUirbTsYOkzlmq4bda9_es1WUr7E3AmgTiFEf8B-yjJCSU78iPYkXUkYJZHTrhomD)

Friend,
I’ve been thinking about this Bible verse a lot lately:

_“Then Peter and the other apostles answered and said, We ought to obey God rather than men” - Acts 5:29_

I think it’s a lesson a lot of politicians could take to heart.

Too many members of Congress have completely lost sight of what we were put here to do, Fellow American. Instead of defending our God-given freedoms, they want to take them away for power and riches.

Corrupt leaders like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer have completely abandoned our American values and taken God out of the equation.

**It’s time to bring Faith back to America.**

[**Do you stand with me?**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=c17294f611dc4b26b7d0445911f415e9&_e=HbwmVZf5mOat-zLBga5UIdafE3WNxlAzVcNoGtce2munkxbx0En-vAW2xc4pwiaBbTBQHyrBEu5MKf2YDwjQyfgTjFgzGkTKIfVNLDxzWE6QdgscWqZIZ_7lMYcZKqwgPdcmNrxt6pg39clCvUP6gbCc1C1-ZlyZVwBLHSXbFM3LX_zxiX85cutSZXj9Z3xeDHRry5vv3UlcxpxI-gaW5fMFFxfmaao53eQRKFjqvksKyoCCItSd0hD25weVjjBZ5OtRTJy5q8XfaApORK9UqqqFn-7lqalvtOxoYFBm1jUUb6q1RinvSLSzwMG-TT3uAiXk-nJcShjH6Tzx1FCqd9hsEByga8N6VymLtqp2Jtpy9dxf36YmqeZ1N7OV5xvO)

clean_body: | | | Friend, I’ve been thinking about this Bible verse a lot lately: “Then Peter and the other apostles answered and said, We ought to obey God rather than men” - Acts 5:29 I think it’s a lesson a lot of politicians could take to heart. Too many members of Congress have completely lost sight of what we were put here to do, Fellow American. Instead of defending our God-given freedoms, they want to take them away for power and riches. Corrupt leaders like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer have completely abandoned our American values and taken God out of the equation. It’s time to bring Faith back to America. Thank you,Josh Hawley | | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Rick Scott is terrified.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
he's calling me a liar every chance he gets
| | |
---
Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent almost $4 MILLION running attack ads.
Not only has he spent millions, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. He just went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.**Let me make this clear:** _Rick Scott co-sponsored a 20-week national abortion ban._ **I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.** His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be further from the truth.
**In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at _CNN_ just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last-ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: **[_So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82528375/465595162/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1045-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUzM2MyYTctN2RmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aDHaRl2ZbjEgK1GQpw5uMypPBqIi8ojqKTGygaLpLl0=)**

Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation.
Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:[So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82528380/465595167/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1045-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUzM2MyYTctN2RmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aDHaRl2ZbjEgK1GQpw5uMypPBqIi8ojqKTGygaLpLl0=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

name: 1600 Daily
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqtfc5i66m8npil09j808hv1g68f482gfcbcqea0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge4oj6cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc0b0hgfe2nvebd8rrdhv94jhl6c4mko0eqtn1p0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge4oj6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr810ulco5eb73eviveqa01rcbc65h7a9ps8q428_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge4oj6cdh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699050%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1DvAw%2b3bAMMoTTA9YU3N9Q&sysid=1)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699051%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9uaesVNLb1I5F2EhCRAwVA&sysid=1) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699052%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kxNqYjV%2b7LPstFfnjLbVaA&sysid=1)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _
|

clean_body: I have breaking news to share with you... | | Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an absolutely momentous lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible! We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including: #1 - Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race #2 - Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter. The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all #3 - Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. Make no mistake: Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here! Stephen Miller President, America First Legal | | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | America First Legal Foundation 611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE | #231 Washington, DC 20003 American Update PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
The consequences of falling behind would be devastating.

| |

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z00an581i06ndbr5hnk29nb2g857thjqcug4dch0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge2o35c9h2bs "Ready for the general: Biden launches swing-state tour, massive ad buy against Trump")
---
_(Source: USA Today 03/08/2024)_
If you live in a swing state, brace yourself...

**The Biden-Harris Campaign just unleashed a massive 7-figure ad buy right after Barack Obama and Bill Clinton helped rake in $25 million in a single night.**

And that's not all. The Democrat Machine is also unloading $30 million into key swing states to destroy ANY hope to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and send President Trump back to the White House.

We need to move NOW:

If we fail to outraise, outspend, and outorganize the Democrats, they'll walk away with the most important election in our history. _**[That's why we're launching an emergency fundraising blitz - with a goal of raising one million dollars - between now and the end of the month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zppvv1qi284u6q1ejcg8r32f3cgdqbc0me19kv98_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge2o35c9h2bs "That’s why we’re launching an emergency fundraising blitz – with a goal of raising one million dollars – between now and the end of the month.")**_

We get it. That's a high bar.

But the consequences of falling behind would be devastating. If we miss important goals like this, we'll be forced to:
* Pull ads off the airwaves
* Slash our get-out-the-vote budgets
* Strip funding for competitive races
* Limit recruiting efforts for volunteers
* Gut our voter contact programs

And if we want to win, we'll need the resources to fully fund critical campaign operations like these - especially when Biden is unloading millions into key battleground states.

_**[So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn't been a more important time to do so. Please make a small donation now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7h2umcrfrhh3qqgl8b064vjaa86s1d4bdpls38g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge2o35c9h2bs "So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn’t been a more important time to do so. name: American Action News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zedi56dqu0kcu5iekrun998gbbk0hj191suriaq0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge2o35c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgsd2fb9t9fcq57u99c5f25tam8sr65s4ae3i018_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge2o35c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf605u3nd13ctjoot5cjcjn815s9bnth019mbgs8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge2o35c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |

| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32746%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=80IZ2gmv12RwAwGvkN55Qg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that’s not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32747%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CwtDax%2bUtCWwBd%2fMwd8acg&sysid=1)

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser, SBA Pro-Life America
subject: What do you believe the biggest problem facing the pro-life movement today is?
body:
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda!
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
__| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDk4LTdhOTc1MDkxMzllZDRhMTU4YmEzYjMyMGJmNmIwNGFiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FjdGlvbi5zYmFwcm9saWZlLm9yZy9wcm9ibGVtcy1mYWNpbmctcHJvLWxpZmUtbW92ZW1lbnQ_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByb2JsZW1zX2ZhY2luZ19wcm9fbGlmZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwNzYmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNzgxMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1zaG9ydF9BRS1MTE80ODExNSJ9/aAmnvCPbO3A4DhO2I3F89w)
---

---
| |
Fellow Americans,

The battle lines this election year have been clearly drawn.

Joe Biden has promised to restore _Roe_ saying, “I promise you I will restore _Roe v. Wade_ as the law of the land again.”

**Abortion is the key issue of the 2024 election and the biggest problem Americans will have to solve at the ballot box during the most critical election we’ll face in our lifetimes.**

Lives are truly on the line in 2024 and beyond.

**Right now, I want to know what _YOU_ think about America’s greatest problem as someone who values human life and wants to see a brighter future secured for generations to come. **

Your voice can make a difference and as the leader of the most impactful pro-life organization in this specific moment in our nation’s history, I want your opinion to influence what my team does over the next several crucial months. Would you take a couple of minutes today and share your thoughts at the link below?

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/problems-facing-pro-life-movement](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDk4LTdhOTc1MDkxMzllZDRhMTU4YmEzYjMyMGJmNmIwNGFiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FjdGlvbi5zYmFwcm9saWZlLm9yZy9wcm9ibGVtcy1mYWNpbmctcHJvLWxpZmUtbW92ZW1lbnQ_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByb2JsZW1zX2ZhY2luZ19wcm9fbGlmZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwNzYmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNzgxMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1zaG9ydF9BRS1MTE80ODExNSJ9/65LzjMuNHjJpEhEoewmpng)

Whether you believe your politicians will actually do what they say or if you believe your vote really makes a difference, I promise you your voice can make an impact for life _right now_ and save the innocent.

Please take a few moments to share your thoughts and use your voice to stand for life.

I look forward to reading your responses.

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

name: Breaking 2024 News ----------------- From House GOP
subject: Brace yourself if you live in a battleground state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The consequences of falling behind would be devastating.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z40vekfl6hioe4dq23gnuc12kvgv21b95nim26u0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5geao72c5h2bs "Ready for the general: Biden launches swing-state tour, massive ad buy against Trump")
---
_(Source: USA Today 03/08/2024)_
If you live in a swing state, brace yourself...

**The Biden-Harris Campaign just unleashed a massive 7-figure ad buy right after Barack Obama and Bill Clinton helped rake in $25 million in a single night.**

And that's not all. The Democrat Machine is also unloading $30 million into key swing states to destroy ANY hope to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and send President Trump back to the White House.

We need to move NOW:

If we fail to outraise, outspend, and outorganize the Democrats, they'll walk away with the most important election in our history. _**[That's why we're launching an emergency fundraising blitz - with a goal of raising one million dollars - between now and the end of the month.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkmn02u86muanlto70c28p200est5425v23bnmeo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5geao72c5h2bs "That’s why we’re launching an emergency fundraising blitz – with a goal of raising one million dollars – between now and the end of the month.")**_

We get it. That's a high bar.

But the consequences of falling behind would be devastating. If we miss important goals like this, we'll be forced to:
* Pull ads off the airwaves
* Slash our get-out-the-vote budgets
* Strip funding for competitive races
* Limit recruiting efforts for volunteers
* Gut our voter contact programs

And if we want to win, we'll need the resources to fully fund critical campaign operations like these - especially when Biden is unloading millions into key battleground states.

_**[So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn't been a more important time to do so. Please make a small donation now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zea591rldrmo4944nc4rd0psl66loh6t31lgc42o_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5geao72c5h2bs "So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn’t been a more important time to do so. Please make a small donation now.")**_
---

---
Thanks for all you do,
House GOP

body:
The consequences of falling behind would be devastating.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zggvulrpikugo1iq5qcmspi0jqjjd1o4pia8v9g0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5geeor6c9h2bs "Ready for the general: Biden launches swing-state tour, massive ad buy against Trump")
---
_(Source: USA Today 03/08/2024)_
If you live in a swing state, brace yourself...

**The Biden-Harris Campaign just unleashed a massive 7-figure ad buy right after Barack Obama and Bill Clinton helped rake in $25 million in a single night.**

And that's not all. The Democrat Machine is also unloading $30 million into key swing states to destroy ANY hope to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and send President Trump back to the White House.

We need to move NOW:

If we fail to outraise, outspend, and outorganize the Democrats, they'll walk away with the most important election in our history. _**[That's why we're launching an emergency fundraising blitz - with a goal of raising one million dollars - between now and the end of the month.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z520qj55vkbfvoi12kqu036f7092r3sl0g3m3f10_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5geeor6c9h2bs "That’s why we’re launching an emergency fundraising blitz – with a goal of raising one million dollars – between now and the end of the month.")**_

We get it. That's a high bar.

But the consequences of falling behind would be devastating. If we miss important goals like this, we'll be forced to:
* Pull ads off the airwaves
* Slash our get-out-the-vote budgets
* Strip funding for competitive races
* Limit recruiting efforts for volunteers
* Gut our voter contact programs

And if we want to win, we'll need the resources to fully fund critical campaign operations like these - especially when Biden is unloading millions into key battleground states.

_**[So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn't been a more important time to do so. Please make a small donation now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z96o3qcqdpjkg1e999qcjcgmhr038q0f4ijbrpkg_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5geeor6c9h2bs "So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn’t been a more important time to do so. body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: This is Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: 1, 2, 3 urgent updates for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey... this is Mike Johnson. I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates:

| |

---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699069%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bkuhXYwR3KwLQAb5SujBkQ&sysid=1 "Mike Johnson")
---

Hey... this is Mike Johnson. I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates:
1\. We have two upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR - it's critical we win both of them 2\. Democrats are WINNING the fundraising race - they’ve banked $44 million this cycle alone
3\. We have a razor-thin House Majority - that’s the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control and ramming through any radical policy he wants
_**[The LAST thing I want to do at a time like this is ask you for anything but I’m deeply concerned. We have one last chance to turn it all around and that’s RIGHT NOW. I’m humbly asking you for a few bucks- or whatever you can spare - in the next 90 minutes.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699060%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8eWncBkhlZmW8lt1DNLVVg&sysid=1 "The LAST thing I want
to do at a time like this is ask you for anything but I’m deeply concerned. We
have one last chance to turn it all around and that’s RIGHT NOW. I’m humbly asking
you for a few bucks – or whatever you can spare – in the next 90
minutes. ")**_

_If everyone reading this agrees to help, we’ll expand our House Majority and make history!_
---
| | | [PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699061%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OXO44IVzFiNWBJYQm9zK2Q&sysid=1 "PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS")
---
Please listen carefully:

Democrats control the Senate and they control the White House. If they manage to flip JUST a handful of House seats, they’ll take complete control.

_**[That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for help.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c699062%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UptmAs8ogtySENoufIr0Ww&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m left
with no choice but to ask you for help.")**_

**You know what would happen if Democrats take control of the House: our strong border security bill will come to a SCREECHING HALT, our plan to secure our elections will be SCRAPPED, we will LOSE subpoena power, Liberals will TAKE OVER all House committees, and our impeachment inquiry will go UP IN FLAMES ... **

That is, unless Conservatives everywhere rise to the occasion and come together right now.

The Election is imminent. Democrat fundraising is surging. And our House Majority hangs in the balance.

_Are you ready to meet this moment and step up? I hope so. _

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: American Briefing
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z240ehuutbs4vtsfjv16tgi78hjve3becfbre8o8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge9ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf4qbces61q0gi87k270l7jvci2p9e7lto45muc0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge9ob2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z44ig4bdcp2u3pgej8fed0j2u2qb9ijmdmdlefeg_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c5ge9ob2c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

American Briefing

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkUGP2yAQhX8NvtkaBhacgw-RHFeVNtuqPewRERjbSGBbQFT131eJsvde543em2_e59VcbYhhWz5somGO2eRiNmvWEGObqVBtM82ZymoQULYgW9BGNH4AfvJSNjRwzVH2XCNv1sGdTjRzqxT1vbI3jvyGbxIJeyXmN1BNGB4-IEGDllr2nZylBRSg0c8OBTIJNlKu3ZyJ_J7s5mO4Ua5_Mx17rp3bUxOHtdajMHFmODGc4tE9Li7eRurI3xlOdaV2yWTrC8M5-9gVU3FMjAAcxQegxHdQ44_xcvnNUN1rMmW_Z0dMjEfey0Guhm15SYl8uCcmRko2xNfQ2XTYsGxMjHWlZ-Iz8Evet0pbZWL8vEzfr-dvF_Pz3E7vv9qvPzR58MefEGMoSjMJy8P8SVn_v5B_AQAA___Q0pHo)
---
| | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkUGP2yAQhX8NvtkaBhacgw-RHFeVNtuqPewRERjbSGBbQFT131eJsvde543em2_e59VcbYhhWz5somGO2eRiNmvWEGObqVBtM82ZymoQULYgW9BGNH4AfvJSNjRwzVH2XCNv1sGdTjRzqxT1vbI3jvyGbxIJeyXmN1BNGB4-IEGDllr2nZylBRSg0c8OBTIJNlKu3ZyJ_J7s5mO4Ua5_Mx17rp3bUxOHtdajMHFmODGc4tE9Li7eRurI3xlOdaV2yWTrC8M5-9gVU3FMjAAcxQegxHdQ44_xcvnNUN1rMmW_Z0dMjEfey0Guhm15SYl8uCcmRko2xNfQ2XTYsGxMjHWlZ-Iz8Evet0pbZWL8vEzfr-dvF_Pz3E7vv9qvPzR58MefEGMoSjMJy8P8SVn_v5B_AQAA___Q0pHo) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: About as useful as a screen door on a submarine…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just need a second to explain where I’m coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iuO-c-77Hs_kJllYAjU3Qg~~/AARclAA~~~ "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.
---
| | | [SEND IN TEN BUCKS HERE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/U6sylPdJ78MFK0BLwJqvNw~~/AARclAA~~ "SEND IN TEN BUCKS HERE")

---
_James Comer reached out ... Mike Johnson reached out... Byron Donalds reached out... Kellyanne Conway reached out... Sean Spicer reached out... Steve Scalise reached out..._

Sorry for following up AGAIN but we just don't have time to stand around - not if we want to win!

_**[I'm humbly asking you for a few bucks before the end of the day to help save our Conservative friends and defeat Liberals up and down the ballot.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iuO-c-77Hs_kJllYAjU3Qg~~/AARclAA~~~ "I’m humbly asking you for a few bucks before the end of the day to help save our Conservative friends and defeat Liberals up and down the ballot.")**_

God bless you,
John N. Kennedy

clean_body: I just need a second to explain where I’m coming from | | | | | Folks - this is John Kennedy. It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine. Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam... Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them... Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics... And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short. I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. ~~ "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with." Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand! I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... subject: will YOU help keep the CCP at bay?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWFqioFiNJ

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWFqioFiNJ

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

body:
The consequences of falling behind would be devastating.

| |

---
_(Source: USA Today 03/08/2024)_
If you live in a swing state, brace yourself...

**The Biden-Harris Campaign just unleashed a massive 7-figure ad buy right after Barack Obama and Bill Clinton helped rake in $25 million in a single night.**

And that's not all. The Democrat Machine is also unloading $30 million into key swing states to destroy ANY hope to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and send President Trump back to the White House.

We need to move NOW:

If we fail to outraise, outspend, and outorganize the Democrats, they'll walk away with the most important election in our history. _**[That's why we're launching an emergency fundraising blitz - with a goal of raising one million dollars - between now and the end of the month.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb1u3TAMRp9G3mRIlK5kDx6CBl6KFEWXjoJ-aEe4smxI8k3y9oWDduqUmTz8yMPfL-bFxhTz-sNuON19MaWa9jDV20RdsR7px36WimkxwEBSJinTRnRhCqNXVnU4cc1BDuPIWfc6DbcAOiAb-SBuAjzyUckAEpZhdB6gi9M1h0mm2Si1YP3C0ApUwS3BOesGIplNWFp_Rzz8nteCtRY8Tpeit7n3-9al6bW1oxLxRGAmMFf0Z8H-LeaC4eogMDe0G73uiBUJzC4GzNQG6s6PCxJzuaAS80rEcysnElBn24y322Hjmol4_rupMj-f6Pdvv3jPuVASTONSM3UDyvVNEVD4bloMXwA-c_bcMLcr_EHvvtB_Xgio9zM__i90ZQrHW0wpVqWJZOtmY_r00b7wuj8BAAD__5LhmdY "That’s why we’re launching an emergency fundraising blitz – with a goal of raising one million dollars – between now and the end of the month.")**_

We get it. That's a high bar.

But the consequences of falling behind would be devastating. If we miss important goals like this, we'll be forced to:
* Pull ads off the airwaves
* Slash our get-out-the-vote budgets
* Strip funding for competitive races
* Limit recruiting efforts for volunteers
* Gut our voter contact programs

And if we want to win, we'll need the resources to fully fund critical campaign operations like these - especially when Biden is unloading millions into key battleground states.

_**[So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn't been a more important time to do so. Please make a small donation now.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb1u3TAMRp9G3mRIlK5kDx6CBl6KFEWXjoJ-aEe4smxI8k3y9oWDduqUmTz8yMPfL-bFxhTz-sNuON19MaWa9jDV20RdsR7px36WimkxwEBSJinTRnRhCqNXVnU4cc1BDuPIWfc6DbcAOiAb-SBuAjzyUckAEpZhdB6gi9M1h0mm2Si1YP3C0ApUwS3BOesGIplNWFp_Rzz8nteCtRY8Tpeit7n3-9al6bW1oxLxRGAmMFf0Z8H-LeaC4eogMDe0G73uiBUJzC4GzNQG6s6PCxJzuaAS80rEcysnElBn24y322Hjmol4_rupMj-f6Pdvv3jPuVASTONSM3UDyvVNEVD4bloMXwA-c_bcMLcr_EHvvtB_Xgio9zM__i90ZQrHW0wpVqWJZOtmY_r00b7wuj8BAAD__5LhmdY "So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn’t been a more important time to do so. clean_body: The consequences of falling behind would be devastating. | | | | | | "Ready for the general: Biden launches swing-state tour, massive ad buy against Trump" (Source: USA Today 03/08/2024) If you live in a swing state, brace yourself... The Biden-Harris Campaign just unleashed a massive 7-figure ad buy right after Barack Obama and Bill Clinton helped rake in $25 million in a single night. And that's not all. The Democrat Machine is also unloading $30 million into key swing states to destroy ANY hope to save our Conservative House Majority, retake the Senate, and send President Trump back to the White House. We need to move NOW: If we fail to outraise, outspend, and outorganize the Democrats, they'll walk away with the most important election in our history. "That’s why we’re launching an emergency fundraising blitz – with a goal of raising one million dollars – between now and the end of the month." We get it. That's a high bar. But the consequences of falling behind would be devastating. If we miss important goals like this, we'll be forced to: Pull ads off the airwaves Slash our get-out-the-vote budgets Strip funding for competitive races Limit recruiting efforts for volunteers Gut our voter contact programs And if we want to win, we'll need the resources to fully fund critical campaign operations like these - especially when Biden is unloading millions into key battleground states. "So if you can afford to chip in a few bucks, there really hasn’t been a more important time to do so. Please listen carefully:

Democrats control the Senate and they control the White House. If they manage to flip JUST a handful of House seats, they'll take complete control.

_**[That's why I'm left with no choice but to ask you for help.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/W8i4fNY8Ew3Nk2ieJtUz1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn9QbYP0TgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvdGhyZWUtdXJnZW50LXVwZGF0ZXMtam9obnNvbi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNDAzX1BBLUNCMS4xMTM1NzFfdDE0NjkzNjktMTc1NiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDA0MDNfUEEtQ0IxLjExMzU3MV90MTQ2OTM2OS0xNzU2JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXR2LWNiLTIwMjQwNDA3Jnh1bnY9dHYtY2ItMjAyNDA0MDdXA3NwY0IKZhD9axJmcGY2hVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for help.")**_

_Are you ready to meet this moment and step up? I hope so. _

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: About as useful as a screen door on a submarine…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just need a second to explain where I'm coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d5f623cb30b46ef95dada7e7fdb0b22&_e=CREg1ZmAT4YSua9nNH9qoXe8rPNkkgvoY9zs-HO2J_MoL7O-cS5gA-6JmecYpqdWoYuNUqNDnUecjQaCPFrsXSgTiFI9ttiEvv3Odby8sZffprxKOHNHChzXyYhy3tKLrHt_uS1ccZtZ4DAP68h45IMYlemrCHC-WW6MU33f6sZ7IonLQboCtAFmAOlQEeaQJ0ITmjX4-ztdfoyV9Vr-YHBEDJeilgrHvMomgUG9wGs0JNcCF6e7O3bJRjRVSiEZZjVU6HgjGdy3fBMN90FSYL3b3U4YeFIM_ppg5UH8Qe0l8RDvEqe_Uwh3LvqQoRwZWlhXZ_bZdd-iAEi3P2dppNBiwtLy4fPisgfyLmCQKlLheKVwBOHFw5kc_5k8RYF6kFlOCta47VEn1hGhKjpu_7n5TnIfeuiX4yr3E4fnnENWEputqCClqREPldtVSvBSr6jx0rCzoi9Cc9OHEp-T4g%3D%3D "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine. Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam... Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them... Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics... And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short. I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with." Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand! I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48712647631f4519a3056381bad0b072&_e=_NYSfTMf7j6YvbuWV0G9ewTboBiW0_OMz6aYfmuEe9XeKmHjg-7y9FGQgFjolrmmQH06hCcn7JfOronR-jELrAnG2L8ZXRIZd1TKOwcahGfPs2T0z3Si80msBGP5MpvRRUx8enju3nowJAslFfLQ5jS5WrHySuFWleaHtTsYUPrDTt6_C8WaVqaDPfD1I5QK8GOXLCoWVMRQKC0uEyN6tsz6RbYqrUkd-a50YsBFzeNAoxwbLpH5ew-bz5LvSXoWyC9UggnONvdky3etEB9klSBO92FswZQm5amHfIP4U3RnHu2WXHM9xbN_hCM88GUR-vVBboSwgezHIe4ET5Jb4uhxL1-dzq1y4X__75j_D4lDam3pLHY2MGUxK2oq7gGYSx-kuHid0Jzvxl2f_FtdcA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48712647631f4519a3056381bad0b072&_e=_NYSfTMf7j6YvbuWV0G9ewTboBiW0_OMz6aYfmuEe9XeKmHjg-7y9FGQgFjolrmmQH06hCcn7JfOronR-jELrAnG2L8ZXRIZd1TKOwcahGfPs2T0z3Si80msBGP5MpvRRUx8enju3nowJAslFfLQ5jS5WrHySuFWleaHtTsYUPrDTt6_C8WaVqaDPfD1I5QK8GOXLCoWVMRQKC0uEyN6tsz6RbYqrUkd-a50YsBFzeNAoxwbLpH5ew-bz5LvSXoWT6rw5efTsUWhHfC7K0z0VpmJ-WxHcvIJdqbQyZ_kNx_gBQGZCQdjzQplzLQMDGtDiw3tODs7ud8LmupoUqdtg9fKCzV31R8R1WiL1A2UJ0cLy2yHgTSzTSjZGJTIyRgO1EYpX3g4CokRjao3ghoN6Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=48712647631f4519a3056381bad0b072&_e=_NYSfTMf7j6YvbuWV0G9ewTboBiW0_OMz6aYfmuEe9XeKmHjg-7y9FGQgFjolrmmQH06hCcn7JfOronR-jELrAnG2L8ZXRIZd1TKOwcahGfPs2T0z3Si80msBGP5MpvRRUx8enju3nowJAslFfLQ5jS5WrHySuFWleaHtTsYUPrDTt6_C8WaVqaDPfD1I5QK8GOXLCoWVMRQKC0uEyN6tsz6RbYqrUkd-a50YsBFzeNAoxwbLpH5ew-bz5LvSXoWCdHxNmHSCOIZ5eNtduBlrW7LFBd-9KVtT7ci22PN-BmQLOsi3PARHjUWuhVs9BP75rXhpEtyLPJivD8ISH3157wvbx-SJ286-FWe2fVdxcEy0RStRXyHv-IY52VlAV4Qq51o0cbKoF_RrT47KDYDvA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e292a470f6a64b4ba09cad8babe8e481&_e=jp1i-SpPyzV3Wsq0Xykk5MdmLcwjZqOCRfCjsWxQdwWCjxo-KJb_EKpBPzczroR3KqQOWu7WUQUKMNZZ2wceQgZxvH0Ud4gaRqNS3Ime6Pjx1vM5Le_8d-ZSNt6kAxplT69Cl0LyTTSM4L88AVy4nAKSN7FMzfONhpIhMOA6a93jEFMVvkMStpM77MXdQrl66CSI8l2_q0flIsAabZi573Z_GD3Q-kvSpBTArNI_PYBAsa60hhgM1jXn8Rezd8_DOoALLRGbLGGPUlQ7890BjJg1ayIEIYjAsiitmw1CxGqNc7JAkprNiuDNaENCX74XdToxGw87zUoeagyze6usPE-KDNsco36L2zNUHNkBGKVWlkMsaoht-enH33KyGaXO7DV16xhrNzeHVJ0yKWaD_g%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e292a470f6a64b4ba09cad8babe8e481&_e=jp1i-SpPyzV3Wsq0Xykk5MdmLcwjZqOCRfCjsWxQdwWCjxo-KJb_EKpBPzczroR3KqQOWu7WUQUKMNZZ2wceQgZxvH0Ud4gaRqNS3Ime6Pjx1vM5Le_8d-ZSNt6kAxplT69Cl0LyTTSM4L88AVy4nAKSN7FMzfONhpIhMOA6a93jEFMVvkMStpM77MXdQrl66CSI8l2_q0flIsAabZi573Z_GD3Q-kvSpBTArNI_PYBAsa60hhgM1jXn8Rezd8_DJzxULWxDNZrBQO-F-5Q4wdL5ztt7HSLsTXOJz4hwZllpMX1UWiHNNpYPxSXw1N3hUADO6AcE_mFlGHiG1esmmKk6PKO7FnbEMpjcWVdCr0398Rr_IvnQFv1Vgk1CK5wfpdkikgAasxBACq9jPDF2fA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e292a470f6a64b4ba09cad8babe8e481&_e=jp1i-SpPyzV3Wsq0Xykk5MdmLcwjZqOCRfCjsWxQdwWCjxo-KJb_EKpBPzczroR3KqQOWu7WUQUKMNZZ2wceQgZxvH0Ud4gaRqNS3Ime6Pjx1vM5Le_8d-ZSNt6kAxplT69Cl0LyTTSM4L88AVy4nAKSN7FMzfONhpIhMOA6a93jEFMVvkMStpM77MXdQrl66CSI8l2_q0flIsAabZi573Z_GD3Q-kvSpBTArNI_PYBAsa60hhgM1jXn8Rezd8_DlsuESV3nAd0puJU5BeekiGDfNha_Hfs3T_UaPjVW7XTNQVkn0JTcknmpB5DzBiw6Dw72PnI3UiGFU4mpr8IDhsEjZYESdN-zDzfwEK8IBVw1jWu4HrByUfEdQimtQmMb2lewgR6_1gPYffhYR5uuCQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

French, early 16th century
| |
---
Is "puerile" giving boys a bad reputation? The adjective (used to describe something immature, childish, or altogether silly) comes from the Latin word "puer," meaning "boy." The French word "puéril" came from the Latin "puerilis," and when "puerile" entered English in the early 16th century, it was used in the sense of "like a boy." ...

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: it's official:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is incredibly important
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a7d68e7-2fc7-479b-80e1-8ff29a298de9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb21e5460-c969-467c-bccc-bf849bbf842c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control. And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage. [So I'm personally asking: Please, will you split $10 or more now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6361a8fd-5469-445b-b0cf-fd58feeb4b37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sen. Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6398d02d-c9c7-4ed0-bf0e-eb0c94228d1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29018849-dbcc-48b1-8a10-3b8d3078ac58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T276c2b57-4fb0-4ea0-b8ff-d7672abf8e3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43c5d61e-3265-4fbb-b68c-d8ab92de6a44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
|
---
| | | | | In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different: • He wants a national abortion ban, I want to restore Roe v. Wade.
• He protects the wealthiest 1%, I defend American workers.
• He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, I'm a champion for democracy. Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do. [But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $19 donation at a time. So please, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us defeat our GOP opponent, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6ce262f-c902-4094-a0b5-16ace2df50e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Your support means the world – especially now. Thank you, Sherrod Brown
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T096a8a37-b6fc-4978-a795-4b28de65d705/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Support Democratic Proposal to Rename a Florida Prison after Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Support Democratic Proposal to Rename a Florida Prison after Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32a8a2c6-664e-4d27-abec-a82e5e11b2e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8aaef6e1-ca98-4018-b451-aa8954c5c149/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | You may have heard about the asinine Republican proposal to [name an airport after Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e7c113d-5236-460b-bcc5-ea132f09323e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Well, Democrats have responded with a wonderful alternative: "You want to name something after Trump? How about a prison." [**Please add your name, and show your support for renaming the Miami Federal Correctional Institution in Florida as the "Donald J. Trump Federal Correctional Institution."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36596e9f-515f-485a-bb0a-ee610f258a9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It's an eminently more sensible proposal, given that Trump is facing dozens of criminal charges in multiple jurisdictions. And as far as the airport goes, do we really want to name an airport after a guy whose only experience with an airline is driving into bankruptcy? A formal [bill has been filed](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7f7f8aa-37a8-4252-a44d-7f97a7838ee7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) by Democrats Gerry Connolly of Virginia, Jared Moskowitz of Florida, and John Garamendi of California. Let's make it happen! [**Please add your name, and show your support for renaming the Miami Federal Correctional Institution in Florida as the "Donald J. Trump Federal Correctional Institution."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6632e1ea-2be5-4271-87e3-58b970bcce5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T194ea631-0f79-401a-b9f2-0193eff36199/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Forward this to others to help spread the word, and build momentum for this action!)
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcb01ccf-f7fb-45d5-80a6-a108c570228e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b976835-63f4-4935-ba12-9118b73ca8e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbccb801e-9390-4a8f-b570-ed31429b8cf8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3200a6b-96e8-4b6b-b9cb-fe2198664ecf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I chose YOU from your area, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You have been selected for a rare opportunity.

|
---
| | |
Look what I have for you today, Friend.

I am reaching out with a RARE opportunity. _**You are the FIRST patriot from your area selected to join the Trump Honor Roll!**_

I know how much you love the American way of life, and I've taken notice of all the work you've put in with House Republicans to get my father back in office.

Which is why I couldn't be more honored to present you with a spot on the TRUMP Majority Honor Roll today. **[Get your name on our records right away!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1e58d7d819a94823bbdf9b48f12df17d&_e=duwZU0T_zv6qpJuJtoc7gxnPTd-a7KgLTxst27BirvSvLBm-jnjXER8oBwtmmtY_RBws9Og-kKuJyKJA07l6CXJ2KgzxUFlAYcwh7QHOud7ecglRwit9UE-EqJk-TZV340kXX7UqcXu9js4UbM3yPEmmOuavScFIP74CZNJvR4jaP989opZjClJ9p2Zp_l09o4xn7wHDAMz55MvqkYN3Pl3qX-ZGinnO1-WP-lIS5ubZcknLH3pJ1yMnyo9rzoL5hRyw108rmdWKiAeMhNqYDk2wTLtHn-ib_FFDUtk22xPf_fUwiJJ2jzA16O86OVCY0ZI0ZjI2iK6LpPpYQXGfjXQ1myDvnTxvnKN2Nys5wS02CIRpqMMQWo-Ggp_Hn-C_-QUrLmfkJdwKGPgFa8agpKPdP_WZcAecH0TM5j3ob-viENDZG-CcxvVai5Uu0bpH45Zc4Kj3pJQ_u7PVKfR1yw%3D%3D "Get your name on our records right away!")**

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I chose YOU from your area, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You have been selected for a rare opportunity.

|
---
| | |
Look what I have for you today, Friend.

I am reaching out with a RARE opportunity. _**You are the FIRST patriot from your area selected to join the Trump Honor Roll!**_

You have been selected for a rare opportunity.

|

| | |

name: Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2006%2E4032634%2ELhJpr9)
---
There are more billionaires in the world than ever before, and they’re richer than ever, too. According to Forbes, the past year was “an amazing year” for billionaires. In their recently published yearly analysis on the world’s wealthiest, there are 141 more billionaires than there were last year — with the United States leading in billionaire citizens at 813, who are worth $5.7 trillion combined. 10 of those American billionaires have fortunes greater than 12-figures. Yes, that’s $100,000,000,000. While these billionaires had an “amazing year,” the proportion of Americans living paycheck to paycheck actually rose. While these billionaires had an “amazing year,” a minimum-wage earner who worked 40 hours a week still couldn’t afford a two-bedroom apartment in any state in the country. While these billionaires had an “amazing year,” corporations continued to price gouge hardworking consumers — with prices rising by 3.4 percent over the past year while producers’ input costs have only gone up by 1 percent. While these billionaires had an “amazing year,” two-thirds of families who needed childcare spent more than 20 percent of their income on it. Our economy has historically worked better and better for billionaires and the ultra-rich, and worse and worse for everyone else. Our current tax system allows billionaires in our country to pay a lower tax rate than a teacher, a sanitation worker, or a nurse — and Donald Trump made sure of that. Right now, a billionaire CEO pays as much in Social Security taxes as someone who makes $160,000 a year. During budget debates last year, the House GOP showed that they’d rather take food and health care away from people who are struggling than take $1 more in taxes from a billionaire. **Our tax system is rigged for those at the top, plain and simple. We’ve started to tackle this issue by passing my minimum tax on massive corporations that were paying $0 in taxes, and to provide more funding to the IRS to strengthen enforcement and go after corporations and wealthy tax cheats. But there’s still more we’ve got to do, and it’s called a wealth tax.** My wealth tax plan would place a two-cent per dollar tax on people with a net worth above $50 million — and an additional cent on net worths over a billion. This small tax on America’s richest would generate huge amounts of revenue totaling at least $3 trillion over a decade, providing money that would help pay for universal child care, rebuilding infrastructure, high quality k-12 education, tuition-free public college and technical schools, climate investments, and so, so much more. Just a two-cent wealth tax would unlock so much opportunity and completely transform our economy and our country. This is one of the best and most necessary ways we can make this government work for everyone — not just the rich and powerful. And I’m fighting hard for this. [**We've got to keep pushing, and that's only possible with the support of grassroots supporters like you. Will you add your name to signal your support for a wealth tax? After billionaires’ amazing year, we need to double down on our efforts to finally pass a wealth tax.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-wealth-tax-page/?refcode=EMZ19T_TAX_E_20240406_V1S1&t=8&akid=2006%2E4032634%2ELhJpr9) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

name: Emord for Senate
subject: Team Emord Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emord for Senate Inc | 7151 Richmond Road, Suite 202, Williamsburg, VA 23188
body:
Weekly Update (Mar 15 - Apr 3, 2024)
| | | |
---
|
# Weekly News & Updates
---
| Mar 15 - Apr 3, 2024
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,
---
| The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued these past two weeks. On March 27, Emord for Senate Treasurer and Election Law Attorney Chris Woodfin delivered to the Virginia Department of Elections (DoE) over 13,000 valid ballot petition signatures, putting Jonathan Emord on the ballot for U.S. Senate. The achievement was the product of dozens of Team Emord volunteers across the state who worked tirelessly between January 2 and March 26. Even after the filing with the DoE, petitions continued to pour in, hundreds of them, from volunteers who would not rest until assured that the goal was achieved.
We are so grateful to our volunteers. They now turn across the state to the work of ensuring that every Republican voter understands the opportunity presented to put a constitutionalist who has spent 38 years effectively defending our rights into the U.S. Senate. Across Virginia, more and more people are volunteering to work for the Emord campaign to Save Virginia and Save America. They have laid a solid foundation for an Emord victory in the primaries now in full swing and in the general election.
Jonathan remains the only candidate who has actually defeated the Administrative State, not once but over and over again, who has written legislation to restore the Constitution and protect individual rights, and whose court room victories in high stakes cases have saved the lives of countless Americans, including the unborn. He is best qualified to defeat Tim Kaine, reverse far left laws and regulations, and restore constitutional limits on government power.
---
|
---
---
| |
---
|
# On the Campaign Trail
---
| | | |
---|---
### Mar 16-17 Gun Shows and 2A

Team Emord volunteers explained Jonathan's strong position in defense of our second amendment rights to attendees at the Fredericksburg Gun Show and the Richmond Gun Show. As our next Senator, Jonathan will sponsor legislation to establish nationwide constitutional carry by pre-empting all state and local laws that restrict the right to keep and bear arms, including Virginia's odious red flag law.
| |
---
| | | |
---|---
### Mar 18 Halifax County Southside Virginia Conservatives

Team Emord petition drive director Ann Parker appeared as a representative for the Emord for Senate campaign at the Halifax County Southside Virginia Conservatives Club. She explained Jonathan's commitment to restoration of constitutional limits on government power, securing the borders, ending the woke agendas in the schools and military, and eliminating inflation through reductions in government spending, repeal of the climate change agenda, and removal of regulations blocking American energy independence and continued reliance on oil and gas.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vou_DoZMDbuGOkeP5RKGzP0oYjFzphHGL2MxtHBbQKpyFSy_r8CXcSq-6YvXQXI_KNNossnvH7AcowlefCQL1jfxj4WP8dJESaj4ETrVn8TkZVeKO7-5jwo2zlOajzDsJkFMzvNE0jBv-cwTqqsDoTPCd4jNdU2gqKattvWIAHU6CXn6UlqH4uHEQBW2CP9F_OZ62sG_uhxhhqGklJ_yO-fI9HiMbOz1jClnOPkMr7WQls2mNToZWw==&c=OdFiSBA_MudIkJ-BIUiMKexsVYtN_3UV-ZvyWMyeDOqrZpBh-_0dCg==&ch=PDtSM5MD7b-ZjuyUEFi13QOgdQEZ5BhA82QGdq875YMP1xBGghPQVA==)
---|---
### Mar 18 U.S. Senate Forum with Chasing Freedom Virginia

Jonathan participated in a Chasing Freedom Virginia U.S. Senate forum in Springfield, Virginia. He explained his proposed legislation to secure the borders and stop asylum seekers from entering the U.S. He also explained his proposed legislation to repeal the climate change agenda; eliminate unnecessary bureaus, departments, agencies; devolve functions to the states; and adopt a flat federal tax of 10 percent on incomes of $100,000 or more, eliminating the progressive income tax and instigating an economic boom, growth, and opportunity. Those measures, he explained, will bring back $2 a gallon gas, make groceries affordable again, lower interest rates and bolster home ownership, and enable a robust increase in the GDP.
