clean_body: Weekly Update (Mar 15 - Apr 3, 2024) | | | | | Weekly News & Updates | Mar 15 - Apr 3, 2024 | | | Dear Peter, | The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued these past two weeks. On March 27, Emord for Senate Treasurer and Election Law Attorney Chris Woodfin delivered to the Virginia Department of Elections (DoE) over 13,000 valid ballot petition signatures, putting Jonathan Emord on the ballot for U.S. Senate. The achievement was the product of dozens of Team Emord volunteers across the state who worked tirelessly between January 2 and March 26. Even after the filing with the DoE, petitions continued to pour in, hundreds of them, from volunteers who would not rest until assured that the goal was achieved. We are so grateful to our volunteers. They now turn across the state to the work of ensuring that every Republican voter understands the opportunity presented to put a constitutionalist who has spent 38 years effectively defending our rights into the U.S. Senate. Across Virginia, more and more people are volunteering to work for the Emord campaign to Save Virginia and Save America. They have laid a solid foundation for an Emord victory in the primaries now in full swing and in the general election. Jonathan remains the only candidate who has actually defeated the Administrative State, not once but over and over again, who has written legislation to restore the Constitution and protect individual rights, and whose court room victories in high stakes cases have saved the lives of countless Americans, including the unborn. He is best qualified to defeat Tim Kaine, reverse far left laws and regulations, and restore constitutional limits on government power. | | | | On the Campaign Trail | | | | ---|--- Mar 16-17 Gun Shows and 2A Team Emord volunteers explained Jonathan's strong position in defense of our second amendment rights to attendees at the Fredericksburg Gun Show and the Richmond Gun Show. As our next Senator, Jonathan will sponsor legislation to establish nationwide constitutional carry by pre-empting all state and local laws that restrict the right to keep and bear arms, including Virginia's odious red flag law. | | | | | | ---|--- Mar 18 Halifax County Southside Virginia Conservatives Team Emord petition drive director Ann Parker appeared as a representative for the Emord for Senate campaign at the Halifax County Southside Virginia Conservatives Club. She explained Jonathan's commitment to restoration of constitutional limits on government power, securing the borders, ending the woke agendas in the schools and military, and eliminating inflation through reductions in government spending, repeal of the climate change agenda, and removal of regulations blocking American energy independence and continued reliance on oil and gas. | | | | | | == ---|--- Mar 18 U.S. Senate Forum with Chasing Freedom Virginia Jonathan participated in a Chasing Freedom Virginia U.S. Senate forum in Springfield, Virginia. He explained his proposed legislation to secure the borders and stop asylum seekers from entering the U.S. He also explained his proposed legislation to repeal the climate change agenda; eliminate unnecessary bureaus, departments, agencies; devolve functions to the states; and adopt a flat federal tax of 10 percent on incomes of $100,000 or more, eliminating the progressive income tax and instigating an economic boom, growth, and opportunity. Those measures, he explained, will bring back $2 a gallon gas, make groceries affordable again, lower interest rates and bolster home ownership, and enable a robust increase in the GDP. == | | | | | Mar 19 Women for the American Constitution Jonathan received a standing ovation and strong statements of support and donations from the Women for the American Constitution in Charlottesville following his speech explaining the bills he will sponsor to secure the borders, end inflation, interdict crime and government corruption, repeal the climate change agenda, and ensure American energy independence. | | | | | Mar 19 Midlothian-Chesterfield County Party Canvass On March 19, he also met voters and discussed his campaign with hundreds who attended the Midlothian-Chesterfield County Party Canvass. Hundreds of those attendees also signed Emord petitions. | | | | Mar 20 Fairfax GOP Patriot Pub On March 20, Team Emord member Jackie S. appeared as a representative for the Emord for Senate campaign at the Fairfax Patriot Pub meeting in Springfield. There she shared with the audience her testimony about Jonathan's litigation in defense of individual rights against big government, including his unprecedented victories over the administrative state and his key wins in cases that saved American lives (including those of the unborn). She also explained Jonathan's detailed legislative platform to attendees. | | | | | | ---|--- Mar 21 Issues Forum at First Free Coffee Jonathan attended an issues forum with active community members conducted by WCHV host Joe Thomas and Fox News host Brian Kilmeade. The forum was held at First Free Coffee in Charlottesville. Jonathan met Charlottesville area residents who expressed strong support for Jonathan replacing Tim Kaine in November. | | | Robert Scott Bell Show On that same day, Jonathan appeared on the Robert Scott Bell Show, as he does weekly. The two discussed two corrupt career politicians, Joe Biden and Tim Kaine, and how best to defeat them and save America from destruction. | | == | == | | | | Mar 21 City of Manassas GOP Jonathan addressed the members of the City of Manassas GOP, receiving strong statements of support and endorsement from many members in attendance. | | | | | | ---|--- Mar 22 NOVA Forum Breakfast with Ben Cline Jonathan met NOVA business and political leaders at the NOVA Forum Breakfast at the Tower Club in Tysons, Virginia. Congressman Ben Cline addressed attendees concerning budget battles in Washington. | | | | Mar 23 & 24 Hampton Gun Show & Williamsburg/James City County GOP Team Emord appeared at the Hampton Gun Show to support our Second Amendment rights and meet fellow advocates of the U.S. Constitution and Bill of Rights. On March 23, Jonathan joined Team Emord in the morning at the Gun Show. That same afternoon he addressed the Williamsburg/James City County Republican Committee in Williamsburg. | | | | Mar 25 Gloucester Matthews' County breakfast club Jonathan addressed the patriots assembled at the Gloucester Matthews' County breakfast club. He explained in detail the threats posed by open borders, by the climate change agenda, and by the woke agenda in the schools and military. He also explained the need to grant amnesty and immediate release to J-6 defendants whose only offense was misdemeanor trespass (if that), and the need to eliminate all mask and vaccine mandates, never allowing the federal government ever again to override the rights of individuals to deprive them of freedom of choice over prevention and treatment of disease. | | | | Mar 26 Virginia Beach Republican Women's Club Jonathan became an associate member of the Virginia Beach Republican Women's Club and met members at their meeting in Virginia Beach. | | Mar 26 "God and Government" with Turning Point USA That evening, he explained the ideological origins of the U.S. Constitution and rights theory at the Turning Point USA-Faith event on God and Government at the River of Life Church in Spotsylvania Courthouse. | | | | Mar 27 "Failure to Stop" Show Jonathan joined Eric Tansey and Conservative Ant on the Failure to Stop Podcast, discussing the Biden Administration advocacy of cultural Marxism in public schools and legislation he will introduce to enforce the Equal Protection Clause of the 14th Amendment by cutting off funding to every school and to every department of the military that promotes racism, racial stigmatization, and critical race theory. | | | | | | == ---|--- Mar 28 Robert Scott Bell Show Jonathan appeared as he does weekly on the Robert Scott Bell Show to discuss Tim Kaine's record failures to do anything to stem the flow of illegal immigrants, illicit drugs, and terrorists from entering the United States. He also discussed with Robert Kaine's connection to the Soros family, the Soros families anti-American, anti-Constitution, and globalist agenda, and Tim Kaine's voting record in support of that agenda. | == | | | | ---|--- Mar 28 Celebrate Dr. Eric Berg Jonathan helped celebrate Dr. Eric Berg's birthday at an event at Landini Brothers' Restaurant. Those assembled, who celebrated Dr. Berg's extraordinary career and achievements, kindly endorsed the Emord for Senate campaign, joining Team Emord. | | | | Apr 1 Candidates Forum in VA Beach Jonathan participated in a candidate forum before the Virginia Beach NIMMO Republican Women's Club in Virginia Beach. In addition to presenting his position on a host of economic, foreign policy, education, and border related issues, Jonathan answered questions from club members and enjoyed the company of members both before and after the event. | | | | | | Apr 2 Interview with Virginia Tea Party Jonathan was interviewed by Virginia Tea Party President Nelson Velez for a series the Virginia Tea Party is presenting for its members and the public evaluating the candidates for U.S. Senate. | | | | | | == ---|--- Apr 3 Interview with Wilkow Majority Show Jonathan appeared on the Wilkow Majority on SiriusXM Radio. In the interview, Wilkow explained that of all candidates for U.S. Senate in Virginia only one, Jonathan, is a winning, highly accomplished constitutional lawyer who has defeated the administrative state repeatedly in defense of individual rights. Jonathan, he explained, has the knowledge, experience, and legal skill needed to restore constitutional governance and save the nation from communism. If you seek a true constitutionalist, Wilkow said, then Jonathan is your choice. | == | | | | == | Meet Emord! Please come meet and talk to Jonathan at an upcoming evening reception at Roxbury Hall, the home of John Midlen, in Leesburg. Friday, April 19th 6:30pm-9pm 17781 Roxbury Hall Rd, Leesburg, VA You may purchase a raffle and try your luck at winning one of the gifts sponsored by local businesses. Scan QR code or click on flier or RSVP link below to reserve your ticket. | == | | | | SIGN UP FOR SIGNS UP! Wherever you are in Virginia, == to have an Emord for Senate yard sign sent to you for posting. Let us know if you need a standard 18"x24", a 4' x 4', or a 4' x 8'. We deliver and install. Show your support and help build momentum for the Emord primary win! | == | | | | | VOTE EMORD VOTE MAY 3 EMAIL AND TEXT EVERY ONE OF YOUR CONTACTS TO VOTE EMORD ON MAY 3 LET'S SAVE VIRGINIA AND SAVE AMERICA! FIRE KAINE. HIRE EMORD. | Upcoming Events | | Join the Team | | Join our team and help us rally behind the ongoing petition drive to secure Jonathan's rightful place on the ballot! Together, we can make a difference and ensure we Save Virginia and Save America. Don't wait, take action ncow and be a part of the team! | == | | | Get to Know Jonathan Emord | == | == | == | == | == | | | For the past 38 years, Jonathan Emord has litigated against the federal bureaucracy, winning repeatedly. He is a leading constitutional law and litigation expert and the author of five critically acclaimed books. It's time to end transitioning of youth; stop the assault on girls and women's sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms; eliminate woke indoctrination in schools and the military; ensure equal justice under law; secure our borders; roll back excessive government spending and cut taxes; reduce the size and scope of the government; and liberate free enterprise. | == | | == == == == == == == | ==| == | | | | | | | Paid for by Emord for Senate Inc | 7151 Richmond Road, Suite 202, Williamsburg, VA 23188 | | | Sent by mailto:info@emordforva.com powered by

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: About as useful as a screen door on a submarine…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just need a second to explain where I'm coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=656f98a31e064f58af788ddac8451cfd&_e=zisrNyZxz49pAFDgc_RmFt74_6x806Cm860MrrJZ5gL5PtbFizplFLT3nVY9CF_LSABwbKUiM3CFVDrulS6i0SE40I1qSf8b0I8YdHVWjQzCHPTby1bQyjeEu9TYa_jQI9NfyTZQ4Z0ZyAdimcUjCiSVs0977H6LhoDfa_Pv5BL1UFOiFVE8eZqfD3oP-pCAdOJPRsSl-f8XINv8KA0MKwEr5RkTU-Cnq8lrKrImDGihHGjovORD1iIcJVhmT9mc-RuylC3CC4IwoGoqZh2qIKYvq1F66e8NbIUyDC5OQzkHy5q3tnt7NHwCMGDFcy5W-IBkDbBw1Wh4ZRvMalMBdr6CMHxC1vO-b70NptQX5K1Zk7WTKplMy0SHZC0kU7JzFgYYv8pdZtlzWfAFdspNElQM-voxFawnrHXmRd7Xc2qEOWXmzrDMu2pht_-oT3vkK3el9SmSs_TVxBN45OCEJg%3D%3D "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine. Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam... Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them... Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics... And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal. We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short. I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with." Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand! I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Big Oil Lawsuit in Allegheny County? | America's Disappearing Fathers + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de4c245e10&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
### **1.[Allegheny County council member: it’s ‘too soon’ to say if county will consider ‘Big Oil’ lawsuit](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=82e7e64571&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_

“A nonprofit that works to get governments to sue fossil-fuel energy producers is slated to give a presentation to some members of the Allegheny County Council next week — essentially putting the county on the first step of a path that could ultimately lead to a lawsuit like one [announced](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bca29e4186&e=b7b3eddce2) by Bucks County last month.

But the chairperson of the environmental committee that will host the presentation from the Center for Climate Integrity says it’s ‘too soon’ to conclude Allegheny County is actually thinking about filing suit.”

**Why It Matters**. “If the pitch were ultimately successful, lawsuits against ‘Big Oil’ from Pennsylvania’s second and fourth largest counties would seem destined to reignite fossil fuel production as a key presidential campaign issue in one of the most crucial swing states in the nation, with the election now a short seven months away — especially given the Biden administration’s ‘pause’ on exports of liquid natural gas.

Launching lawsuits from Pennsylvania have come to be viewed as an especially gratifying coup for groups like CCI, given the commonwealth’s rising influence because of its incredible natural gas production that exploded twenty years ago, creating thousands of jobs and uncounted millions in tax revenue.”

**Quotable**. “Modern civilization is impossible without hydrocarbons and petrochemicals, and anybody who pretends otherwise is selling propaganda. And so this is just — I can’t say it any better — self-defeating nonsense.” – David Taylor, president and CEO of the Pennsylvania Manufacturers Association.

[C](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=67a5ccc467&e=b7b3eddce2)[ontinue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9881a155aa&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Disappearing fathers – a destructive American reality](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=54d560edcb&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Stu Wesbury_

“June 20, 2009: President Barack Obama, at the White House, addressed the nation on his views of fatherhood. It was concise, informative, and convincing. [The presentation is available on YouTube](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2cc9c6e91c&e=b7b3eddce2). Ten minutes of your time is all it will take.

His message: Children growing up in a family without the father potentially results in many negative outcomes. Such children are more likely to drop out of school, be a victim of substance abuse, serve time in prison or suffer abuse at home. Girls are more likely to give birth to a child as an unmarried mother.”

**Why It Matters.** “The United Way of Pennsylvania studies poverty in the Commonwealth and provides a statistical report each year. Their latest report emphasizes the use of ‘ALICE,’ a statistical analysis process used to identify a family/household that is ‘Asset Limited, Income Constrained, (and) Employed.’ These families/households earn above the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) but (still) cannot afford the basic cost of living in their county.

The report revealed that In 2021, in Pennsylvania:
* 14 percent of ‘Married with Children’ households were below the ALICE Threshold (121,644 households)
* 53 percent of the ‘Single-Male-Headed with Children’ households were below the ALICE Threshold (60,511 households)
* 75 percent of ‘Single-Female-Headed with Children’ households were below the ALICE Threshold (223,733 households)”

**Quotable**. Public Law 1747, No. 114 states that, “When a child has the benefit of access to both parents, the child is more likely to exhibit healthy behaviors, excel in school and achieve emotional well-being.” Another finding recognized that “approximately 24,000,000 of the nation’s children (were) being raised in single-parent households, some without access to their fathers and their emotional and financial support.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cc99665964&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Podcasts!**
* [Kitchen Table Politics: Maria Montero](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=656282c8f9&e=b7b3eddce2)

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Charlie Dent: Pennsylvania’s elections are safe, secure, accurate, and fair](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ccb9ec8d6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Matthew J. Brouillette: How lawmakers make rules — then shield themselves from following them](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c1de5a8bd6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: An American in Florence](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f9b860d617&e=b7b3eddce2)**

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | 1. By Todd Shepherd “A nonprofit that works to get governments to sue fossil-fuel energy producers is slated to give a presentation to some members of the Allegheny County Council next week — essentially putting the county on the first step of a path that could ultimately lead to a lawsuit like one by Bucks County last month. But the chairperson of the environmental committee that will host the presentation from the Center for Climate Integrity says it’s ‘too soon’ to conclude Allegheny County is actually thinking about filing suit.” Why It Matters. “If the pitch were ultimately successful, lawsuits against ‘Big Oil’ from Pennsylvania’s second and fourth largest counties would seem destined to reignite fossil fuel production as a key presidential campaign issue in one of the most crucial swing states in the nation, with the election now a short seven months away — especially given the Biden administration’s ‘pause’ on exports of liquid natural gas. Launching lawsuits from Pennsylvania have come to be viewed as an especially gratifying coup for groups like CCI, given the commonwealth’s rising influence because of its incredible natural gas production that exploded twenty years ago, creating thousands of jobs and uncounted millions in tax revenue.” Quotable. “Modern civilization is impossible without hydrocarbons and petrochemicals, and anybody who pretends otherwise is selling propaganda. And so this is just — I can’t say it any better — self-defeating nonsense.” – David Taylor, president and CEO of the Pennsylvania Manufacturers Association. | | 2. By Stu Wesbury “June 20, 2009: President Barack Obama, at the White House, addressed the nation on his views of fatherhood. It was concise, informative, and convincing. . Ten minutes of your time is all it will take. His message: Children growing up in a family without the father potentially results in many negative outcomes. Such children are more likely to drop out of school, be a victim of substance abuse, serve time in prison or suffer abuse at home. Girls are more likely to give birth to a child as an unmarried mother.” Why It Matters. “The United Way of Pennsylvania studies poverty in the Commonwealth and provides a statistical report each year. Their latest report emphasizes the use of ‘ALICE,’ a statistical analysis process used to identify a family/household that is ‘Asset Limited, Income Constrained, (and) Employed.’ These families/households earn above the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) but (still) cannot afford the basic cost of living in their county. The report revealed that In 2021, in Pennsylvania: 14 percent of ‘Married with Children’ households were below the ALICE Threshold (121,644 households) 53 percent of the ‘Single-Male-Headed with Children’ households were below the ALICE Threshold (60,511 households) 75 percent of ‘Single-Female-Headed with Children’ households were below the ALICE Threshold (223,733 households)” Quotable. Public Law 1747, No. 114 states that, “When a child has the benefit of access to both parents, the child is more likely to exhibit healthy behaviors, excel in school and achieve emotional well-being.” Another finding recognized that “approximately 24,000,000 of the nation’s children (were) being raised in single-parent households, some without access to their fathers and their emotional and financial support.” | | 3\. Podcasts! | | 4\. Lightning Round | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: State Democrats win special elections while Republicans attack abortion access … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, April 7th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhamStH0yBHJI9uhbj_q0lHnQTGgy6dQ_r80Jc3PQqJmkifX32S_GVlavkJkRtrDot62KjOjxptYEMl1aEAv67KYcYwIxW1uUCiY75p362Xh9W3I7EajSzFha_35GnQUIhfNC619Q8wRr59Iyuqaf3k0RpJ2aJUSjFnG8Gqwpy66gtLWAkIdNVM_-nnEpxMf5ZBkaV0dBef77_Gl_OITzty46F2p25sn0Rpw6feS2n1XRbUKki4xyL6Kr1LNN54viECBHBJhT_QBxULpFvNRso6grOW47EMEWZOUBhIblR4dka7xlZlwFYqVfcKM4vlOzKUZGfDdKiHyHy7dfYOI4uTFWMWhaBOFOMpS7GksBWMd1Qk71qL7MxLV01FaZPEm4WuM4JuAQU90O7ytY2Mspy6/45b/lwLCLdUuQ9usUEr1DuFVcw/h0/h001.JvwH8eCFdGkvkJmqPmlF-ozTXI4g64mxkq_uxbOoRxg)
---
1️⃣ **_Kansas:_ Republican legislators pass a bill requiring invasive questions at abortion appointments **
In Kansas, Republican lawmakers passed legislation requiring medical providers to ask patients why they are seeking abortion care — [they will then report these personal reasons to the state in the newest wave of abortion surveillance and restrictions → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1QGBZPs7xkXYh22Qv6Vq33m-2-ekwUEYawRPEkSaCd3gpy_Jy4j1kHFW5H2Au-Vnv9Qlcz5sGdC7ym1S3xMvU-BPhT4Nvh2CHAu5gArzsmRCepDKJM1Bg51ErbzdrKdmNsYaPSaf_40UlXbJWZzFFkks1jT1VWPSjVAcobbC2V9TBBZOs8fj81mr-5GjWuHDZBjgh5qJkW1YwWL8wHmoe5OK0CTbk9xsghkwAmC98H72-KFPtPSnBumN06olL8L0_Il44Qs9gncxMHKIV7l5lEjS2B5UucT_2VOFN_6zpYGt_f8p-97Vqolnshs1ACm6QIamSaRR4pCuJu_S3ybMskpc4ulgv4ms3mBvxZT2vqdRH2dr3sDVlOc42SaxUb9HJlRXF1dnJpP0riWj3VCripjYqzJnZdORb8dfpuBmCN19oRebbOF8stXuoeDaymzcdZ69aqLoq5NYeiJprS2kiloLUK3dGJI-Z-w8E2tyo34trBo1pWDWt2CsYo5T8p7gxIhx-u857mmQ0D6IUr0c6fXY8KWrO46MXFDmBN0Kbltxf7LGZKJsgPZVPnu5EUUuwQ/45b/lwLCLdUuQ9usUEr1DuFVcw/h1/h001.Vk5AJRXreqi1Fpz2MoqyjG11B1u3A9MUDLLDFLMFemU)

2️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Democratic governor vetoes anti-trans bill **
In Wisconsin, the state’s Republican legislature passed a bill that would ban transgender students from playing on sports teams in alignment with their gender identity. [**Thankfully, Democratic governor Tony Evers was able to veto the bill in a critical moment protecting trans youth in the face of GOP extremism →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1TxfaN_HVbLlkDUx0J93ftnczr7D3wHLJLYy7OIzI95vjNUZ98CxmB_LxHGE4838VF9xNSva4Rma_WUAwVGYQ7PhULjiZ13LFaDkhDxuKTiUQX2PyPRjtDuAA7UmGa1mcuFwypDaBlE6duyDQdH3nJtVAeDS_CEVCTx-mcnc9CjWIUJJO09D6OrImC__fJq0L4YjqsxtxPqpEfRwS5KNMCfs9IQDt06rVYRlNPmf9MA1htnTdBoViWDzHcMnRyVMZQaeVrMq2Zb9r__zJAjVDWByNEa8HaGqzhPeJn7IF4_xoDb1N34eSvKVYsmAFkyGDki5RrpeDTf039Mt3QSQktQjW23hEJA9XoCIw-rfyE56K-GCTLPagF3JeydpA2N893K2oGq56bI7SgH5S2v_GzOt6sSZF6NQpvsyiK_QatjcK2E9-wEg3rJK_s8ejIVd4yi4JE-_tgDOdmC5OUFacNCfO9D9x99KsynF5z5fkvE4-tq-eihmQl6xVDGdNiLLLxmBX4w1w24I4MEcUei2LrLHf0mpF0bE54wgOAH-9nF3oVsddyKI5YfbMZpG85zvht_dGdp06Of3-PZgYl1XKXhCsmK-yY_T6_Ain0ZxSztFPgxTPLMNnhUqBJu5EK9wBBav4zg35bZqDapINIfHfMS/45b/lwLCLdUuQ9usUEr1DuFVcw/h2/h001.Y5ZtTsoah1XrAeUgoIRwBdti-K5ia98kT3L-A62zoQI)
3️⃣ **_Florida:_ Conservative state Supreme Court rules in favor of a 6-week abortion ban**
In Florida, after Republicans used their supermajority to pass an extreme six-week abortion ban, the state’s Supreme Court cleared the law’s final hurdle. [**The stakes could not be higher this November, with an abortion rights ballot measure in Florida set to determine the future of reproductive care in the state →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMaoKKtGADiGzdt9uyyTwd8cG50fk6WcZl0Z_o0a1aTjt02ScATZmmiO6kiZylUDkAyVhKpyM9A0Xf4UHr86cmpzrisdbfJ4CtDMLFuQI0hA9SJQWUbROpRwX23u1eNN-N27GxnKgLdSz1sGVZLQnq7_k1HFWE4ekrKQqPLD9QxbJzL0DMxr9ijiSBjRQlrpY4vZh5KQhv_tvXRkLqfMAw-CJcDZdgyzEwRpNT2OY5qDyWOfZtpdhtOO81LsVr8fC1hDq6F3aesMAiiRjUnfcKJHbvGWmoxhgFvXZZtwGsGKqDpcWIYHsw5Gfj-ZnpfG2NjX4mR1bSCy-7cNfOa20ENhXawvvdjcVIrG8omJvpB0JQouJUAQ-ZgDLApgpZNzowSdkIW1F8uDB8EyaderRHDtiOShT3N3nwT4_6gW_194iE6-Imv0x6hiuLSYIMdEpmkzL1-W5RLb4ivbdK_E_7uJwxhE6W9B7ba8CyiT8tHx_qQhUTRx_QYIMf2G3Qj3sGA/45b/lwLCLdUuQ9usUEr1DuFVcw/h3/h001.hpwdSa0QCG5URGMGo5GJz4wLL3AYTOHDGW4ccYebqGk)
🎉 **_Celebrate:_ Democrat Marilyn Lands flips key seat and is sworn into the Alabama House! **
Despite solid GOP majorities, Democrat Marilyn Lands defied the odds, secured a critical victory, and flipped a seat in the ruby-red state. [**As a champion for reproductive freedoms, she has been vocal about her position on abortion access and her plan to fight for it every chance she gets →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1TzFRRQDJ9TFp1A4Z86dPkf6DM0w7oisftPcrxOecwYVBOCbGnVsUfc_d2-G6-em6_VbN6tButYPBXxNupkfB-c6n6rBHGz6mwc6ZKcFSxGLPZ_ad5SWaXCXSn0ofIUDRfjgdysYekOu9TMQUlDflUmDn1_S6gHl-_7TDb1jYi5AdQK0e214tlEOuskOJAFqKSN_odYKaqOHyELmZ7jTfAdyD61BrYHGV2gR51yJOnTzDXdnmRFRoFdaqOLGdlvkGDUc2ONUJMkCdEg_VrY3tkcz59jNNVaOXXd4fCGi19M1m5-nT29ES8n_8CLFj--9sJHUMU8zK34GtOkCcKvk_OE01VRcnHW1oDQUFO_3yFvkcFCTSJu_k4Or_wY0wEEsuFUbaeN-8Plyy7ax97uCTVwoFNEOATPA8NPsskvS7yzy3D_yDBDDZg1tT8HFOdHTrtJ-GLl3FweOopOgNHQmWCQba47AXHidGuq01fyc1z5r_6HzjCM1jOvoPejvkhv7RyQ6jCCH0elAf78yuJVaVzlvcZrBKnqqJ1C5u2llFFTVI0epA3i9wPgWcp3YsbGljU/45b/lwLCLdUuQ9usUEr1DuFVcw/h4/h001.3dXpqsAmiUnzHJJvyj28qs2kmlplJTRGNZGD88Q8nYM)
**🗳️ _Special Elections:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races **
Over the next few months, Democrats are facing several special elections in states like Michigan, so [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_jCWpblMaM7showKFQBmrVFjH6hDCYlyszbPo9mmSEe5XANrMtkHjHo3q7Kmgcf94zfRebYXOI5lpr-Xp_StuJYHCVEDat_H9621arrYRuR3QTJ__yK0E90Gm9Sl4y1L_93JspWZw9ycIsi4a5RAXnjnAad5hwAPsynaTLxrAAxVGEEOKkb2-Hvk39C5g04QHftGkAlwlU7xYfY--kmDCBFc9wGAdsOqnvpf6Ia07CMcbvlTlsZZTEFJLMxYv0Z2fjOv2q17uZ9dZZ8nZjwk0bq-qU2YIL28Hi82uYWqefRq0z8RV8QSbag1Bkv8vhuwNBJBMoKIZ7q4VCPLJKgUFHN44hR2qt7txrEMxQPttTO7m_P7n5BhPOMgIAAIKk2T22hSS5okKX2Y81Fmc4iyBdjAMq3f-IuV4uQ6VM5AqL_WhFovJO1BR6ti89MQnzPl0Hyel8mssI0qwmTdAcy1FqBAjBBaUDg1zgJfbdp60QvZ_9cx3HY1_TTz_hpgvnX4M/45b/lwLCLdUuQ9usUEr1DuFVcw/h5/h001.beHH6k5roKjPFRfe1kroy6gGk9fyd6lYw6UDsSHikLA)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, April 7th, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Kansas: Republican legislators pass a bill requiring invasive questions at abortion appointments In Kansas, Republican lawmakers passed legislation requiring medical providers to ask patients why they are seeking abortion care — 2️⃣ Wisconsin: Democratic governor vetoes anti-trans bill In Wisconsin, the state’s Republican legislature passed a bill that would ban transgender students from playing on sports teams in alignment with their gender identity. 3️⃣ Florida: Conservative state Supreme Court rules in favor of a 6-week abortion ban In Florida, after Republicans used their supermajority to pass an extreme six-week abortion ban, the state’s Supreme Court cleared the law’s final hurdle. 🎉 Celebrate: Democrat Marilyn Lands flips key seat and is sworn into the Alabama House! Despite solid GOP majorities, Democrat Marilyn Lands defied the odds, secured a critical victory, and flipped a seat in the ruby-red state. 🗳️ Special Elections: Democrats prepare for upcoming races Over the next few months, Democrats are facing several special elections in states like Michigan, so **** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter,

It's Kellyanne Conway reaching out to have a frank discussion with you ahead of the pivotal 2024 general election. Believe it or not, we are less than eight months until voters head to the polls to help save our nation and get this country back on track.

If you feel like we're living in a time warp and Election Day 2020 just came to an end, believe me, you're not alone.

While so much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the cost of living and crime have increased, so much has stayed the same.
1. Americans _still want_ lower taxes. Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. **[That's why I am writing to you in support of Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy, the leading candidate to replace failed D.C. insider Jon Tester.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f05e52d7c4ad4a9da5bb4cb3f12464a8&_e=_4BRjXQVvnQbbFhb2lvacTdhmQgxZFEXZ_be_GBCwIY4YNOtOH6PnE3sv0-hrmL2pKJRODxgZbw2rLqeQabYpqq9frlNql6DUBoZrGofclEZSj4q4oNpT_FwgGa9pvRRloExgu9b2HHufq4kMFUly5wod8k43q4o9Wpy_AQOUI-BB7XoEGN8nksrq_4dP7Q9T1pJgyQTyBxW65ezX2QmRidzxEKOCpYl97m9uGpqLnWuEHz9Zza-ZP6NAVvpsDY2UmD_BrSiTZ76GztnxvXkoe8Ad4Y4deJ4oazbrsSiFXq4ZkakXv-9qeqaWZOPuL0wn_d-5DNCKCHdFiFcsHN8eZ_KrZYzY1pGjmomsqTr3RA_8s3K30eZP4tLFlQlDTtn-ZfVRaQBZxx6SROgEjmQ7Q%3D%3D)** The contrast between these two individuals is clear: one is a bonafide American hero, while the other has made a living doing the bidding of Democrat party elders.

I know that Tim has been reaching out to you for months. I also know that some of my friends in the U.S. Senate have been reaching out to you, too. But I want to make sure you hear it from me: **[Tim is our best shot at beating Jon Tester and flipping the Senate majority, yet his fundraising numbers are lower than they ought to be, while Biden-supporting Democrat and phony Jon Tester has a massive warchest.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f05e52d7c4ad4a9da5bb4cb3f12464a8&_e=_4BRjXQVvnQbbFhb2lvacTdhmQgxZFEXZ_be_GBCwIY4YNOtOH6PnE3sv0-hrmL2pKJRODxgZbw2rLqeQabYpqq9frlNql6DUBoZrGofclEZSj4q4oNpT_FwgGa9pvRRloExgu9b2HHufq4kMFUly5wod8k43q4o9Wpy_AQOUI-BB7XoEGN8nksrq_4dP7Q9T1pJgyQTyBxW65ezX2QmRidzxEKOCpYl97m9uGpqLnWuEHz9Zza-ZP6NAVvpsDY29qdksJLdBZpOKSuVGtFJTqaLn0VZEGGzHIfyP8ipUTqlfEPAg3CLD9x0s71sKPxw0xYbc_VBCxgYusBB0XGwKxG54xf7pP7Kc2waKghQ6e8S1dA2kgeUOl2wOZdNcavRnCsKXfEtDVH5XvfdVGMTvw%3D%3D)**

Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. But under the so-called "leadership" of President Biden and Montana U.S. Sen. Jon Tester, Americans are frustrated and fed up with the lackluster economy and weakness on the world stage. The contrast between these two individuals is clear: one is a bonafide American hero, while the other has made a living doing the bidding of Democrat party elders. I know that Tim has been reaching out to you for months. I also know that some of my friends in the U.S. Senate have been reaching out to you, too. But I want to make sure you hear it from me: You could say that I know a thing or two about polling - and polling shows that with adequate resources, Tim can defeat Jon Tester and flip a Senate seat Republicans have been chasing after since 2006. Right now, it's time to channel our frustrations into defeating the DEMS at the ballot box next November. And I'm not just talking about Joe Biden and Kamala Harris - I'm talking about all Democrats, namely fake "moderate" Jon Tester. Chuck Grassley emailed you. Marco Rubio emailed you. Marsha Blackburn emailed you. Steve Daines emailed you. we need to defeat the Leftist agenda, Biden and his allies. The time is NOW. Let's get it done. God bless you. Kellyanne Conway | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Under President Trump, we destroyed ISIS.

I know, because I was part of destroying it.

**My name is CAPT Hung Cao. I’m a 25-year Navy veteran, and I fought on the front lines in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.**

With the help of President Trump’s leadership, my fellow men and women and arms and I were able to turn ISIS from a dominant threat into a pile of ashes.

_But now, under Joe Biden, they’re back and getting stronger every day._

**And to make matters worse, these scumbags are infiltrating our country through the southern border!**

**As your Senator, I will make sure we take down every one of these lawless thugs. I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again.**

clean_body: = Team, I’ve got some big news: We just launched our first TV ad of the cycle, and we need your help to keep it running across the Commonwealth. = Here’s the deal, team: Right-wing super PACs are already dumping millions of dollars into this race to flip PA red, and my opponent just launched a seven-figure ad buy of his own. With the Senate majority hinging on PA, getting our ads on the air is critical to fighting back and sharing my message with Pennsylvanians – but ads are expensive, so we need to step up our fundraising to keep them running. Without your grassroots support, we could miss the chance to reach crucial swing voters, and in a battleground race like this one, that could be the difference between winning and losing. The vast majority of contributions to this campaign come from emails like this one, so I’m counting on you today. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you in advance. clean_body: HINT: look at my legs | Patriot, Do you think I am loyal to my country? The Liberal media is questioning my loyalty! They are questioning where my allegiance lies after I sacrificed both my legs and nearly my life in service to the United States of America. I served in the U.S. Army for more than 12 years. I lost both of my legs on the battlefield fighting terrorists in Afghanistan. I then learned how to walk again and continued fighting for freedom in the halls of Congress. I also volunteered alongside the Israeli Defense Forces. So, if someone thinks that my showing support for our ally Israel is a display of anything other than absolute patriotism and American loyalty, I am under attack once again from radicals. This time, it is the far-left activist groups and the radical-leaning media. They even came after me on my two prosthetic legs — demanding that I stand with Palestinian terrorists against Israel. I responded that the only place I stand on terrorists is | They can call me heartless, soulless, or anything else they want, but if they think they know more than I do about the impacts of radical Islamic terrorism, they’re flat-out delusional. Every day I wake up and look where my legs used to be is a vivid reminder of exactly what’s at stake in the fight against terrorism. Clearly, though, they are not going to stop coming after me or questioning my loyalty — the loyalty of a double-amputee Purple Heart veteran with more than 12 years of American military service! The Radical Left truly is a in our great nation. I hope you never have to suffer the same indignity of the radicals questioning where your loyalties lie. I know you are a proud American patriot, just like me, and I am honored to have you on my team. Thank you, SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) P.S. — If you want to let them know where your loyalties truly lie, get your shirt today: | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Mast for Congress · PO Box 3016 · Stuart, FL 34995 · USA

name: Debbie
subject: I owe just about everything in my life to my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
fighting for people like her
| | |
---
Friend, every Sunday my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together. It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82545788/465624036/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1046-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YmYyYjktZTVmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_8mFbv-f3OBuls8RR79eFvEgObr1PQA7Zc5q1Q_UbvM=)
I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment.
But friend, my mom never wavered once. **Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.**
I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family.
**Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort.** There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems.
But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me.
My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. **These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort.**
Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to _end_ them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs.
**Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.[Polls show that we've got a real chance to win, but I'm counting on your help to power my grassroots campaign. Please, if you believe in a better future for seniors, will you rush $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and protect Social Security and Medicare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82545789/465624037/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1046-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YmYyYjktZTVmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_8mFbv-f3OBuls8RR79eFvEgObr1PQA7Zc5q1Q_UbvM=)**

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Kari Lake is no “moderate”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
She’s appearing side by side with the election-denier in chief. Her hero. Donald Trump.
#

Peter, a quick update for you from Arizona.
Ever since Kari Lake entered the race, we’ve seen a steady stream of stories talking about how she’s moderating her positions.
Some kind of newer, friendlier Kari Lake.
Well, let’s take a look and see how that’s going:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240407-1-90&t=1&akid=2178%2E734936%2E7wQYL_)
She’s appearing side by side with the election-denier in chief. Her hero. Donald Trump.
Denying elections, supporting conspiracy theories, praising insurrectionists — and every day, proudly portraying herself as the biggest Trump supporter in the country.
Look, whoever wins in Arizona isn’t just about a single seat in the Senate. In fact, it’s bigger than who controls the Senate, too. Victory or defeat in Arizona is going to decide who runs the country for the next four years.
If we can defeat Kari Lake it’s that much more likely that we beat Trump for good. But if we lose Trump, Lake, and the MAGA-right are back in power.
For that, and for so many other reasons... we've got to do everything we can to make sure Ruben Gallego wins in Arizona.
[**Please make a donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate and help us stop this MAGA resurgence before it’s too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240407-1-90&t=2&akid=2178%2E734936%2E7wQYL_)

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Can you please endorse Elissa Slotkin for Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1320%2E135344%2EEXFc4S)

As you know, the Michigan Republican presidential primary happened recently. But in the weeks before it happened, GOP candidates up and down the ballot used the attention and enthusiasm in the state to capture something called "voter IDs."
A "voter ID" is just a simple declaration of support from potential voters.
It is a campaign contacting a voter, and a voter saying "Yes, I support you," or "no, I am supporting someone else."
These replies are the foundation of any campaign, because it’s how we know where our supporter base exists and who we need to turn out in November.
Before the election, campaigns try to make sure their stated supporters vote. And at other times -- especially when a candidate needs it most -- they will turn to those supporters for help.
So today, we are doing the same. We are asking you to add your name as a "Personal Endorser" of Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate. It's a small and simple act, but it will speak volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign:
**[Can Elissa count on you to add your name as a Personal Endorser of her campaign for United States Senate in Michigan? If we're in this together, we'll keep this seat blue in November.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-apr24?source=em240407-1-30&refcode2=1320.135344.EXFc4S&akid=1320%2E135344%2EEXFc4S)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-apr24?source=em240407-1-30&refcode2=1320.135344.EXFc4S&akid=1320%2E135344%2EEXFc4S)**
It will mean a lot to know that Elissa can count on you in this race.
Thank you,
Team Slotkin
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-apr24?source=em240407-1-30&refcode2=1320.135344.EXFc4S&akid=1320%2E135344%2EEXFc4S)**

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1320%2E135344%2EEXFc4S).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1320%2E135344%2EEXFc4S)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Powered By People
subject: What’s a VDR?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
We know...it’s a wonky term
#
As a Texas-based voter registration organization, Volunteer Deputy Registrars (VDRs) are the heart of our team. We know...it’s a wonky term — so here’s a breakdown on what being a VDR is all about.
In Texas, one must become a VDR in order to register voters. You have to take a training, pass an exam, and get deputized by your county elections office. **Being a VDR requires a level of motivation and dedication that is essential to our fight to flip the state.**
[**That’s why we’re reaching out today with an important ask — can you help us recruit and train more VDRs with a contribution of $3 or whatever you can today?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240407.h4rfds&refcode=ema20240407-239543&t=1&akid=239543%2E444211%2EPAi0kF)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240407.h4rfds&refcode=ema20240407-239543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239543%2E444211%2EPAi0kF)**
Since Texas Republicans have banned online, automatic, and same-day voter registration, VDRs are the heroes we need in this moment. They’re the key to bringing new voters into our elections and helping them navigate our state’s tough voting laws.
That’s why Powered by People is putting in the work to recruit and train thousands of VDRs across the state. **We hold three VDR trainings a week, resulting in dozens of new VDRs joining our team every single week.**
[**Our VDR recruitment program is funded entirely through grassroots donations. So thank you for pitching in today to help us keep these trainings going!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240407.h4rfds&refcode=ema20240407-239543&t=21&akid=239543%2E444211%2EPAi0kF)
Always grateful to be in this fight with you.
— Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240407-239543-footer&t=22&refcode2=239543_444211_PAi0kF&akid=239543%2E444211%2EPAi0kF)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239543%2E444211%2EPAi0kF), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=239543%2E444211%2EPAi0kF).

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: join the 10%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**7,928.**

That's how many votes decided the last Senate race in Nevada – the closest margin in the country. My race is going to be just as close in November, and experts say it will likely decide Senate control _again_.
**10%.**

That's the percentage of people who open emails like this – and you're one of them. I hope I can count on you to take the next step by chipping in today. Because every donation – no matter the amount – makes a difference.
**$20,000.**

That's what we need to raise before our midnight deadline to fight back against my right-wing, billionaire-backed opponent, pull ahead, and defend this must-win seat.
**I'm the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year – and with this race locked in a dead heat, we're one misstep away from losing Nevada to Trump and MAGA extremists. That's why coming up short of tonight's goal simply isn't an option.**
**[If just 27 more people from 37087 chip in, we'll be on track to close this fundraising gap. Thank you. Jacky Rosen | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6e557499721b400985cadc0e054b64d6&_e=L244RBXvXfR_vCRKNx2qYuQzTNs-W6acCpgaL2qG7pmSqe3A98L6To2LR-mAhbU-v3mHnxAydQZdMre5cPPHMaVXFiRXprhwJug8lOLzd8b23Bup5mfEUyk-FjPeMXsNk3JCOkWzFUThaJcVKLPTO9Rt_fAXMddh-7tEtS20K-PHXkWsh9TAHkEhwTnbmWtCo-B_CJTQ4_nY1HSCNHqkRA98g_Oyd1-qgWsD9idavW-aHP54HHx71zOkb1vnZ0IOJx3wMFeyWMvaRHqiQxmykiLlRP5Ai03FBG81rr6mN-33uWWHTpaFybQ0EAf_t_gFDmBQqrTNhPeB_yAtJnYJxsVreLBEQb5cV2asrRPoYw4Go_GCRqfdFl7fv3WzutH2ue94nM0WHt7rManVDdCchw%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6e557499721b400985cadc0e054b64d6&_e=L244RBXvXfR_vCRKNx2qYuQzTNs-W6acCpgaL2qG7pmSqe3A98L6To2LR-mAhbU-v3mHnxAydQZdMre5cPPHMaVXFiRXprhwJug8lOLzd8b23Bup5mfEUyk-FjPeMXsNk3JCOkWzFUThaJcVKLPTO9Rt_fAXMddh-7tEtS20K-PHXkWsh9TAHkEhwTnbmWtCo-B_CJTQ4_nY1HSCNHqkRA98g_Oyd1-qgWsD9idavW9Q-1DqlZqTIunKIRXCMXnn6L9wcKIMyReNhZRIv7vOO5tnLB7KVM7PdEsFUOB8Pd-J5lPGlmVx2e1y8ZowVkhHTQHbnLKY5dpCD18hPcYrKRZfICmrIRqlO_TnuRoN0PINzmcsqF_suyOUttMPrhpIgJVgtjhWvP9C4Uc63yQL9Q%3D%3D)**

name: FightForReform.org
subject: re: Trump’s scheme to rig the Electoral College
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
We thought Democrats would jump at the chance to abolish the Electoral College...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
---
**This must be some mistake:** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41599?t=7&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv) When we emailed you yesterday, we thought Democrats would jump at the chance to abolish the Electoral College... _**but hardly anyone donated!**_

We’re **way** behind pace to make our $10,000 ad payment. If we don’t make up the difference soon, we could be forced to pull down our ads.

[**That’s why it’s crucial that we raise the final $7,879 to fully fund our Electoral College ads and support our work before midnight tomorrow. Please, chip in $7 (2X-MATCHED) now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41599?t=8&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv) | [2X-MATCH $7 now to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41599?t=9&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
---
We have two choices:
**CHOICE #1:** Sit on our hands and hope that the Electoral College doesn’t hand extremist Trump another corruption-riddled presidency.

**CHOICE #2:** Chip in [**$7**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41599?t=10&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv) to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College, strengthen our democracy, and save the country from Trump.
---
[**Please, Trump has never won the popular vote. If the Electoral College is abolished, he has no chance of winning in 2024. 2X-MATCH $7 now to help fund our ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41599?t=11&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[2X-MATCH $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41600?t=12&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
---
[2X-MATCH $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41601?t=13&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
[2X-MATCH $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41602?t=14&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
[2X-MATCH $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41603?t=15&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41599?t=16&akid=21197%2E4449941%2EbYvGEv)
We know you’ll make the right choice,

_– Fight for Reform_

name: VA Election Update
subject: RNC, Fox News, & Stephen Miller pile on attacks on Tim Kaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Yesterday, Tim Kaine appeared on Fox News Sunday to discuss the terrorist attack in Russia, the crisis at our southern border, and the stakes in the upcoming presidential election.
Within hours, the Republican attacks on Tim Kaine began piling on.
First, the Republican National Committee clipped a part of his comments out of context and posted it to their half-million-plus followers on the social media platform X (formerly Twitter).
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
It’s obvious to anyone who watched the entire clip that Tim Kaine is laser-focused on solving the crisis at our southern border — not on shouting racist dog whistles or using vicious stereotypes about immigrants to win votes.
But that didn’t stop the RNC, Fox News, and even Donald Trump stooge Stephen Miller from attacking Tim.
One thing is clear: The right is villainizing Tim because they know he’s an effective Senator for Virginia and a leader for Democratic policies nationwide. And they know he’s willing to call out Republicans when they deserve it — like when they tanked a bipartisan border security bill just last month.
That’s why they’re OBSESSED with replacing him with one of Trump’s right-wing lapdogs this November.
Will you help Tim stand up to the MAGA attacks by pitching in $20 or more to his campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for your support,
Team Kaine for VA

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: About as useful as a screen door on a submarine…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I just need a second to explain where I’m coming from

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

**It kills me to say this but some of these emails are about as useful as a screen door on a submarine.**

Maybe it's a few Big Tech overlords sending our emails to spam...

Maybe it's the crazies calling good folks like you traitors for ignoring them...

Maybe it's that most of you are a little tired of politics...

And on the last point, that's OK. I completely understand. But I want to explain where I'm coming from: You see, my Conservative friends over in the House have a HUGE deadline closing in, and I just got word they're pacing DANGEROUSLY behind their goal.

_We 'd have a real mess on our hands if they come up short._

I've never been one to dance around an issue when I speak with you. _**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/beBq3UWwD1prnBJl4wLw1w~~/AARclAA~ "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in just a few bucks before March is over and done with.")**_

Look, the deadline was important before but now I'm hearing Joe Biden just raised 40 million bucks last month and compared to Republicans, the DNC has THREE TIMES the cash-on-hand!

I'm afraid this will be enough to put Liberals over the top... That's why I really need your help right now.

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Our most critical endorsement yet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s not from who you might think.
#
Lucas Kunce is gaining some serious momentum, Peter.
Last year, he earned the earliest endorsements for a Missouri challenger ever from statewide labor groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO and the Missouri Fire Fighters. And he’s since been endorsed by major national organizations like Social Security Works PAC, League of Conservation Voters, and End Citizens United.
Last week, Abortion Action Missouri became the latest organization to throw their support behind Lucas — cementing his position as the Democrat who can defeat Josh Hawley, the control-obsessed politician who’s spent his career crusading against reproductive rights.
**Now, Lucas needs one more critical endorsement — from you.[Will you join the grassroots, worker-led coalition standing behind Lucas Kunce’s campaign for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240407_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=5214%2E614464%2ESLAknG)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240407_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=5214%2E614464%2ESLAknG)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together.
They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley this November — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Will you join our worker-led, people-powered movement to elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today? When you add your name, we send a signal to everyone watching our race that this movement is growing even stronger every day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240407_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=5214%2E614464%2ESLAknG)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240407_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=5214%2E614464%2ESLAknG)**
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240407-5214-footer&t=5&refcode2=5214_614464_SLAknG&akid=5214%2E614464%2ESLAknG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5214%2E614464%2ESLAknG). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Kristin Lyerly
subject: Big news: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
We have work to do. | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHH7ZDV6qhPSyv4yJp0n6lmtOLl-eaiXPMZCkQF7GRm8AL6zla_LPYdMUn5R3gE2JZe1RnLSXgEloEx7WINoXawYS2qGSor-TstbWrtEjJguTn6fqMnrsKKO8M4-zR-uKZAxvwktKFKFf3GoKk5rGeIiw1MZTkJmC1gjLS8T6c-RzXkomidNjxtd6_-WBRJ-fFAsiuN2TN6Xe72_L8-y6F2zprV7tivGUiM-9r4kthHtCJZDHOveMVlsGwKNDz0neAdFlj_XVH1vZbAcKOMf9lOHwB0Gvh95NgdqOscZ2SuwI/45b/-cxO3DyvQaOpAiaMobLGoA/h0/h001.yFUYeoUrMu7dVQm2ueL41lR0GbkSv6ONUn9hxcmVufY) | |
---
I wanted you to be the first to hear the big news: **I’m launching my campaign for Wisconsin’s 8th Congressional District.**

**_[I’d like to tell you my story, and ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Their Future PAC for a better future for Wisconsin and our country.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquArqlAcc5O_JK6WXlpdvQxJpzviQ5ZD3jVbyvdgVDH0jYmFZt5clMKZ8UL9oJoJlK4_1uFWdckRnPEd9mu-PvmCYDAoW2U6vwvYY2zhGe_7eOGwkUsLWzhQMIc4V1UXW5BS-wi3xgabLCEwbSppEPRPJmKSMaw0k1eK7a1yhR2YpRvbrBbUtTmcBnVqPnLpqrNoXXIHK0C5p_ZeeqntAlXWcb2y0hwsGRUeyTQ7f7iZyZdkDpxbYALv0r954v2iT3fcD7eaC03jAkZoe2k8u-rqribJLcoqsaxJsiIqU-Wi14mMfb8tKATUj-gfCUYEW0vTAJrvqqk9lIYcnHWdCVT/45b/-cxO3DyvQaOpAiaMobLGoA/h1/h001.6XPTA6b_PNlAOaYBTT-KDLPymjUfLQmpg0R3lnmuGYk)_**

I grew up in northeast Wisconsin, in a working class family where too often, we struggled.

As a kid, I would never have dreamed of running for office – though I always wanted to serve my community. I’ve been practicing medicine for years, **focusing on women’s health and reproductive care, while working particularly in underserved communities.**

But today, I’m not practicing in the Green Bay area, where I grew up and where I live. **Thanks first to the harsh restrictions on abortion care in Wisconsin that were passed in 1849 – before women could even vote – and then to the threat of retaliation from Republicans after I helped overturn those restrictions** I travel to Minnesota every month, and also travel to Arizona to continue to care for patients who need it most.

Those long commutes have given me plenty of time to think about where we’re at as a state, and as a country. I’ve spent a lot of time talking with my neighbors, fellow doctors, and folks all across our community about the challenges we’re facing. **Our healthcare system is in crisis. Doctors and nurses are leaving the field in droves. There’s confusion about how we can care for our patients under new restrictions that are a direct result of _Dobbs._** And it all goes back to the division that too many politicians have sown in recent years.

**I’m running for office to do something about it.**

We have a real opportunity to flip this open seat, put an end to the divisiveness, and pass policies that help families in northeast Wisconsin – and every corner of the country. From expanding rural broadband access to implementing a social safety net that catches struggling families, we’ve got a lot of work to do. It won’t be easy. But most things worth doing aren’t easy.

**_[I’m running for Congress to make a difference, and I’m asking for your support. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll split $5 or more between my campaign and Their Future PAC.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquArqlAcc5O_JK6WXlpdvQxJpzviQ5ZD3jVbyvdgVDH0jYmFZt5clMKZ8UL9oJoJlK4_1uFWdckRnPEd9mu-PvmCYDAoW2U6vwvYY2zhGe_7eOGwkUsLWzhQMIc4V1UXW7G9wZgADkfWoiqnxoHq4Hv735c-rvDCRlN0fmvYkq6nrwXbajQxRJKocGzP7UNElyTRcQ_w2g-V9H3W3fA3jm4FVu2bMjc3ek2OdK4LdsgCEmRnV3JzrBKbQz3OJhneEDzS6jljITGbx5FVAiq6FHVQlWwpV6z1pIVcgXgPzkFW2aKOTw34o26V9tCNNu-tVQteOFLc6WXTohduQav3Fh8/45b/-cxO3DyvQaOpAiaMobLGoA/h2/h001._l7DLX_VzaRpnca05guv_zKbkjTteqD7_EIsoEf4Vl0)_**

clean_body: We have work to do. | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | I wanted you to be the first to hear the big news: I’m launching my campaign for Wisconsin’s 8th Congressional District. I grew up in northeast Wisconsin, in a working class family where too often, we struggled. As a kid, I would never have dreamed of running for office – though I always wanted to serve my community. I’ve been practicing medicine for years, focusing on women’s health and reproductive care, while working particularly in underserved communities. But today, I’m not practicing in the Green Bay area, where I grew up and where I live. Thanks first to the harsh restrictions on abortion care in Wisconsin that were passed in 1849 – before women could even vote – and then to the threat of retaliation from Republicans after I helped overturn those restrictions I travel to Minnesota every month, and also travel to Arizona to continue to care for patients who need it most. Those long commutes have given me plenty of time to think about where we’re at as a state, and as a country. I’ve spent a lot of time talking with my neighbors, fellow doctors, and folks all across our community about the challenges we’re facing. Our healthcare system is in crisis. Doctors and nurses are leaving the field in droves. There’s confusion about how we can care for our patients under new restrictions that are a direct result of Dobbs. And it all goes back to the division that too many politicians have sown in recent years. I’m running for office to do something about it. We have a real opportunity to flip this open seat, put an end to the divisiveness, and pass policies that help families in northeast Wisconsin – and every corner of the country. From expanding rural broadband access to implementing a social safety net that catches struggling families, we’ve got a lot of work to do. It won’t be easy. But most things worth doing aren’t easy. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Kristin Lyerly and Their Future PAC and will process immediately. | | | | | | Let’s go! Kristin Dr. Kristin Lyerly Candidate for Congress, Wisconsin’s 8th Congressional District * | | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC If you need to you can unsubscribe by . | | Sent via . name: Hill Harper
subject: We can’t afford to leave a SINGLE vote on the table, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
So here’s why I’m asking you to chip in.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)
Peter,
As we look ahead to the Senate primary election in Michigan, I'm asking for our supporters’ help on a critical campaign initiative: **reaching _every_ Michigan voter.**
In an election this consequential, we can’t leave a single vote on the table. That means going out in the community, talking to every possible voter, and sharing our progressive vision — something we can _only_ get done with your support.
**Since I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money to fund this campaign, your grassroots support is _critical._** **[Will you rush a $5 donation to give our field team the resources they need to kick our voter outreach into high gear?](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1190?t=3&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)**
I’m proud to say that our dedicated field team is making headway on the ground here in Michigan. They’re working tirelessly to share our campaign’s vision and build winning momentum, and our efforts are paying off — the latest polls show we’re closing the gap!
But as a first-time candidate up against major establishment money, I don’t have the same reach as my establishment opponent. **That’s why I’m asking for your support to keep the momentum going and share our campaign’s priorities with Michigan voters:**
✅ Delivering **universal healthcare** access in America
✅ **Raising the federal minimum wage** for the first time since 2009
✅ Getting the corrosive influence of **dark money out of politics**
✅ **Holding the GOP and far-right accountable** for their extremism in the Senate
✅ Ending the Senate filibuster and **enshrining the right to abortion in federal law**
I’m running on this progressive platform 👆🏾because I’m tired of career politicians failing us on the issues that matter. They refuse to act on basic priorities, yet they come begging for our vote election after election, only to let us down when push comes to shove.
I’m offering something different, Peter. As a first-time candidate, I’m beholden to no one but YOU. **Period.**
**[So please, chip $5, $25, or any amount that works for you to help us share our message in every corner of Michigan. That’s what it’s going to take to beat the odds and win this race.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1196?t=4&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)**
**[RUSH A DONATION »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1196?t=5&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)**
Thank you for your support,
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1196?t=6&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=7&refcode2=1140_62735_vIrWh1&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1140%2E62735%2EvIrWh1)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's Kellyanne Conway reaching out to have a frank discussion with you ahead of the pivotal 2024 general election. Believe it or not, we are less than eight months until voters head to the polls to help save our nation and get this country back on track.

If you feel like we're living in a time warp and Election Day 2020 just came to an end, believe me, you're not alone.

While so much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the cost of living and crime have increased, so much has stayed the same.

1. Americans _still want_ lower taxes. \*\*tap here if you agree!\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1831.1.491d0773aecba0b3d7dafc3e750ab14e )

2. Americans are _still fighting_ for safer communities in which to raise their families. \*\*tap here if you agree!\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1832.1.b490208a25b2fc956c89e7d5091f41d8 )

3. And Americans simply want enough cash in their bank accounts to pay their bills and have a little fun. \*\*tap here if you agree!\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1833.1.462596604a9f24a3754a5baa2c284b15 )

Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. But under the so-called "leadership" of President Biden and Montana U.S. Sen. Jon Tester, Americans are frustrated and fed up with the lackluster economy and weakness on the world stage.

\*\*That's why I am writing to you in support of Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy, the leading candidate to replace failed D.C. insider Jon Tester. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1834.1.003236365378c88ff073ba5cf987f0e2 )\*\* The contrast between these two individuals is clear: one is a bonafide American hero, while the other has made a living doing the bidding of Democrat party elders.

I know that Tim has been reaching out to you for months. I also know that some of my friends in the U.S. Senate have been reaching out to you, too. But I want to make sure you hear it from me: \*\*Tim is our best shot at beating Jon Tester and flipping the Senate majority, yet his fundraising numbers are lower than they ought to be, while Biden-supporting Democrat and phony Jon Tester has a massive warchest. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1835.1.cdabe41fc5193f469b4d57984558415a )\*\*

You could say that I know a thing or two about polling – and \*\*_polling shows that with adequate resources, Tim can defeat Jon Tester and flip a Senate seat Republicans have been chasing after since 2006._\*\*

->\*\*send a contribution right now

Help me help Tim\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1836.1.c47dd2752c0017ea28b17515240bdb98 )<-

Right now, it's time to channel our frustrations into defeating the DEMS at the ballot box next November. And I'm not just talking about Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – I'm talking about all Democrats, namely fake "moderate" Jon Tester.

Chuck Grassley emailed you.

Marco Rubio emailed you.

Marsha Blackburn emailed you.

Steve Daines emailed you.

\*\*Now I am asking you to join me in helping to ensure our candidates have the resources ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1837.1.229750ccb34bf719431a55b1d308c8b6 )\*\* we need to defeat the Leftist agenda, Biden and his allies.

\*\*The time is NOW. I need you to do this for me, Navy Seal Tim Sheehy, and for America. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1838.1.f2a9a8bea30fbeac348b1dbf0448ae6b )\*\*

Let's get it done.

God bless you.

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1839.1.864c5cdbed9347cf3b2342e66f80248b )

Kellyanne Conway

->\*\*send a contribution right now

Help me help Tim\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4200820.1840.1.565155a85551248e309964e709614bf2 )<-

->

\* \* \*

“

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY — NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."
