name: Sarah McBride
subject: I ran to advocate for those who were facing life’s biggest challenges
body:
In 2019, when I decided to run for the State Senate, I was driven by one simple reason.
#
In 2019, when I decided to run for the Delaware State Senate, I was driven by one simple reason: I had to advocate for the people who were facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them.
**People like my husband Andy.**
When Andy was battling cancer, paid leave allowed him to focus on the full time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. We were both lucky.
But, through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs.
**Making paid leave possible for workers and families across Delaware was a huge part of why I ran for the State Senate.**
Andy’s and my struggle shaped the very bill I introduced (and passed!) in the Senate. The Healthy Delaware Families Act provided workers with up to 12-weeks of paid leave — **the largest expansion of the social safety net in modern state history.**
**Now, I’m asking for your help so we can work for those too often left out in Congress.** Universal healthcare, early childhood education, paid leave for all, gun safety, securing voting, reproductive, LGBTQ rights, reforming our criminal justice system, and much, much more. That’s what you can count on me to work for in Washington.
**[So, if you’re able, please consider making a contribution to our campaign. Every $5, $10, and $25 goes a long way in a race like this — and we need all hands on deck.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240407-1?refcode=em20240407-1-20&refcode2=20_21716_depTIA&akid=20%2E21716%2EdepTIA)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240407-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240407-1-20&refcode2=20_21716_depTIA&akid=20%2E21716%2EdepTIA)**
Thanks for hearing me out,
— Sarah
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=1&akid=20%2E21716%2EdepTIA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=2&akid=20%2E21716%2EdepTIA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=20%2E21716%2EdepTIA)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Riley
subject: One pack of gum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moore for West Virginia
body:
I’m so grateful you opened this email.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=474569ebf3594e98913f751e5b1a84b5&_e=Rmqcx7wJ-hBFdEEXU5I8jRzIVOjlF4qCzpoG6auQ3blZRJoDIHb2CoWUqClOY-kgudolzfH-6XVgCF6QJ9rC59urX51S0iA3HlMbQWiygjN4qJOKik-z1OsVTtl8j6R4Mld6deL1xXRH0CbhggUIewHoj4R1coSmFY-gwpKaYqdStcg3WV0dwFVM5PncitAUEm0o006w-dy8Vgp6pJh6dZLCddD57sy-V45YdkqOlwImj9IbbL9RN-Mjbal8q0YZ2TD-hlOpxYllY4hwUfJudXzziVn3jBGbM-dllmSGch-SztZF8JTkC3GO4cHHm-dBlu_k-l1bZKkwWeqfZS52dfVqkAV-a3DbVVsNdPTnd5a8Im2Kg_GkIj1mWWvASdg-sbyP98i4alyc8ZLfyJN1xQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

I’m so incredibly grateful that you chose to open and read this email. Only about 30-40% of people open these emails - and with all the political emails being sent these days, I’m so happy you opened this one.

Unfortunately, in order to stay in touch with conservatives like you, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls.

**With that said, can you please do me the simple favor of reading this all the way to the end?** If you reach the end and still don’t think you can make a difference, then I want to thank you for your time.

With an average of 35% of supporters opening these messages, only 1% of supporters step up and donate. This makes it difficult for my campaign since I depend on Americans like you receiving this email to help me hit my fundraising goal.

I refuse to rely on Hollywood Elites and Dark Money for fundraising goals. I want our conservative values and fight to be fueled by those who believe in them the most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email donated just $1 - _**one singular dollar**_ \- we’d blow all of our goals out of the water.

| [**DONATE $1**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=474569ebf3594e98913f751e5b1a84b5&_e=Rmqcx7wJ-hBFdEEXU5I8jRzIVOjlF4qCzpoG6auQ3blZRJoDIHb2CoWUqClOY-kgudolzfH-6XVgCF6QJ9rC59urX51S0iA3HlMbQWiygjN4qJOKik-z1OsVTtl8j6R4Mld6deL1xXRH0CbhggUIewHoj4R1coSmFY-gwpKaYqdStcg3WV0dwFVM5PncitAU3rAG_TBuLjOsWj-2WmpJEtJgdFHOx47TWRG_OSJBrjENCqhmRpjnQxACtIvjerGFWkCTZ7qTBx2ybCxLxVTIIcDK_-1OM9vApcu9kAHhu66dJHayosxU-ALIOJI4WOSESuVYsSksZJEM1qAgsFh2pU67Y1pPYjo11fyGlONb3ouYEsvFAcYd9DU7j1WoSxtJiqk19L5b-BZp8y-F5l-3AA%3D%3D)
---
[**CHIP IN ANYTHING**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=474569ebf3594e98913f751e5b1a84b5&_e=Rmqcx7wJ-hBFdEEXU5I8jRzIVOjlF4qCzpoG6auQ3blZRJoDIHb2CoWUqClOY-kgudolzfH-6XVgCF6QJ9rC59urX51S0iA3HlMbQWiygjN4qJOKik-z1OsVTtl8j6R4Mld6deL1xXRH0CbhggUIewHoj4R1coSmFY-gwpKaYqdStcg3WV0dwFVM5PncitAU3rAG_TBuLjOsWj-2WmpJEtJgdFHOx47TWRG_OSJBrjEK-rTPoTVfvWRwix-HBEFILVbkpeBj4XZaT8JMNdwVWr6DWefXU56EgHPuFxUYbbvy2aDx71hIYVm75puhTjqX1l_4htYZsKdtqBQ1H1mvcn18Zq6fW003rxXWivhMIqf1QqXqwU2NU6DUkJOQ0rzmvW9qi4fdUd4GrA0oKDfbmw%3D%3D)
---

Growing up, hard-working Americans were able to buy homes and live in good and safe communities. Now, with inflation on the rise, it is becoming harder for Americans who make an honest living to be able to live comfortably and see the American dream come to life.

I want to restore America to a time when Americans could afford homes, groceries, cars, and living expenses. These essential costs are growing beyond what many Americans can afford. No one should have to choose between food and shelter.

**[Democrats rely on Hollywood and New York Elites who are billionaires - I rely on people like you, who can give $1, $3, $9, or even $20 to reach my goals.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=474569ebf3594e98913f751e5b1a84b5&_e=Rmqcx7wJ-hBFdEEXU5I8jRzIVOjlF4qCzpoG6auQ3blZRJoDIHb2CoWUqClOY-kgudolzfH-6XVgCF6QJ9rC59urX51S0iA3HlMbQWiygjN4qJOKik-z1OsVTtl8j6R4Mld6deL1xXRH0CbhggUIewHoj4R1coSmFY-gwpKaYqdStcg3WV0dwFVM5PncitAUEm0o006w-dy8Vgp6pJh6dZLCddD57sy-V45YdkqOlwIBFrdYDTqJ1Z8FPhf92LNnn02gxxSjBg14nQNwU-GpDZQqlQRrb18pzrlwtImuD01zqgXhCQcmiiYheDvr3ZVSdKHYQfFSxxJTVOBOOTwMid9cFM8MCyKy_4LUedR0viZ5MQAGz2N3Rn28BnU_nGdNbOs2yUevzDMA3gRka8H0Zg%3D%3D)**

**I’m humbly asking if you could go above and beyond and donate the cost of a pack of gum - $1.**

[**CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A PACK OF GUM**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=474569ebf3594e98913f751e5b1a84b5&_e=Rmqcx7wJ-hBFdEEXU5I8jRzIVOjlF4qCzpoG6auQ3blZRJoDIHb2CoWUqClOY-kgudolzfH-6XVgCF6QJ9rC59urX51S0iA3HlMbQWiygjN4qJOKik-z1OsVTtl8j6R4Mld6deL1xXRH0CbhggUIewHoj4R1coSmFY-gwpKaYqdStcg3WV0dwFVM5PncitAU3rAG_TBuLjOsWj-2WmpJEtJgdFHOx47TWRG_OSJBrjGRAhhLb1lqLV1xeo0NPCnVwLhGEj1ciVMV3guBq3_FMZDYZmWpCZKjA7ZTCiEN6hkgQM5LFQfdUVutI_2H4lMQ8HHUzlEIGRMLUO77aYGDw6TkEYUTMaWd5KJkVhIMng14Q7_9Fn5grwXvxpN9hjY_r0dCarHA1jxuQ0nFpTKcOA%3D%3D)
---

_The Left hopes I give up and stop sending you these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

It’d be their dream come true if we both gave up on our Conservative values._

_**I won’t give up on you, and I hope you won’t give up on me or our Conservative values.**_ I know most people will ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what we’re fighting for. If you think you’re better off than you were 4 years ago, then I understand why you don’t want to donate today.

But if you’re like me, and believe we must get America back on track and make the American Dream possible again, please donate whatever you can before midnight.

clean_body: I’m so grateful you opened this email. | Fellow American, I’m so incredibly grateful that you chose to open and read this email. Only about 30-40% of people open these emails - and with all the political emails being sent these days, I’m so happy you opened this one. Unfortunately, in order to stay in touch with conservatives like you, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls. With that said, can you please do me the simple favor of reading this all the way to the end? If you reach the end and still don’t think you can make a difference, then I want to thank you for your time. With an average of 35% of supporters opening these messages, only 1% of supporters step up and donate. This makes it difficult for my campaign since I depend on Americans like you receiving this email to help me hit my fundraising goal. I refuse to rely on Hollywood Elites and Dark Money for fundraising goals. I want our conservative values and fight to be fueled by those who believe in them the most - you and me. And you know what? If everyone who opened this email donated just $1 - one singular dollar \- we’d blow all of our goals out of the water. | Growing up, hard-working Americans were able to buy homes and live in good and safe communities. Now, with inflation on the rise, it is becoming harder for Americans who make an honest living to be able to live comfortably and see the American dream come to life. I want to restore America to a time when Americans could afford homes, groceries, cars, and living expenses. These essential costs are growing beyond what many Americans can afford. No one should have to choose between food and shelter. I’m humbly asking if you could go above and beyond and donate the cost of a pack of gum - $1. The Left hopes I give up and stop sending you these emails. They also hope you stop reading these emails. It’d be their dream come true if we both gave up on our Conservative values. I won’t give up on you, and I hope you won’t give up on me or our Conservative values. I know most people will ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what we’re fighting for. If you think you’re better off than you were 4 years ago, then I understand why you don’t want to donate today. But if you’re like me, and believe we must get America back on track and make the American Dream possible again, please donate whatever you can before midnight. God Bless, Riley | RILEY MOORE: CONSERVATIVE FOR CONGRESS. Washington is all tied up in putting politics over principle. It’s time to put a stop to it and start putting PRINCIPLES OVER POLITICS - starting with YOU! | Paid for by Moore for West Virginia. Arch A. Moore III, Treasurer. www.mooreforwv.com Moore for West Virginia. PO Box 603, Harpers Ferry, WV 25425. Copyright (C) 2024 Moore for West Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My favorite part of the job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This will only take a minute (or two, tops!)
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2360%2E35263%2EbahW_u)
Hi Peter, Meeting folks all across Wisconsin and hearing about their hopes for the future is my favorite part of the job — and it’s one of the most important parts, too. I just completed my Dairyland Tour of Wisconsin, where I traveled nearly 1,400 miles and visited 19 counties. I met with Wisconsinites from rural, urban, and suburban communities all over the state to listen to them and hear about the most pressing issues they’re facing. I’m taking everything I heard right back to Washington to find solutions for our families and keep our communities moving forward. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter** — I wish we could sit down together over a cup of coffee and talk about the issues that matter most to your family. But I figured sending you a quick email to ask for your input would be the next best thing. **[Can you take a minute (two, tops!) to take our short priorities survey to let us know what issues are most important to you and your family?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/Apr_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240407_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2360%2E35263%2EbahW_u)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/Apr_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240407_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2360%2E35263%2EbahW_u)
---
Thanks in advance for sharing your thoughts with me. I’m looking forward to reviewing your response with my team in the coming days!
Onward,
Tammy

| Republicans poured more than $77 million into Wisconsin’s Senate race in 2022 and won by 1%. name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: We’re proud to endorse these 14 congresswomen for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As Gabby always says, strong women get things done
#

Hi there. We’re proud to announce that we just endorsed a slate of 14 incumbent congresswomen for re-election:
✅Julia Brownley (CA-26)
✅ Brittany Pettersen (CO-07)
✅ Kathy Castor (FL-14)
✅ Lois Frankel (FL-22)
✅ Debbie Wasserman Schultz (FL-25)
✅ Nikema Williams (GA-05)
✅ Lauren Underwood (IL-14)
✅ Ayanna Pressley (MA-07)
✅ Haley Stevens (MI-11)
✅ Deborah Ross (NC-02)
✅ Melanie Stansbury (NM-01)
✅ Mary Gay Scanlon (PA-05)
✅ Pramila Jayapal (WA-07)
✅ Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)
We know that these 14 women will continue their critical work in the House of Representatives championing gun safety legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
It’s no secret that women’s rights are under attack, and that includes the right to live safe from gun violence. Women’s representation in government matters, and that’s why we need to make sure these 14 leaders hold their seats in the House so that they can continue their critical work to end gun violence.
**As Gabby always says, strong women get things done.**
[**So please, will you chip in $3—or any amount that makes sense for you—to help us support these 14 women in their re-election campaigns?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240407-1-30&t=1&akid=7907%2E3935704%2EvggOR1)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign on today to support my resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr and honoring our Muslim neighbors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
As our Muslim neighbors break daily fasts with family and communities, many Muslims are grieving and horrified as the Israeli government intentionally starves millions of people in Gaza. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWc-6kVThmY0fQknoUXPWx2u4tlMvG__3tc9ki2YGED53MxI9-yzvESXZAZTd_layz4VNKAMkkCHCfdavYYHrPXSCpcNpTtF2zizcQD-q5b4mEjmu5wCr7wjrpYA4qot4sk0_Yp500twWHi8WyMHMcQfQJWpxodCpu3Sdfl0RbWrRMfWomz--kC3Wepfa8F5ir1QGhJXlNecJhKSR5xwwWqAE9xQAXFtwPZj9BpfVrZMvp24xqvkE5T_ebBbfoXeuP8huiTPfTw80rdrWhvTBWi0ISewiUe_sy0fHf3EwvqXLhBhvZbhxs9k3y3mbgtyKmmSNpjdNuuPsq23JE2p4pPQ/45b/peBMSO4yS7CiJDFAexw3-w/h0/h001.MXTQOR1HbhKlKV--2WcDiFwq33N518ZExihs_jtyrJE)
---
Friend, We’re approaching the end of Ramadan, the holy month of fasting and spiritual renewal for Muslims around the world. Last year, I introduced a resolution in Congress to recognize Eid al-Fitr, the observance of the conclusion of Ramadan, and to offer best wishes and support to all Muslims celebrating. This year, it’s not a celebration, as we do all we can to stop the brutal devastation in Gaza. At community iftars and while breaking daily fasts with family, our Muslim neighbors are thinking about Palestinian children who are dying from intentional starvation. Despite the UN Security Council passing a binding resolution for a ceasefire in the last few weeks of Ramadan, the Israeli government continues to bomb Gaza. This is a violation of international law, as is the flagrant disregard for the International Court of Justice’s orders to stop genocidal acts. But the Biden administration continues to send weapons anyway, and just last week authorized a transfer of weapons including “bunker buster” bombs that flatten entire neighborhoods. **We must value life here and around the world, including honoring the humanity of Arab and Muslim people. That’s what my congressional resolution recognizing Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr starts to do.** The resolution recognizes that over 200 elected officials identify as Muslim, there are 1.2 million Muslim voters in the U.S., and American Muslims have contributed to every part of society including making advancements in medicine, education, science, and more. It includes language about the U.S. House of Representatives recognizing the importance of the Islamic faith, demonstrating solidarity with and support for Muslims, and expressing deep respect and best wishes to Muslims celebrating Eid al-Fitr. **In a time of rising Islamophobia and dehumanization, when people are using Muslims’ mere existence in the U.S. to fear-monger, passing this resolution would be significant.** [**Can you sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of my Congressional resolution that recognizes Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr, and calls on Congress to respect \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Apr 6, 2024
Subject: Sign on today to support my resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr and honoring our Muslim neighbors
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
For Muslims around the world, we are in the holiest time of Ramadan, which is the holiest month of the year. It has been one of the hardest Ramadan months that I can remember.
As many know, Ramadan is a month for solidarity and empathy with impoverished and oppressed people, including taking actions like feeding hungry people.
As our Muslim neighbors break daily fasts with family and communities, many Muslims are grieving and horrified as the Israeli government intentionally starves millions of people in Gaza. They can't eat without thinking of starvation being used as a weapon of war in Gaza.
We’re seeing images of Muslims in Gaza praying among the rubble because their mosques were destroyed. Even during Easter, seeing the beloved Christian Palestinians in Gaza celebrate among the wreckage. Many have had to bury their loved ones during this genocide.
**Last year, I introduced a resolution in Congress to recognize Eid al-Fitr, the observance of the conclusion of Ramadan. It is even more important to bring this recognition to Congress as others use our mere existence in the U.S. for political games and fear-mongering.**
I still remember a colleague in Congress from New Jersey yell out, “They are all guilty,” referring to the Muslim community.
Our own lawmakers continue to make violent, dehumanizing, and genocidal statements, like the U.S. Congressperson from Michigan who recently called to repeat the unimaginable horrors of Nagasaki and Hiroshima by dropping nuclear weapons on Gaza.
**This devaluation of life is not only dangerous for the human beings suffering in Palestine, but it’s also dangerous for Palestinian Americans, Muslim Americans, and Arab Americans, who are facing increased Islamophobia and anti-Arab hate.**
My congressional resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr also recognizes the contributions of American Muslims to our society. It calls on the U.S. House of Representatives to recognize the importance of the Islamic faith, to demonstrate solidarity with and support for Muslims, and to express deep respect and best wishes to Muslims celebrating Eid al-Fitr.

clean_body: As our Muslim neighbors break daily fasts with family and communities, many Muslims are grieving and horrified as the Israeli government intentionally starves millions of people in Gaza. | | | Friend, We’re approaching the end of Ramadan, the holy month of fasting and spiritual renewal for Muslims around the world. Last year, I introduced a resolution in Congress to recognize Eid al-Fitr, the observance of the conclusion of Ramadan, and to offer best wishes and support to all Muslims celebrating. This year, it’s not a celebration, as we do all we can to stop the brutal devastation in Gaza. At community iftars and while breaking daily fasts with family, our Muslim neighbors are thinking about Palestinian children who are dying from intentional starvation. Despite the UN Security Council passing a binding resolution for a ceasefire in the last few weeks of Ramadan, the Israeli government continues to bomb Gaza. This is a violation of international law, as is the flagrant disregard for the International Court of Justice’s orders to stop genocidal acts. But the Biden administration continues to send weapons anyway, and just last week authorized a transfer of weapons including “bunker buster” bombs that flatten entire neighborhoods. We must value life here and around the world, including honoring the humanity of Arab and Muslim people. That’s what my congressional resolution recognizing Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr starts to do. The resolution recognizes that over 200 elected officials identify as Muslim, there are 1.2 million Muslim voters in the U.S., and American Muslims have contributed to every part of society including making advancements in medicine, education, science, and more. It includes language about the U.S. House of Representatives recognizing the importance of the Islamic faith, demonstrating solidarity with and support for Muslims, and expressing deep respect and best wishes to Muslims celebrating Eid al-Fitr. In a time of rising Islamophobia and dehumanization, when people are using Muslims’ mere existence in the U.S. to fear-monger, passing this resolution would be significant. | Thank you. Together we will keep building toward equity and dignity for all people. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Apr 6, 2024 Subject: Sign on today to support my resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr and honoring our Muslim neighbors To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, For Muslims around the world, we are in the holiest time of Ramadan, which is the holiest month of the year. It has been one of the hardest Ramadan months that I can remember. As many know, Ramadan is a month for solidarity and empathy with impoverished and oppressed people, including taking actions like feeding hungry people. As our Muslim neighbors break daily fasts with family and communities, many Muslims are grieving and horrified as the Israeli government intentionally starves millions of people in Gaza. They can't eat without thinking of starvation being used as a weapon of war in Gaza. We’re seeing images of Muslims in Gaza praying among the rubble because their mosques were destroyed. Even during Easter, seeing the beloved Christian Palestinians in Gaza celebrate among the wreckage. Many have had to bury their loved ones during this genocide. Last year, I introduced a resolution in Congress to recognize Eid al-Fitr, the observance of the conclusion of Ramadan. It is even more important to bring this recognition to Congress as others use our mere existence in the U.S. for political games and fear-mongering. I still remember a colleague in Congress from New Jersey yell out, “They are all guilty,” referring to the Muslim community. Our own lawmakers continue to make violent, dehumanizing, and genocidal statements, like the U.S. Congressperson from Michigan who recently called to repeat the unimaginable horrors of Nagasaki and Hiroshima by dropping nuclear weapons on Gaza. This devaluation of life is not only dangerous for the human beings suffering in Palestine, but it’s also dangerous for Palestinian Americans, Muslim Americans, and Arab Americans, who are facing increased Islamophobia and anti-Arab hate. My congressional resolution recognizing Eid al-Fitr also recognizes the contributions of American Muslims to our society. It calls on the U.S. House of Representatives to recognize the importance of the Islamic faith, to demonstrate solidarity with and support for Muslims, and to express deep respect and best wishes to Muslims celebrating Eid al-Fitr. Thank you for helping build a world with equity and dignity for all, no matter our backgrounds. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Peter — Roy Cooper has spent decades fighting for public education and to ensure our students and teachers have the resources they need to excel. But our far-right legislature is putting those public schools at risk, trying to dismantle our public education system and direct resources away from the kids who need them most. **Instead, they plan to spend $4 billion of taxpayer money on vouchers for private school tuition, with NO income limit. Even millionaires can pick up a check for their kids, who are already in private schools.** Our GOP-controlled legislature has already allowed NC public schools to fall to the bottom in terms of investments for students. Our teachers and students are struggling. Now, the far-right voucher scheme will take millions more from public schools. **[Roy needs you to step up and demand an END to the GOP’s voucher scheme, Peter. clean_body: The far-right voucher scam has to end. | Peter — Roy Cooper has spent decades fighting for public education and to ensure our students and teachers have the resources they need to excel. But our far-right legislature is putting those public schools at risk, trying to dismantle our public education system and direct resources away from the kids who need them most. Instead, they plan to spend $4 billion of taxpayer money on vouchers for private school tuition, with NO income limit. Even millionaires can pick up a check for their kids, who are already in private schools. Our GOP-controlled legislature has already allowed NC public schools to fall to the bottom in terms of investments for students. Our teachers and students are struggling. Now, the far-right voucher scheme will take millions more from public schools. | Thanks for taking action, Team Cooper = = North Carolina is set to be one of the most important swing states in the 2024 elections. Republicans need to win NC to return Donald Trump to the White House. Meanwhile, Roy is committed to flipping our state blue for President Biden. Roy is term-limited and can’t run again this time, and our upcoming gubernatorial election is considered the most competitive gubernatorial contest in the country. Meanwhile, Republicans hold just one-seat supermajorities in both chambers of the state legislature — we MUST break the supermajorities to prevent the GOP from enacting their radical agenda in North Carolina. = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Trump just tore into me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I need your help to fight back.
Peter,
Donald Trump just visited Michigan to rally his supporters – and he called me out. He knows that our campaign is the only thing stopping Republicans from flipping the Senate, and this is unfortunately just the start of his attacks.
I would deeply appreciate your help to fight back and keep Michigan blue in November. Please, use this link to donate now to our campaign and Bob Casey: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240407-2?refcode=20240402-2](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240407-2?refcode=em20240407-2&refcode2=2591_552475_e_fr5Y&akid=2591%2E552475%2Ee_fr5Y)**
At his event this week, Trump stood with Mike Rogers directly behind him and emphasized how important this Senate race will be to him taking back the White House in November. In between a fountain of misleading and downright falsehoods, Trump also said that, with his support, Mike Rogers will have “tremendous success” against me in this race.
I’m counting on you to help prove him wrong.
This week's event is an indication that Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they can at Michigan, and that Michigan Democrats can’t take anything for granted.
No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state – full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.
We can't let that happen. Want to help? [**Chip in what you can to our campaign and Bob Casey and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240407-2?refcode=em20240407-2&refcode2=2591_552475_e_fr5Y&akid=2591%2E552475%2Ee_fr5Y)
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

Philadelphia, PA 19102

At Team Bohannan, we've always believed that healthcare is a fundamental human right.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82559626/465658261/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc5NjgwOC1mN2Y0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DanD4uM7m0e8UiVWixXBRgBFx1ZuPS3VKaeB19ZdbMo=)
Peter,

Today marks World Health Day 2024!

At Team Bohannan, we've always believed that healthcare is a fundamental human right. **It shouldn't be determined by your zip code or your income level – it's a basic necessity for everyone.**

Christina is committed to fighting for policies that ensure access to quality healthcare for all. That means expanding mental health resources, supporting our rural hospitals, and addressing other healthcare issues that impact communities across Iowa and beyond.

As we strive to improve living conditions and standards for all Americans, **access to affordable healthcare remains at the forefront of our mission.**

This World Health Day, we're asking you to stand with us. **[Add your name alongside ours to call on leaders nationwide to prioritize investing in and expanding healthcare for all>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82559627/465658262/-1078953234?ms=em24_240407_whdpet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_b&refcode=em24_240407_whdpet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_b&source=em24_240407_whdpet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_b&utm_campaign=em24_240407_whdpet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_b&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FL8LzlfejvT4xYGY5F36YR1V3G3AHKtNUQoJLcuw47NJ3MsGVFeyqCU2nUUH+br3xv6s2Nlh3gEHP7YuEaRHoMTTxSD4GEOOXCpPE6m3lu+8iu1LyFlbmewk7TAve0aDBS706CcaNzC2OWm76mROabAria3edjZAeOECJb1ZLoY=&refcode2=fa796808-f7f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc5NjgwOC1mN2Y0LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DanD4uM7m0e8UiVWixXBRgBFx1ZuPS3VKaeB19ZdbMo=&emci=088b46ba-6cf3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=fa796808-f7f4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=13891890)**

Right now, Brandon Herrera is in a runoff election with 2A sell-out Tony Gonzales - and **[**we need ALL hands on deck to help Tony pack his bags and send Brandon to Washington**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9adb5bfcb8cb4ff9887b796263d462da&_e=lRczCcDNzXoxgFBYiLbN8oYn2jmqZMxV-z6boKUQbWViTATBZYiARFK-llLoHYaq-b8LYl5fc69Hp1PXMUXK8dKy0VIJR3Nkk7SO9bU9n-pMZqzAI8qtvvg6VALclvUjH0gC5CLUTGuklYwJpcZuAqQXAcUyjvdSP0W6Htr0wV4KIYs2Vt0_X9BahyW5hG8dQnrABrMkZk4V_4nfjULLZIyeFjWtjme70cyYWZTVGL8kDkdeBx3HHMBi8nCOLqK5xFa-eF29Q98pqQ4WrsDA8h_t5sfRNk4WGPGGeWtlO13-DTIKtTfDqtbiSSpESoIq17HmaDnqiukbO-n6lldkE8otKLe5XOZDZrFIwTXZ60RNKhuq4Vb1pENHCPyjdPR8r-a07G7TmGQGgloqHuswqZ-X_iBtMkWFmuweRWbWIjSZyGhhA7nKev5A5Z9vV1Un).** _Here 's why..._ **RINO Squish Tony Gonzales cast a crucial vote in favor of the "Bipartisan Safer Communities Act" (or should we say "Cornyn-Murphy Gun Control") - the law that passed following the tragic shooting in Uvalde. ** **Tony Gonzales is the reason:** ❌ The federal government illegally incentivized states to pass Red Flag laws, even those that fail to implement necessary due process protections ❌ The feds fund state-level gun confiscation programs **We didn 't end up with Red Flag laws because Congress passed sweeping bills to take away our Second Amendment rights.** _**It 's because RINO Squish Tony Gonzales sided with the anti-gun Left, Joe Biden, and Nancy Pelosi in compromising and selling out law-abiding gun owners.**_ Whenever Tony Gonzales thinks he can get away with voting for gun control, he does - and he will do it again.
---
[**RUSH IN TO OUST TONY GONZALES**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9adb5bfcb8cb4ff9887b796263d462da&_e=lRczCcDNzXoxgFBYiLbN8oYn2jmqZMxV-z6boKUQbWViTATBZYiARFK-llLoHYaq-b8LYl5fc69Hp1PXMUXK8dKy0VIJR3Nkk7SO9bU9n-pMZqzAI8qtvvg6VALclvUjH0gC5CLUTGuklYwJpcZuAqQXAcUyjvdSP0W6Htr0wV4KIYs2Vt0_X9BahyW5hG8dQnrABrMkZk4V_4nfjULLZIyeFjWtjme70cyYWZTVGL8kDkdeBx3HHMBi8nCOLqK5xFa-eF29Q98pqQ4WrsDA8h_t5sfRNk4WGPGGeWtlO13MUJkyms4WlXkFHQ4Dl1EcIa-tsoBJmr2w4qwP8YBY-fP0Mb4ndNfqs-nOvKhHL7QLQ3vR3_PBKpWlH_FB_SmZftBtdnR2NfKedcxEtsgFRIznb3xx0QU7TXXZ0bQmTpsWZGY1a7dedXwnuVv7RT-z)

subject: Liberty in America is under serious threat
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b1bb662864914ab1b3171d17bededa43&_t=vN6rOS6nHZJhVnufR0S1AHymOMSbfi18RMKcVqBthMcbvR_UTu2HcNSdG1uUMNEN5AWTSwt-1Jo0AnJjDwbXcu14M9OiNeqGObfF4duvZms%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b1bb662864914ab1b3171d17bededa43&_e=jlXv16DOO86_thD-4ZhPhvMh2uTrNHeOZB6DnupnLNNJUUC2qyCOBQN3xMXQTT3iX-jQ4-vbwbi3ZUm9vrxMjiiXk0t5yuhYFHKGEx45Ua3FpjflBcv2440OFVwKHYpROv3WXoVPlVoJ7judT-QM9Ta-EnjN07JyrY3WkE8pku7dZkhtNlPkJUrOUhnUWjd_RBMf1fWmZ3BEKtDnWHoYnYCn8IQqsspC_IO9dVUN3k2cLZhR3-_BFfVpjkB2nJ-PGqGvXUE71iTb-3Ko8GNOHx1XUVSChsOhDAgwQ3CR0iyAyTbRKQGKjTKq3L-r5O4CJBSvyI-ZTExf7RhTNXaHVj_56yNtTY59tR7FmJcfMPmfxqmyMxe-F8PuPllLNwdwXujom5bjgIrS642jIw4B-w%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b1bb662864914ab1b3171d17bededa43&_e=jlXv16DOO86_thD-4ZhPhvMh2uTrNHeOZB6DnupnLNNJUUC2qyCOBQN3xMXQTT3iX-jQ4-vbwbi3ZUm9vrxMjiiXk0t5yuhYFHKGEx45Ua3FpjflBcv2440OFVwKHYpROv3WXoVPlVoJ7judT-QM9Ta-EnjN07JyrY3WkE8pku7dZkhtNlPkJUrOUhnUWjd_RBMf1fWmZ3BEKtDnWHoYnYCn8IQqsspC_IO9dVUN3k2cLZhR3-_BFfVpjkB2nJ-PRjdlj2Xz4kb791QMZtHGkD_KGJPdX-kZXUXl0i2mMltP7kBc7lNLiyv0RNo8i3ftP_HPOGlDUQtTR-e0u1qwNWE9lfL3DMcehb2_sKSy4t7pcL2aCrlx1e1tsUbDihmb71PNKVQrTQ4StwnpPnnJKQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b1bb662864914ab1b3171d17bededa43&_t=vN6rOS6nHZJhVnufR0S1AHymOMSbfi18RMKcVqBthMcbvR_UTu2HcNSdG1uUMNEN5AWTSwt-1Jo0AnJjDwbXctK-Wz1M32xZ7n0pQYui3ZpLl6txNBTBJA9iIrRzbxr8JpXJOtUl3PBzJhXq6kiYuWna2Hbk9uLmZnW5rk1koVQ%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b1bb662864914ab1b3171d17bededa43&_t=vN6rOS6nHZJhVnufR0S1AHymOMSbfi18RMKcVqBthMcbvR_UTu2HcNSdG1uUMNEN5AWTSwt-1Jo0AnJjDwbXcu14M9OiNeqGObfF4duvZms%3D).

If you feel like we're living in a time warp and Election Day 2020 just came to an end, believe me, you're not alone.

clean_body: Democrats are in trouble - every single poll that I’ve seen/conducted recently shows support for Biden and his allies in Congress is CRATERING. | | Fellow Conservative, It's Kellyanne Conway reaching out to have a frank discussion with you ahead of the pivotal 2024 general election. Believe it or not, we are less than eight months until voters head to the polls to help save our nation and get this country back on track. If you feel like we're living in a time warp and Election Day 2020 just came to an end, believe me, you're not alone. While so much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the cost of living and crime have increased, so much has stayed the same. 1. Americans still want lower taxes. 2. Americans are still fighting for safer communities in which to raise their families. 3. And Americans simply want enough cash in their bank accounts to pay their bills and have a little fun. Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. But under the so-called "leadership" of President Biden and Montana U.S. Sen. Jon Tester, Americans are frustrated and fed up with the lackluster economy and weakness on the world stage. The contrast between these two individuals is clear: one is a bonafide American hero, while the other has made a living doing the bidding of Democrat party elders. I know that Tim has been reaching out to you for months. I also know that some of my friends in the U.S. Senate have been reaching out to you, too. But I want to make sure you hear it from me: You could say that I know a thing or two about polling - and polling shows that with adequate resources, Tim can defeat Jon Tester and flip a Senate seat Republicans have been chasing after since 2006. Right now, it's time to channel our frustrations into defeating the DEMS at the ballot box next November. And I'm not just talking about Joe Biden and Kamala Harris - I'm talking about all Democrats, namely fake "moderate" Jon Tester. Chuck Grassley emailed you. Marco Rubio emailed you. Marsha Blackburn emailed you. Steve Daines emailed you. we need to defeat the Leftist agenda, Biden and his allies. The time is NOW. Let's get it done. God bless you. Kellyanne Conway | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. clean_body: At Team Cartwright, we're passionate about championing the belief that healthcare is a fundamental human right – no exceptions, no exclusions. | Today marks World Health Day, Peter. At Team Cartwright, we're passionate about championing the belief that healthcare is a fundamental human right – no exceptions, no exclusions. Regardless of zip code or tax bracket, everyone deserves access to quality healthcare. That's why Matt is dedicated to ensuring universal healthcare coverage, not just in Pennsylvania, but across the entire nation. Throughout his tenure in Congress, Matt has been a steadfast advocate for our right to healthcare. From fighting to expand access to affordable healthcare to advocating for senior citizens' access to vital services, Matt has consistently stood up for the health and well-being of every American. On this World Health Day, let's reaffirm our commitment to affordable, quality healthcare for everyone. | Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. #
Derek, VoteVets is gearing up for the fight of our lives.
The MAGA-right will stop at nothing to take back the Senate, hold the House, and kick President Biden out of office.
If they win, Trump and his supporters have promised to “root out” their political opponents like “vermin” and weaponize the Military and the Department of Justice against anyone who stands against them.
We’ve got our work cut out for us.
But you are not alone, and you are by no means powerless in this fight.
We established the VoteVets Patriot Fund early last year to fund our efforts this year — supporting candidates with Military and National Security experience who have what it takes to lead, and can defeat MAGA-right candidates around the country.
Today, we’re asking you to contribute to that fund.

# Total Solar Eclipse Tomorrow!
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDA0MDcuOTI5OTQ2NTEifQ.Z59fJ4BvO8vOjs5fRm6Mi2IYboft1BOUVVqUYLDKvy4/s/2950175210/br/240303991436-l)
---
I am so excited that our district will be coming together on Monday to experience the total solar eclipse! Make sure you're prepared for a safe and enjoyable Eclipse Day by picking up your FREE ISO-certified eclipse glasses from any of the ten District 46 businesses who have kindly partnered with me for this special event. They'll be available while supplies last.
Our eclipse experience will begin at 1:50PM and last until 4:23PM. Remember: except for a few brief moments during totality (beginning at 3:06PM) it is very dangerous to look at the eclipse with your naked eye. That's why it's important to get your ISO-certified glasses ASAP!
I welcome the thousands of visitors we expect in the Hoosier state and applaud the public employees who have been hard at work making sure we can all have a great experience. Enjoy Eclipse Day!
* * *
---
# Upcoming Town Hall!
I'll join my colleagues in the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus for a town hall meeting in the Lawrence Government Center on Saturday, April 13 at 12PM. All are invited to talk through updates from our recent legislative session and share your questions and feedback! See you then.
* * *
---
| |
* * *
---
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[Indiana appeals court rules abortion ban likely violates religious freedom protections](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvaW5kaWFuYS1hcHBlYWxzLWNvdXJ0LXJ1bGVzLWFib3J0aW9uLWJhbi1saWtlbHktdmlvbGF0ZXMtcmVsaWdpb3VzLWZyZWVkb20tcHJvdGVjdGlvbnMiLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwNDA3LjkyOTk0NjUxIn0.kPdb9GNpImGPpH5b10mYqL64u6YPCJc3BHKfEW21hLU/s/2950175210/br/240303991436-l)
On Thursday the Indiana Court of Appeals ruled in favor of a brave coalition of Hoosiers who argued that our near-total abortion ban violates their religious freedom. I'm hopeful that our state Supreme Court will uphold this decision and agree: the government should not make blanket decisions about complex moral and religious issues on behalf of every single person in our state.
[Indiana lawmakers ban cellphones in class. Now it's up to schools to figure out how](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXB1YmxpY21lZGlhLm9yZy9uZXdzL2luZGlhbmEtbGF3bWFrZXJzLWJhbi1jZWxscGhvbmVzLWluLWNsYXNzLW5vdy1pdHMtdXAtdG8tc2Nob29scy10by1maWd1cmUtb3V0LWhvdy5waHAiLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwNDA3LjkyOTk0NjUxIn0.i1WazKM272j2akc8TaouVRB8p-6lXEGvuD3ogno54wM/s/2950175210/br/240303991436-l)
As a former teacher and principal I know that cellphone use in school is sometimes necessary, but more often it is a conduit for bullying and the worst effects of social media. There is no one-size-fits-all solution, but our kids are in school to learn and deserve freedom from the distractions that phones create. I look forward to seeing the creative solutions educators put forward to keep students focused and classrooms phone-free.
[Solar spectacle: 12 questions and answers about Monday’s solar eclipse](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDksInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDQvMDUvc29sYXItc3BlY3RhY2xlLTE1LXF1ZXN0aW9ucy1hbmQtYW5zd2Vycy1hYm91dC1tb25kYXlzLXNvbGFyLWVjbGlwc2UvIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDQwNy45Mjk5NDY1MSJ9.1BGMdYuQRbtRGcvbzKQgWNFpUufAd2R5seU7lehZp1U/s/2950175210/br/240303991436-l)
More info about Monday's eclipse is available here from the Indiana Capital Chronicle!

clean_body: | | | | | "Twitter" "Twitter" "Facebook"mailto:s46@iga.in.gov "Email" "Visit Me Online" | Total Solar Eclipse Tomorrow! I am so excited that our district will be coming together on Monday to experience the total solar eclipse! Make sure you're prepared for a safe and enjoyable Eclipse Day by picking up your FREE ISO-certified eclipse glasses from any of the ten District 46 businesses who have kindly partnered with me for this special event. They'll be available while supplies last. Our eclipse experience will begin at 1:50PM and last until 4:23PM. Remember: except for a few brief moments during totality (beginning at 3:06PM) it is very dangerous to look at the eclipse with your naked eye. That's why it's important to get your ISO-certified glasses ASAP! I welcome the thousands of visitors we expect in the Hoosier state and applaud the public employees who have been hard at work making sure we can all have a great experience. Enjoy Eclipse Day! Upcoming Town Hall! I'll join my colleagues in the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus for a town hall meeting in the Lawrence Government Center on Saturday, April 13 at 12PM. All are invited to talk through updates from our recent legislative session and share your questions and feedback! See you then. | | STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE On Thursday the Indiana Court of Appeals ruled in favor of a brave coalition of Hoosiers who argued that our near-total abortion ban violates their religious freedom. I'm hopeful that our state Supreme Court will uphold this decision and agree: the government should not make blanket decisions about complex moral and religious issues on behalf of every single person in our state. As a former teacher and principal I know that cellphone use in school is sometimes necessary, but more often it is a conduit for bullying and the worst effects of social media. There is no one-size-fits-all solution, but our kids are in school to learn and deserve freedom from the distractions that phones create. I look forward to seeing the creative solutions educators put forward to keep students focused and classrooms phone-free. More info about Monday's eclipse is available here from the Indiana Capital Chronicle! | COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my state government resource guide, "Hunley Community Resource Guide". | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications Office Shenetha.Shepherd@iga.in.gov Kyle.Casteel@iga.in.gov Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- SUBSCRIBER SERVICES: | | | *

subject: An amendment to protect abortion rights is on the Florida ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T720f10bd-1661-4955-8720-c9e4f8148705/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, we wanted to make sure you heard the news: The Florida Supreme Court recently ruled that the amendment to enshrine abortion rights in the Florida Constitution WILL be on the ballot this November. Make no mistake: abortion is a winning issue. Since the fall of Roe, every time abortion access has been put on the ballot, voters have voted YES. And the numbers in Florida are on our side: 94% of Democrats, 81% of Independents, and 62% of Republicans agree that abortion should be a private decision, free from government interference. But the SECOND the ruling came down, anti-choice zealots nationwide sprang into action to dump money into Florida in an attempt to lie to voters about what the amendment actually does. The anti-choicers aren’t wasting a single second, Peter. So we can’t either. [**That’s why we’re asking: Will you split a donation of $25 or any amount with Florida Women’s Freedom Coalition and Blue Amp Action to help protect abortion rights in Florida? **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c5eebcd-c4e9-4b3c-8f1e-7e74e915739d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73693bc3-bf13-4639-b529-056781bca781/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Voters will have a chance to make their voice heard this November, and we’re confident that we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a surge of nationwide grassroots support to fund the work necessary to make it happen. **Florida is the epicenter of the fight for abortion rights this November, and we need all hands on deck.****[Please chip in any amount you can to help us turn out the vote to guarantee abortion access in Florida. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60c43645-ec2e-4953-9115-3526ab967102/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for stepping up, Florida Women’s Freedom Coalition
---
|

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38bb0f2b-a436-4703-bb48-a9527089f090/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Your Leaky Bladder
subject: This Army Water Stops Urges
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hey Friend… it's me-your
bladder!

I'm trying to help you out here.

I've noticed less water coming
through lately… and you might think that will make leaks
and urges better…

But the truth is, too much water
is NOT the cause of your bathroom struggles…

In fact, it's the opposite.

Once you hit 50, a few things got
out of whack.

Kidneys stopped filtering fluid
as well as they once did - causing concentrated urine that
irritates your bladder and causes spontaneous urges.

Thirst signals slow down, causing
you to drink less- making bladder muscles lazy and leaks more
frequent.

Luckily, US Army researchers
decoded a shockingly easy water trick that can improve muscle
strength by 36%, reduce UTIs by 58%, and give you control
back…

All by targeting the true cause
of bladder problems in as little as 2 hours.

PLEASE…

> Try this simple Army water
trick to strengthen me and reduce my constant nagging.

We're going to be feeling GREAT
soon,

Your Bladder

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

Friend, this is bad: Far-right extremists like Rick Scott have been scheming for years to cut Social Security.
Thankfully, our Democratic Senate blocked their radical cuts earlier this year. But this fight is far from over: **Now, Trump's far-right supermajority on the Supreme Court is preparing to rule on a case that could END Social Security _for good,_ ROBBING hardworking people of the benefits they've earned.**
Unlike Rick Scott, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for Senate because she's committed to protecting and**_expanding_** Social Security. But we need Americans everywhere to stand with Democrats like Debbie — not right-wing extremists who want to destroy the vital programs that over 66 million hardworking Americans depend on.
**As of noon today, our petition to protect Social Security is still missing 3,563 signatures — including yours! ****[Will you add your name now before our midnight deadline tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82565602/465668559/294798754?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1047-su-nd&refcode=jtk1047-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWFlYTJmYzUtZmNmNC1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tr_NR-dliIfNktkbkn2Ct4lt64EAKTmFD_GYZGbP0wQ=&emci=35ce25bc-f2f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=1aea2fc5-fcf4-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)**

clean_body: add your name: | | | | | BREAKING NEWS: New Supreme Court case could END Social Security! | | Friend, this is bad: Far-right extremists like Rick Scott have been scheming for years to cut Social Security. Thankfully, our Democratic Senate blocked their radical cuts earlier this year. But this fight is far from over: Now, Trump's far-right supermajority on the Supreme Court is preparing to rule on a case that could END Social Security for good, ROBBING hardworking people of the benefits they've earned. Unlike Rick Scott, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for Senate because she's committed to protecting andexpanding Social Security. But we need Americans everywhere to stand with Democrats like Debbie — not right-wing extremists who want to destroy the vital programs that over 66 million hardworking Americans depend on. As of noon today, our petition to protect Social Security is still missing 3,563 signatures — including yours! | | Thank you, Team DMP | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I’d like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love.

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ab7e3c8b59304b648329c6223111a1fb&_e=nU6DrIxsYABl7-c0mbLNTaI58Y8x6Y_qNQYvVecrJFfm5SDzevU0Az1r1dVp9GPoRIeufEeKgmUdBnXtSGhz4FPbWhkTihlgxIPH1dBMYYspuy1G0QEd5O7UxXVopz70SqVkdAVgT9QaMbHCQF-grhmhUd5M-lxd41lpMO686aF_rqujWOu1gdYLk5BCYxhQ_IREtwZyeAdK3SiQ2ZOVwEQUCsphevi0EQ4TCdjd1lNmLDjwYhywIZLv7-Iyk4pjw0I4UzwhZHl3QvjuoJl1ucIbjCbfef38KI4mzVaeYl3VMKYBX0599nS3ABp_O65LT4Ga1LBivA1X3k_deGIldqfcpJa5EGCN8UDeOqH3VHaBqXP875aCFhjbQPllI4cRsC__WGCvUAJFoGRxUpce9w%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ab7e3c8b59304b648329c6223111a1fb&_e=nU6DrIxsYABl7-c0mbLNTaI58Y8x6Y_qNQYvVecrJFfm5SDzevU0Az1r1dVp9GPoRIeufEeKgmUdBnXtSGhz4FPbWhkTihlgxIPH1dBMYYspuy1G0QEd5O7UxXVopz70SqVkdAVgT9QaMbHCQF-grhmhUd5M-lxd41lpMO686aF_rqujWOu1gdYLk5BCYxhQ_IREtwZyeAdK3SiQ2ZOVwEQUCsphevi0EQ4TCdjd1lPs74L7azfnuAfXEveTPgrlBjSxNwABDPI17os2UbN6C8AmlWr0O5QWAVYcgyWhHCnIvAskVTutYGo-cKhs7VmPdUhnSLIDwO3okDuN6XmsmUcKbbhRnuvtk_ra3rH3WuwD1LDkhGWq9jfrILCC_qNl1HrU1-L4R8zBfgfcVO1zUQ%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---

name: Team Jayapal
subject: The time to protect our communities is now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we do not start preparing now, we’re sure to see devastation and destruction in the future.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240407-3723-footer&t=1&akid=3723%2E420207%2E8PR16m)
Peter, the time to invest in our climate resilience efforts is not tomorrow, not next year — it’s right now.
We must prepare our climate infrastructure to withstand the damages wrought by the climate crisis. **That starts with creating millions of green jobs to invest in workforce development programs and climate resilience action plans.**
Pramila has been hard at work in Congress fighting for climate action at every level — starting with the support of the Climate Resistance Workforce Act to invest in and prepare our workforce to take on the climate crisis. And she knows that in order to save lives and save our communities, swift action must be taken now — not in the aftermath.
Climate change is here — NOW, Peter, and if we do not start preparing now, we’re sure to see devastation and destruction in the future. We can’t wait until after the next climate disaster.
[**Add your name today and urge Congress to prioritize investments in our climate change resilience initiatives to prepare our communities for the further impacts of climate change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230407_take_climate_action_NOW/?source=em20240407-3723&akid=3723%2E420207%2E8PR16m)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230407_take_climate_action_NOW/?source=em20240407-3723&akid=3723%2E420207%2E8PR16m)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240407-3723-footer&t=2&refcode2=3723_420207_8PR16m&akid=3723%2E420207%2E8PR16m)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

We’ve come a long way in this race, fueled by the incredible support of people like you who believe in Keir’s vision for a more just Pennsylvania. As a first-time candidate, people had doubts — but Keir continues to defy expectations left and right. She’s putting in the work, so right now we need you to step up one more time to support Keir before tonight’s deadline. Please, pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us close the gap before midnight. We can’t do this without you. = Thanks for all your help, Peter. Aubrey Montgomery FInance Team * | = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG PO BOX 22321 | Philadelphia, PA 19110 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

Our voters know that President Trump is the ONLY person who can save our country from failed woke policies.

But this year, Democrats know they must FLIP Florida if Joe Biden has any shot of winning. To do it, they are pledging MILLIONS of dollars in campaign spending.

George Soros, Joe Biden, and Chuck Schumer are prepping to BUY the Sunshine State to help keep their power, but we are hoping to stop them.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Trump just tore into me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
Friend,
Donald Trump just visited Michigan to rally his supporters – and he called me out. He knows that our campaign is the only thing stopping Republicans from flipping the Senate, and this is unfortunately just the start of his attacks.
I would deeply appreciate your help to fight back and keep Michigan blue in November. Please, use this link to donate now to our campaign and Michael Bennet: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-slotkin?refcode=X_040724_BennetSlotkin_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-slotkin?refcode=X_040724_BennetSlotkin_act]
At his event last week, Trump stood with Mike Rogers directly behind him and emphasized how important this Senate race will be to him taking back the White House in November. In between a fountain of misleading and downright falsehoods, Trump also said that, with his support, Mike Rogers will have “tremendous success” against me in this race.
I’m counting on you to help prove him wrong.
Last week’s event is an indication that Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they can at Michigan, and that Michigan Democrats can’t take anything for granted.
No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state – full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.
We can't let that happen. Want to help? Chip in what you can to our campaign and Michael Bennet and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-slotkin?refcode=X_040724_BennetSlotkin_act]
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

Denver, CO 80201

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82568691/465677697/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWI1NGU4Zi0wNGY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N066h9_38moy6rzTnXYg7lMPj-3Ip5xTUGF2fMrVBTY=&emci=89b54e8f-04f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=8ab54e8f-04f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=13185894) Derek,

January 6th was a terrible act of political violence and a failed coup to overthrow the Constitution and the 2020 election.

But Donald Trump is celebrating and honoring the January 6th insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol in his name, trying to overturn the election. He’s out on the campaign trail calling the people who bludgeoned and beat the hell out of cops “patriots.”

**I’m sick and tired of far-right politicians wrapping themselves in the flag while fanning the flames of insurrection and violence. And the ones who say nothing, refusing to condemn attacks on democracy? We have a word for them: cowards.**

Our freedoms and democracy are at stake in 2024. The radical right is committed to attacking faith in our elections and our democracy, including right here in Pennsylvania, because they care more about taking power. [**I've worked hard to secure voting rights and our elections as a lawyer, I’ve worn the uniform to defend our democracy before, and I'll continue that fight every day in Congress. One thing I hear across PA-17 is fear about the future of our democracy. The radical right will stop at nothing to take power, even if that means toppling our Constitution and democracy.

I was 17 when I first swore the oath to defend our Constitution – and I never imagined our democracy would be in such peril.

But Derek, I'll be damned if I'm going to give up on this country of ours. It won't be easy, but democracy only fails if we let it – and I can assure you: quitting isn't in our vocabulary here in western Pennsylvania.

[**I’m committed to fighting for this democracy and our freedom. If you are too, join this fight by making a donation to my campaign today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82568699/465677705/270139708?refcode=email_040724_jan6&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWI1NGU4Zi0wNGY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N066h9_38moy6rzTnXYg7lMPj-3Ip5xTUGF2fMrVBTY=)

name: COURIER
subject: Trump Bibles and Q-Anon
body:
Trump has always courted and fueled support from Q-Anon followers. Lately, he’s taking it to a whole new level.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82569101/465679196/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU1YTAzNjctMDZmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OKsQ6rmtp2EAZicj_HkpqthETSANVKjhj-JBlpPXCfQ=&emci=db5a0367-06f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=de5a0367-06f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Following the news that Trump would have to pony up $450 million for his civil fraud trial, the former president went on a merch-hawking spree: sneakers, cologne, and now, a special-edition Bible.
While some of Trump’s most rabid supporters have criticized Trump as sacrilegious for profiting from the Bible, many more have praised Trump for the move.
[**We’ll tell you why so many in Trump’s support base are snatching up his bibles in a minute, but if you’re ready to support COURIER’s essential coverage now, can you chip in $10?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82569102/465679197/-593472309?refcode=20240407-EM-TrumpBibles&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU1YTAzNjctMDZmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OKsQ6rmtp2EAZicj_HkpqthETSANVKjhj-JBlpPXCfQ=)
Many of Trump’s biggest supporters believe in the Q-Anon conspiracy that God anointed Trump to bring about an end to the “satanic” Deep State run by President Biden and fellow Democrats. And while Trump has always courted and fueled support from Q-Anon followers, lately, he’s taking it to a whole new level.
**For example, prayer sessions at recent rallies often include references to Trump being God’s chosen leader to take down the Deep State. When Trump leaves the stage, he exits to a song that is all but identical to the Q-Anon theme music. And now he’s trying to further burnish his religious cred by selling bibles to his supporters.**
Most distressingly, Trump’s message mirrors the apocalyptic rhetoric found in both Q-Anon and far-right Christian fundamentalism.
Peter, we don’t have to speculate about the impact Trump’s hateful, paranoid rhetoric will have on our democracy – we already saw it play out on January 6th when Q-Anon supporters and conspiracy theorists attacked our capitol after they were told Democrats had stolen the 2020 election.
COURIER exists to stop these conspiracies before they spread. We provide unbiased coverage of the most critical local issues, and we have no problem calling Trump what he is: a totalitarian autocrat hell-bent on getting and keeping power, no matter the costs for American democracy.
We do that by meeting people in the spaces where they get their news – in the email inboxes and social media feeds where dangerous misinformation thrives.
[**If you support our mission to hold Trump and his right-wing supporters accountable, can you chip in $10 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82569103/465679198/-593472309?refcode=20240407-EM-TrumpBibles&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU1YTAzNjctMDZmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OKsQ6rmtp2EAZicj_HkpqthETSANVKjhj-JBlpPXCfQ=)

| | **Do you support the Biden administration's pro-abortion policies?**

[YES!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ebb150b3374f4c9c965a0f6ea8a70e02&_e=aYylcNdTMRr03NCoxwk4617KomZtTXKgj32yykLkLPC9w9o_B2mk5-QyxYDZv0M6aW4V05_M-W5EvFLtKMh6G_rltqqzGsqDOgk0fwRei49bmewSzPgom-2nMADuA7oSfvzJ7I0gtewCTWT8FQGenhJSonIr4TbIZemUVqUis0O_74VOq0Kt-yiHqV7ezKBmR5XB-aN9quf30ecMrpwSR0QKm3WTe_AtRdgRXr3T6zsoOW1W6ttcfey6dMDip4qAW7PiCVEsp4VmvIJHWlu7lrJkRqJJDXkd4pKRO_ly58jpiar43xUYBmb6BU1vW17jVA6Wum-XSMW-_zpXWSYcQgp-nvXjtGCr9NQWNBQqlNE%3D) [NO!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ebb150b3374f4c9c965a0f6ea8a70e02&_e=aYylcNdTMRr03NCoxwk46wwOAmzaac5vw1Jg3wtfw_S6D16L4pPEB1KcQDQJwbRbmGlAnpytgUlZn-9SZf-lf5n8DTtWMkyEA9AM9O1zDM78nEXA1nWKX7K8JSSRmmJN-vFKwJ8Z-mzrZ435rCVNvRFQ4oaE3_XuEaTsSZQJMH-_6SpouEyU9AXAgeE8oFl_VMtsoeD6K_GFKkb2banefrjEGHt19op7nHkvD_oUesavoobgepnVPL-1qY-06BsGgoUK0H0eiVO4tyU2LfAglCqoYNYf-7hAAUVIcwazhqd5Omtsv8T22wCPzGFa9nGLiZdF9xHr3-RUA-Ew9xMHlqYbwZ37XkkVlZZVOaNFdcEdhsvMwst895muoRXrkBjf)
Dear Pro-Life American,

A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

America, a nation built on freedom and the right to life, is threatened by disturbing policies that endanger thousands of unborn babies. The Biden Administration's policies are catalyzing the most pro-abortion administration we've ever seen.

Biden supports heart-wrenching late-term abortions, encourages cover-up of infanticide, endorses unrestricted access to abortion drugs, and is determined to establish abortion-on-demand in our Constitution.

In essence, his administration serves death rather than life, leaving thousands of unborn babies and vulnerable women at risk.

We at SBA Pro-Life America envision a world where every life is cherished. Where pain, despair, and death are replaced by compassion, support, and life. But this vision requires your unwavering support right now.

It's not just about standing against policies; it's about standing for lives - your life, my life, our children's lives, and those precious babies who are yet to be born.

We believe in the power of collective action. Join us as we champion the cause for life, rise above partisan politics, and fight against the deadly agenda of Big Abortion. You, as an individual, hold a powerful weapon - your voice. Use it in defense of those who cannot defend themselves before it's too late.

Time is ticking and we need you to take action TODAY!

Tell Joe Biden NO! No to unrestricted access to abortion drugs. No to painful late-term abortions. No to abortion-on-demand.

Help us serve women, save babies, and protect America by turning down the most pro-abortion administration in history! Together, we can leave a legacy of life and love for future generations.

**[Click here to join SBA Pro-Life America in signing this crucial petition.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ebb150b3374f4c9c965a0f6ea8a70e02&_e=aYylcNdTMRr03NCoxwk46wwOAmzaac5vw1Jg3wtfw_S6D16L4pPEB1KcQDQJwbRbmGlAnpytgUlZn-9SZf-lf5n8DTtWMkyEA9AM9O1zDM78nEXA1nWKX7K8JSSRmmJN-vFKwJ8Z-mzrZ435rCVNvRFQ4oaE3_XuEaTsSZQJMH-_6SpouEyU9AXAgeE8oFl_VMtsoeD6K_GFKkb2banefrjEGHt19op7nHkvD_oUesbtfoTzHzKxHjqDK5HRHEEUq98iWW-EcAHjW-_VI215wP8yU6zzmooLiMV2r0qdMtc9AifOD6bpjVjf0nWBGcxdVTj9ROl71rJIZiDVRjxtZ5G34mN4CVAvVytG96kc4MF6GwipT0JFy6_mxAno8E9h)**

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

name: Team Schrier
subject: Will you support Dr. Kim Schrier and her fight to end rising healthcare costs?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82569642/465681780/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGEyYzhhMS0wOGY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YsnTunpvQqUKNdx1g_s1Tj-tO1QZZ35LjblQbQp8bYk=&emci=3a3b10ee-61f3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=58a2c8a1-08f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Today is World Health Day — a day dedicated every year to bringing awareness to health topics of concern for people across the world. This year’s theme is “my health, my right,” a message Kim couldn't agree with more.

Peter – every person deserves access to high quality, affordable healthcare. As a doctor, Kim has seen firsthand _just_ how many Americans are putting off going to the doctor due to cost or lack of access. For so many, skipping essential medical care can be **dire** – illnesses go undiagnosed, preventive care is missed, and treatment could come at too late a stage. This should never happen – that’s why Kim has and will always fight tirelessly to ensure every person has access to the care they need.

Kim has made strides in Congress—from fighting to introduce the Capping Costs for Consumers Act to cap the cost of insulin at $35 per month to helping give Medicare better access to negotiate lower drug prices and more—but there’s still so much we can do to make affordable healthcare a reality. This World Health Day is not just a day to acknowledge our work but to take action to do more.

**[If you agree healthcare is a right, then chip in $5 or whatever you can afford and elect pro-healthcare candidate Dr. Kim Schrier. Together, we can ensure the leaders who are pushing for a brighter future have the resources they need to keep fighting for us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82569643/465681781/-1888718625?refcode=em24_240405_endofr_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240405_endofr_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=58a2c8a1-08f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGEyYzhhMS0wOGY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YsnTunpvQqUKNdx1g_s1Tj-tO1QZZ35LjblQbQp8bYk=)** clean_body: Peter, Today is World Health Day — a day dedicated every year to bringing awareness to health topics of concern for people across the world. This year’s theme is “my health, my right,” a message Kim couldn't agree with more. Peter – every person deserves access to high quality, affordable healthcare. As a doctor, Kim has seen firsthand just how many Americans are putting off going to the doctor due to cost or lack of access. For so many, skipping essential medical care can be dire – illnesses go undiagnosed, preventive care is missed, and treatment could come at too late a stage. This should never happen – that’s why Kim has and will always fight tirelessly to ensure every person has access to the care they need. Kim has made strides in Congress—from fighting to introduce the Capping Costs for Consumers Act to cap the cost of insulin at $35 per month to helping give Medicare better access to negotiate lower drug prices and more—but there’s still so much we can do to make affordable healthcare a reality. This World Health Day is not just a day to acknowledge our work but to take action to do more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

| Peter,

I wanted to share a little update from the campaign trail with you!

**Last month, we traveled to Roanoke, Blacksburg, Danville, Wytheville, Radford, Smith Mountain Lake, and Tazewell to meet with Virginia voters, spread our campaign message, and answer questions about my campaign to serve as Virginia’s next Governor.**
