This is the behind-the-scenes work we’re doing on the ground to prepare for our election next year.

My love for Virginia and my belief that we can make progress motivates me. Together, I know we can expand economic opportunity, strengthen our schools, and protect the fundamental rights of all Virginians.

Hearing from people like you is what fuels my campaign and my mission to keep delivering for Virginia. I know I’ll meet many more of you as our campaign grows, and I’ll need your support to keep up this campaign as we work towards 2025!

clean_body: Hearing from people like you is what fuels my campaign and my mission to keep delivering for Virginia. | = | Peter, I wanted to share a little update from the campaign trail with you! Last month, we traveled to Roanoke, Blacksburg, Danville, Wytheville, Radford, Smith Mountain Lake, and Tazewell to meet with Virginia voters, spread our campaign message, and answer questions about my campaign to serve as Virginia’s next Governor. = = This is the behind-the-scenes work we’re doing on the ground to prepare for our election next year. My love for Virginia and my belief that we can make progress motivates me. Together, I know we can expand economic opportunity, strengthen our schools, and protect the fundamental rights of all Virginians. Hearing from people like you is what fuels my campaign and my mission to keep delivering for Virginia. I know I’ll meet many more of you as our campaign grows, and I’ll need your support to keep up this campaign as we work towards 2025! = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

subject: 🦅 Act Now! Secure American Freedoms This Week!
body:
🦅 Act Now! Secure American Freedoms This Week! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6c6b793923&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!
---
| | | **
ANNOUNCING!
THE GRASSROOTS FREEDOM PAC!
SUPPORT GRASSROOTS SCHOOL BOARDS!**

---
|
We have started a federal PAC - Political Action Committee - to have a vehicle through which to raise funds from grassroots Ohioans to battle the monied special interests, party insiders, and career politicians from both sides of the aisle. It's called **"The Grassroots Freedom PAC"**.

We are putting a governance & decision-making team in place to assure you that your donations will be used wisely to support activities & candidates whose platforms, experience, and character are what's needed to unite us, make us healthier (in all regards), and generate an environment that breeds prosperity.

In the meantime, those of us doing this work are 100% certain that we need more School Board members in Ohio who believe in parents' rights, getting back to the basics of education, and depoliticizing public education in Ohio.

The maiden effort of the Grassroots Freedom PAC is raising funds to support like-minded school board candidates for NEXT YEAR'S school board elections, which are in November 2025.

This gives us well over a year to donate what we can to raise funds for these important elected offices.

Please consider giving what you can on a monthly basis. $5? $10? $100?

If 10,000 Ohioans gave $20/mo. for one year, we would have $2,400,000 to help support candidates across Ohio at this time next year. To donate, click on the image below or click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c784344d62&e=5c740fa3e2).

If you have any questions, please contact **Mark Pukita** at **614-499-0599 (c)** by text or call.

---
| [](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a651a6c4f5&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**EVENT NOTICE! • CONSIDER ATTENDING****!
NORTHEAST OHIO • MEDINA
APRIL 10TH! • FREE!
PLEASE FORWARD & SHARE!**

---
|
**This Wednesday, April 10th! **An election integrity event in northeast Ohio you will not want to miss!

It's at 7:00 PM at 7291 Stone Road in Medina, hosted by Ohio Freedom Fighters. TONS OF FREE PARKING! For more information contact **Linda Kelly** at **330-607-4165.**

Thank you!
---
|
---
|
---
| |
**GRASSROOTS OHIO PROVISIONS!
SUPPORT GRASSROOTS CAUSES!**

---
|
**What's this all about?**
Have you noticed how money wins most Ohio elections? Have you noticed how Ohio's grassroots, small-government, freedom-loving candidates almost always have a money disadvantage against insider, establishment, career politicians?

**Grassroots Ohio Provisions is part of the answer!**
100% of the proceeds from your purchase of these products goes to the [**Grassroots Freedom PAC**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=56e2116531&e=5c740fa3e2) to be used to fund Ohio's grassroots, small-government, freedom-loving candidates & activities in Ohio to get them elected to fix our broken locales, state, and country! Click on the image below or click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=74675d95a9&e=5c740fa3e2) to go to the Grassroots Ohio Provisions online store.

**Who's behind this effort?**
This effort is the brainchild of many concerned Ohio grassroots, small-government, freedom-loving activists from many organizations around Ohio. To see a comprehensive list & how you can join us, please click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2705741ec6&e=5c740fa3e2). Thank you!

_**"In God We Trust"**_
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1b8cc4668b&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|

[January 14, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0fc6d51e6c&e=5c740fa3e2)[Ohio Liberator List!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=741274a403&e=5c740fa3e2 "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!")

[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e9c02929e1&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2373f61012&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c64cd367d6&e=5c740fa3e2)

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: Thank You Pastor Ken Graves!
body:
Thank You Rob Cross!
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001khWBH0XOoklDObZUBwjYPwYf3KyB6A_83t1Uu0vBPZ1UkF4yuOJgCanO6I-FyxP4xSAoZ1bXvmRuosOzxcQx1zfC2BU2QCR6qN443A3hm1wyt9izogmAeP5NUB0a3arwxQn_OZsTThi8adBHioBk2g==&c=x_lTBceCCQgnlr5b_trkGIt46DnZvZDkkOmbw7GcNKRYR6EEYNL6Uw==&ch=UJBpC6I96VmYTYbpJ4MQwt-RalrDAqcsS8OKcrg0FYwJlnjH-ikIIw==)
---
---
|
# ONE OF US - FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
|
---
| My Friends,
I wanted to share my Sunday with you. I had an absolutely amazing morning with Pastor Ken Graves at Calvary Chapel in Orrington. The music and the services were wonderful. What really stood out were the people. So many conversations with the great people there went straight to my heart. I wanted to thank them for taking the time to share their Sunday with me. Faith, freedom and community are alive and well in the great state of Maine. We are truly blessed to live here.
Special huge thank you Rob Cross for being a great friend and helping to set things up. I am truly humbled by my experiences today.
Have a wonderful Sunday evening!
\- Mike
---

name: Dan's iPhone
subject: I hate doing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
I’ll be honest: I hate sending these emails, Peter, and I know you have better things to do than read them.
It’s Dan, David’s Campaign Manager.
I’ll be honest: I hate sending these emails, Peter, and I know you have better things to do than read them.
In fact, Sunday is just about the worst day to send a fundraising email. Most people have logged off and are spending time with friends and family (as they should!).
So I hate to bother you over the weekend, but I’m afraid this can’t wait. If I could just have 60 seconds of your time, I’ll explain why your support of $5 or more matters now more than ever.
As I type this, the first ballots in this race are being cast and we’re running out of time to share David’s message with voters across the state.
We cannot take anything for granted right now. The polling shows a handful of votes could decide this race, which is why we’re going everywhere and talking to everyone.
**Okay, my time is up – I hope I’ve inspired you to give any amount to ensure Maryland and the Senate stay blue. I’m attaching a secure, personal link so I can show David how great our team is:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DT-AprilFR?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82571147/465686937/1122037525?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.04.07_B1_SunScaries_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGI1Y2IyNS0wY2Y1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=003n6uQThADVZ_hm__emp88_3vlO5ukHb2Eo_LXK5jU=)**
Thanks for being with us,
Dan
_Sent from my iPhone_
Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: Susan Wild
subject: A little more about my background
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
While many of you know my story, I know quite a few folks don’t know my background and how I became a member of Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82571148/465686940/428766020?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-04-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI0OWQwMS0wY2Y1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12IYwVGfh2kN-dgu1JHSte-AgQhMCMvCdEb2-FgHK-8=)
---
| Peter, While many of you know my story, I know quite a few folks don’t know my background and how I became a member of Congress.

Growing up as the daughter of an Air Force officer, I moved frequently throughout my childhood—both around the United States and across the world. I moved to the Lehigh Valley more than thirty years ago to raise my family, and in this vibrant community, I discovered a sense of belonging. This district is the only place I’ve ever truly called home.

The Lehigh Valley holds a special significance in my life—it’s where my two children, Clay and Adrienne, were born, attended public schools, and grew up. It's also where I established a reputable legal practice and became the first female Solicitor of the City of Allentown.
---

clean_body: While many of you know my story, I know quite a few folks don’t know my background and how I became a member of Congress. | = | Peter, While many of you know my story, I know quite a few folks don’t know my background and how I became a member of Congress. Growing up as the daughter of an Air Force officer, I moved frequently throughout my childhood—both around the United States and across the world. I moved to the Lehigh Valley more than thirty years ago to raise my family, and in this vibrant community, I discovered a sense of belonging. This district is the only place I’ve ever truly called home. The Lehigh Valley holds a special significance in my life—it’s where my two children, Clay and Adrienne, were born, attended public schools, and grew up. It's also where I established a reputable legal practice and became the first female Solicitor of the City of Allentown. = In 2018, I made history by becoming the first woman to represent the Lehigh Valley in Congress. In Congress, I’ve worked every day to fight for the people of PA-07, including lowering prescription drug prices, addressing our country’s mental health crisis, supporting our veterans, and more. I know we still have so much more to do, which is why I need your support to return to Congress for another two years. We’re facing a tough election in a toss-up district, so I can’t do it alone. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Team Harry Dunn
subject: Let me tell you who Harry is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey there, we're really fed up right now and we're going to tell you why:
Harry is a hero. He would never say it himself, but it's the truth.
He was awarded the Presidential Citizens Medal by President Biden. He defended the Capitol, and our democracy, with his bare hands. He put his life on the line while insurrectionists threatened him, yelled slurs at him, and attacked him.
He's an American hero.
But right now, a MAGA-funded super PAC is funneling cash into this race to back his opponent. They're so threatened by a Black hero who isn’t afraid to speak truth to power when it comes to protecting our democracy.
So we're urgently asking you to rush $20 to support Harry's campaign and Seth Moulton. If we are outraised we could lose, and our democracy is far too fragile to let that happen: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
It's quite the coincidence that the same billionaires who gave money to Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz, Ron DeSantis, and Donald Trump are giving to this PAC who just cut Harry’s opponent a check.
This Super PAC has endorsed 109 Republicans who voted to overturn the 2020 election – and one of Harry's "Democratic" opponents has their full support.
And the worst part is that this changes the whole race, friend.
With the help of this shady MAGA-backed PAC, we're being outspent. That means less ads of Harry, and more of his opponent.
We're less than 6 weeks out from this election, so when we say we're at a full-on sprint, we really mean it. Can you please chip in $20 right now to Harry's campaign and Seth Moulton to help elect a hero to Congress? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
-Team Harry
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

subject: Our family’s worst nightmare
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kLtS6zAQhp9m3cUjrS7rFCrOIREFMwwllLIkJwILO5KDJ2_PJATavXz_N7_L85iGiwH6D4jHFCoggvgHiKe3NZfze3563OxVOG1O-jmr6xYfAHG5zPHv9E5pY3ZpvE5p1wQjhsBkEw0njorLTunmaIKmLjrXD56iZMpFGsKgQuSktRxo2ySDDCWTjHgnJGOt6Ppe09bpKJTzTIFkt5zW5ViSd7wuqytlmnLrp9yM5rgsc72JWUC7lqn9PPsxnuvPm58yoL0rA9ovQLv3O7X9sDJnEPbWgtgdXpDXV5r7ppgwr2kcU9UEkh1-Md8BAAD__-w2YIs)

---
| | Dear Friend, I’m sorry to say, I don’t think we’re going to make it.
My dear husband, Officer Jeffery Teng, is right in the thick of a legal mess that’s threatening to blow apart everything we’ve dreamt of for our little family.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1O6zAUhJ_G2Tlyjv_ShRf3UsICiT0rZPucUKO4Th1XpW-PUiG2M59mPp_XJc13x-x_BnBKuDEAJv8xgMv7LdfrV3594c8aL_xi3rLeW3hiAO2-0h_6u9JT9mnZU3vs0MkZherIDXYAPahRm-7kjDwoE8GDNxJtUH62I4bg50BWReO75ECAEkrYYZRKiF6OIRh78Iak9lFopsTjp_eZaop-2NrN11pK7mPJ3eJOra3bQ2xiMG0Ur5V6fyYsbScYTOe4IoMJA2-AnDLXitN3Y3LayrVG-ogFickjBr6jnLJWgQshu-pwvaVlSZuxTInPh0gs-ScAAP__6IBjww)
---
I’m writing this with a heavy heart, lost and scared.
Just picture it, watching the love of your life, the rock of your
home, getting pulled closer every day to a possible life
sentence. All because he stood up when it mattered –
because he did what was right in the chaos.

The clock’s ticking, each day pushing Jeffery a step closer to
a nightmare we prayed we’d never have to face.
Why? Because he stood up for his community, did his job
with nothing but care and did everything he could to keep
things from getting worse.

That night? It was intense. Jeffery was out there, face to face with real danger, and still, he kept his cool and went for nonlethal ways to handle it.
But now, DA Jose Garcia, backed by Soros’s money, is twisting that bravery into something it’s not, making Jeffery out to be the bad guy.
Friend, your support could be the game changer.
**[Please, if you feel moved to give a gift of any amount towards Jeffery’s defense, we desperately need your support.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1O6zAUhJ_G2Tlyjv_ShRf3UsICiT0rZPucUKO4Th1XpW-PUiG2M59mPp_XJc13x-x_BnBKuDEAJv8xgMv7LdfrV3594c8aL_xi3rLeW3hiAO2-0h_6u9JT9mnZU3vs0MkZherIDXYAPahRm-7kjDwoE8GDNxJtUH62I4bg50BWReO75ECAEkrYYZRKiF6OIRh78Iak9lFopsTjp_eZaop-2NrN11pK7mPJ3eJOra3bQ2xiMG0Ur5V6fyYsbScYTOe4IoMJA2-AnDLXitN3Y3LayrVG-ogFickjBr6jnLJWgQshu-pwvaVlSZuxTInPh0gs-ScAAP__6IBjww)**
Right now, all I’ve got is hope, and the ask for you to stay strong with us. Sincerely,

Samantha Teng
P.S.******[I have some more details you can read here. And please, if you find it in your heart to give a gift today towards Jeffery’s defense, that would mean the world to us.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1O6zAUhJ_G2Tlyjv_ShRf3UsICiT0rZPucUKO4Th1XpW-PUiG2M59mPp_XJc13x-x_BnBKuDEAJv8xgMv7LdfrV3594c8aL_xi3rLeW3hiAO2-0h_6u9JT9mnZU3vs0MkZherIDXYAPahRm-7kjDwoE8GDNxJtUH62I4bg50BWReO75ECAEkrYYZRKiF6OIRh78Iak9lFopsTjp_eZaop-2NrN11pK7mPJ3eJOra3bQ2xiMG0Ur5V6fyYsbScYTOe4IoMJA2-AnDLXitN3Y3LayrVG-ogFickjBr6jnLJWgQshu-pwvaVlSZuxTInPh0gs-ScAAP__6IBjww)**
---
[**GIVE NOW**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1O6zAUhJ_G2Tlyjv_ShRf3UsICiT0rZPucUKO4Th1XpW-PUiG2M59mPp_XJc13x-x_BnBKuDEAJv8xgMv7LdfrV3594c8aL_xi3rLeW3hiAO2-0h_6u9JT9mnZU3vs0MkZherIDXYAPahRm-7kjDwoE8GDNxJtUH62I4bg50BWReO75ECAEkrYYZRKiF6OIRh78Iak9lFopsTjp_eZaop-2NrN11pK7mPJ3eJOra3bQ2xiMG0Ur5V6fyYsbScYTOe4IoMJA2-AnDLXitN3Y3LayrVG-ogFickjBr6jnLJWgQshu-pwvaVlSZuxTInPh0gs-ScAAP__6IBjww)

Joining our membership team would make a huge difference. In 2022 and 2023, we made history. Democrats flipped the Virginia House, gained trifectas in Michigan and Minnesota, and won over 30 special elections, just to name a few accomplishments. **But don’t worry, we’re still looking for a few more Democrats in your community to step up and become official members. We have a BIG year ahead, and if we want to keep our momentum, we’re going to need your support.** We aren’t exaggerating when we say _every_ single member is a crucial part of our mission. Without a strong coalition of grassroots members on our side, we risk losing all the progress we’ve worked so hard for. If you’ve been following our last few emails, then you know that there is no better time than _right now_ to step up and become a member. [So we’re asking: Can we count on you to activate your 2024 membership with a $10 gift?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_7D-bxLomiuuveiBujApwDbLk3ejHh3hDYcb9IGifPPJ9OPpMsZxV7Tm_gyaJ1ekQMa2SVZYD6wIRYZxhuh9GJWMLn8W_UGO08zYzOlcyfwY26BajY8DPwuGJz_XNp17OAwzVjQ45ieTZEmX8e-qLg2hsCIyWtFFxO_3pClFQKDtyC0q1bAsv2zl_6RJV-jhs7M429vURwx_1BbFF3C9oQ0gotYFEvog6xV8JaYCLanW3j16UbOpnrEPU9DFDCcXG8cVl4oLwX5A_TUEqlNtljSBxEC4hEnueIHqpBxZSlH4zTb68TJSKiAvyZZgLAREXdwiXDDrXYopH5TauO8ZPkRb29dYvGYSRbCcX4EIft-Y/45b/DXe0HtHuRoiArTbOOVPdfw/h7/h001.VbjG89qIIYgtPXQOXgQeGVYihnZa8V2u8QQCOqbdLLI) We can’t do this without you, Team DLCC **[DONATE »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_7D-bxLomiuuveiBujApwDbLk3ejHh3hDYcb9IGifPPJ9OPpMsZxV7Tm_gyaJ1ekQMa2SVZYD6wIRYZxhuh9GJWMLn8W_UGO08zYzOlcyfwY26BajY8DPwuGJz_XNp17OAwzVjQ45ieTZEmX8e-qLg4yJ1MI-_Fl2EIThXEbCc1ZJMqNumpymRR9jJYtjrY768UMsuPWxHmSEkwVbYIEWNYeIlBBsWxpyzCkV1boHDRiU-9YZduf-GYFDJU0QhK7ddr_IVwNu_h3GQ1nFbbglEgDhkZmmjcNGd2t0dwLiu3iR9eqL_uMqv-_RMNZmrfD0wRGLprhjhPbkG22os7mKlZyZIUChwb7ezaTZ-E8WYkY/45b/DXe0HtHuRoiArTbOOVPdfw/h8/h001.fsFQkkMNaW3AeiG1CW3El4KV8WsYJHlEMdoa8GJYn0g)** **[MAKE IT MONTHLY »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_sOxbz4UcQfKTd_UFOOBo8SiYu24dlKCkRp5KgpIJ8NbzYuGo9J7gkP1TVl2nz3tzIhPzzAJO6t6jT4TBflo9lgmxA0nPblEGJjEmEuF6hmQKeTY5ch5MGM_RQsrV_PPCr1VIyXuP946-UZx2rqn9eKrk12VI6nvzIeSJ1_IpeGDRSDdtveiEDV80a_391xwy5JU0ko_ptny5mwRFSSSPmRjV-CiWW9AzYGqJhL9AbBLP5HB0NXbk5IEtP5uqvU1bC2nKGe5jZXcSLf6kP1zB7Pza9V17DntzxM26Es33gvDE2TjXV34UNLldSArl2zW4IE-1A49V1-RIej1ushLzboQs9CVaK0hDdTl9HntB3xsUW5gLI0V8f3BJ8-d-sTNL4RavLJlXgOW1uFHJUjWJVg/45b/DXe0HtHuRoiArTbOOVPdfw/h9/h001.zzWifgjZ-mErRjPG1-3hy1QSPIa2Hm0xnb9jy9_G29Y)**

body:
Here are some of his "Handmaid's Tale" positions

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82572376/465691204/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230607-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTYyMWEzMDgtMTFmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MiqHg-Nu0bqSgzmaSonP9kX5Pcnj29y1DlvkxjQCM_c=)
---
| Hi friend,

My opponent, MAGA GOP extremist David Schweikert, has time and again voted for bills that are downright dangerous to women. **Here are just some of his positions that are an affront not only to women but to anyone who believes in basic human rights:** 1) He voted for the Life at Conception Act, a bill that would have granted constitutional protection of embryos "at the moment of fertilization." 2) He's voted for anti-abortion legislation that would have made it illegal for women to get mifepristone through the mail. 3) He's voted against an assault weapons ban and the Violence Against Women Act of 202. 4) He's earned a "0" rating from the Human Rights Campaign for his positions that fail to protect basic and fundamental rights.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82572377/465691205/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230607-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTYyMWEzMDgtMTFmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MiqHg-Nu0bqSgzmaSonP9kX5Pcnj29y1DlvkxjQCM_c=)

clean_body: Here are some of his "Handmaid's Tale" positions | = | Hi friend, My opponent, MAGA GOP extremist David Schweikert, has time and again voted for bills that are downright dangerous to women. Here are just some of his positions that are an affront not only to women but to anyone who believes in basic human rights: 1) He voted for the Life at Conception Act, a bill that would have granted constitutional protection of embryos "at the moment of fertilization." 2) He's voted for anti-abortion legislation that would have made it illegal for women to get mifepristone through the mail. 3) He's voted against an assault weapons ban and the Violence Against Women Act of 202. 4) He's earned a "0" rating from the Human Rights Campaign for his positions that fail to protect basic and fundamental rights. = This congressional race was the 6th closest in the country in 2022, and we HAVE to win this seat if we want to take back the House and protect our basic freedoms. To some, this election may still seem far away, but it isn't. I'm working as hard as I can, fighting every hour of every day, to make sure I can win this race and stop the harmful positions and policies supported by my dangerous opponent. I'm relying on your support to fuel this critical work. Our country depends on it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Kurt * | | = Paid for by Kroemer for Congress Kroemer for Congress PO Box 9413 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States | | ---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Republican David Schweikert, please

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: The Great Beer State 🍺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Which Michigan brewery is your favorite? |
#
---
Team, it’s National Beer Day! There are so many things that make me proud to be the Governor of Michigan — our work to protect and expand reproductive freedom, defend working people, lower prices, invest in our children’s future, and so much more. Of course, the fact that we’re known as the “Great Beer State” is near the top of that list. A couple of weeks ago, I had the chance to visit Bell’s Brewery and craft my own beer. They even named it after me! “Governor’s Whitbier” is now my favorite brew not only because of how it tastes _(it’s really good)_ but also because of what it represents. Michigan’s craft brew industry is, in my humble opinion, the best in the entire country — creating good-paying jobs and supporting small businesses across the country while providing Michiganders all across the state with a sense of community. **With close to 400 breweries in Michigan, I’d love to learn more about your favorite,[so if you have a moment, will you let me know which Michigan brewery you love visiting the most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82572737/465692182/-1744380140?contactdata=oUmkGOVA1EHepEipZgtostlQTNlB6agP8i0p1CtLIBqvZngF2HvoYG9ups4TQdql5YkLnlaFLE9HPPSCmBlG/Gd9gGHxUwBEXutZfDRk2qzD2ZWY7zWYby6QZNBm3+UHucc4qwtLgFlrKteKM5/flQ==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQxNjkxNDctMTFmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TTBmwwcH8MYdEcTqmfGoXIj6hIV7BLh0Uu79KQ7YDV0=&emci=d9565940-11f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=64169147-11f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=1028753)** | [SHARE YOUR FAVORITE BREWERY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82572738/465692183/-1744380140?contactdata=oUmkGOVA1EHepEipZgtostlQTNlB6agP8i0p1CtLIBqvZngF2HvoYG9ups4TQdql5YkLnlaFLE9HPPSCmBlG/Gd9gGHxUwBEXutZfDRk2qzD2ZWY7zWYby6QZNBm3+UHucc4qwtLgFlrKteKM5/flQ==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQxNjkxNDctMTFmNS1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TTBmwwcH8MYdEcTqmfGoXIj6hIV7BLh0Uu79KQ7YDV0=&emci=d9565940-11f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=64169147-11f5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=1028753)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: How we respond when MAGA Republicans throw a punch my way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6178%2E5257348%2E2L3g8K ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek — I
know you’ve been getting a lot of emails from us, so I want to try
something different. I’m asking you to make a small monthly donation.
After this explanation, I hope you will understand why.

Because I don’t accept corporate PAC money, and in response to MAGA
Republicans’ constant attacks on me as political retribution for holding
their leader Donald Trump accountable, it is no exaggeration to say that
my ability to respond to their attacks depends in large part on whether
you donate to emails like this one.

The political pundits in the media, as well as Donald Trump and Mitch
McConnell’s dark money allies, view our fundraising abilities as a direct
reflection of whether we can respond when MAGA Republicans throw a punch,
and whether grassroots Democrats like you are willing to punch back.

We can’t stand still when they go on the political attack. Fail to
respond. Or tolerate their acts of vengeance. They are wrong. And they are
dangerous.

And if one thing has become clear, they aren’t stopping. They are only
going to get worse.

That’s why I’m writing to you about these next 7 months, and what will
happen on Tuesday, November 5, 2024 — and beyond.

Because while McConnell, Trump, and their GOP cronies in Congress throw
every attack at me to see what sticks, we’ll need the resources not only
to respond but to build the biggest grassroots campaign that California
has ever seen. So we can take this righteous fight for our democracy to
the United States Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=apr2024_abs_em_recurring.9PRocf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6178%2E5257348%2E2L3g8K ]That’s why I’m asking you to begin making a monthly recurring
contribution to my campaign today. I need you with me for the long haul.
Are you in? If you are, start making your monthly recurring contribution
today.

Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through
ActBlue.

I watched Congressman Sarbanes, the very man I hope to succeed, and other great leaders, attempt to reel in the dark money that unfairly influences races. So I knew that taking just anyone's money wasn't an option for me. Especially from a group who is aligned with anti-abortion, insurrectionist-apologists. That's not democracy. And I've told you since day 1 – I'm running to protect democracy. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Keep fighting, Harry = = | = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

clean_body: We’ve spent this year building the strongest analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that will lead Democrats to victory – as a member, you can help fuel this vital work. | | | | | ---|--- Here are three reasons why you should become an Official 2024 DLCC Member → 1\. Grassroots support has carried Democrats to victory, helping us win over 30 special elections last year, defend our majorities in Pennsylvania and Virginia, and close in on Republicans’ majority in the New Hampshire House. If we want to expand on these wins in 2024 and beyond, we need you on our team. 2\. Over 98% of our donations come from grassroots donors like you. Donations of $10 and $25 add up to make a huge impact in electing state Democrats. 3\. By becoming a member, you’re powering the DLCC’s groundbreaking strategy. We’ve spent this year building the strongest analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that will lead Democrats to victory – as a member, you can help fuel this vital work and help protect President Biden’s electoral path to victory this year. It’s critical that we have a strong membership team as we head into key special elections and gear up for competitive races this November. We’re counting on you to join the 17,500+ Democrats nationwide TODAY who have already renewed their membership for 2024. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t wait to mail you your card! name: Liz Walters
subject: 6 months until the voter registration deadline in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
can we count on you to help us fuel our voter registration efforts?
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82575526/465701229/-981710801?refcode=odp_em_240407_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY3ZGUwMS0xZmY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bwIQF5Mqy13te6kk3oOl1i0W_N04U4IXnG-JrRVZwo=) Team, **6 months from today is the voter registration deadline in Ohio for the General Election.** There are a few reasons we’re making the push to register voters in Ohio **now** :
1. GOP politicians in Ohio passed one of the most restrictive voter registration laws in the entire country, which keeps any voter from registering in the 30 days before an election – so while other states are making their final registration push late in October, we don’t have that luxury.
2. Our Republican Secretary of State has spent his time in office purging millions of voters – young voters, students, rural voters, and voters of color. We have to make sure these voters are registered and ready to vote for Democrats this November.
3. And of course, we have critical races on the ballot this year from the U.S. Senate and U.S. House to flipping control of the Ohio Supreme Court.

****[With so much at stake this year, we can’t wait to make sure that every Ohioan has a chance to make their voice heard. Can you donate $5 to help us reach voters in every corner of Ohio and get them registered in these next 6 months?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82575527/465701230/-981710801?refcode=odp_em_240407_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY3ZGUwMS0xZmY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bwIQF5Mqy13te6kk3oOl1i0W_N04U4IXnG-JrRVZwo=)**** Thank you, Liz Walters P.S. You can check your voter registration **[HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82575528/465701231/-1719859211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY3ZGUwMS0xZmY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bwIQF5Mqy13te6kk3oOl1i0W_N04U4IXnG-JrRVZwo=&emci=68eca094-74f3-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=7967de01-1ff5-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=25291327)**. | ******Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? → ****** | ************[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82575529/465701232/-981710801?refcode=odp_em_240407_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY3ZGUwMS0xZmY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bwIQF5Mqy13te6kk3oOl1i0W_N04U4IXnG-JrRVZwo=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82575530/465701233/-981710801?refcode=odp_em_240407_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY3ZGUwMS0xZmY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bwIQF5Mqy13te6kk3oOl1i0W_N04U4IXnG-JrRVZwo=) ****************

Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? → ** | ********= ************** | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

| [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=55a5888cc62b48aeaced809563534b7e&_e=Rbp3U6OarkzQHYV6d8xfQW_AN1ifZDj4rUsj-2KBa5Y7gUQSIH-eEbpXbXbQ8xkUc9q8CRV3QARBk4yxAXIFnQSvLqPokvx5kMaLF9h4MEtYMvPizBGvsQWwIf-Mds4OrlZ74bVXg-iGZoBp8UF_3yQ_3cNUACWUszpSx3PPDz2KVtG0FCKPtw25WubIJx3wLr4FQa7vjDNUBddi1kfEsk1xCiIQJvDwEW_33pCFDN7qVtQWlG-LP-hR_W2qDLwsq_O4gPJsU7bNYJ6IAkfC7N9Rztlair0QYyY8Hp-zsRcFLKXOaJZlbQlCJ_3SpGv_Ztz1Rfbmyqt84-jfvWq17BmSERscNH6htANNBdEkVHTf84KJ4VVaD-i2ONp3RVQXeC4y1rBXPZ38_YM0oFwucg%3D%3D)

Friend,

I hope this message finds you well.

First things first, I gotta tip my hat to you for the incredible support you showed in 2023 and to start off this year.

**_[Your generosity made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest, and I can’t thank you enough.](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=55a5888cc62b48aeaced809563534b7e&_e=Rbp3U6OarkzQHYV6d8xfQW_AN1ifZDj4rUsj-2KBa5Y7gUQSIH-eEbpXbXbQ8xkUc9q8CRV3QARBk4yxAXIFnQSvLqPokvx5kMaLF9h4MEtYMvPizBGvsQWwIf-Mds4OrlZ74bVXg-iGZoBp8UF_3yQ_3cNUACWUszpSx3PPDz2KVtG0FCKPtw25WubIJx3wLr4FQa7vjDNUBddi1kfEsk1xCiIQJvDwEW_33pCFDN7qVtQWlG-LP-hR_W2qDLwsVtIZsYTP3Jc8jOHnJ0HCbZca13t8rAqMt2LL-ip1FXopOu1JrNPMjOBQlYx_JZofTsZSCQ7-YwaJfkYtL5LSyFBU2r3vD4GotZDpFzrbZCXjTgg6Yleo3ncz-22eIu7sdFIZHV9Ci5VaSV3b71blFg%3D%3D)_**

Now, my mamma has always taught me to be grateful, and I hate to be asking for favors. It just doesn’t sit right with me, but there’s too much at stake.

This latest deadline slipped through my fingers, and the Radical Left caught wind. **They’re unleashing a storm, calling in the big guns and dumping truckloads of cash into their campaigns, all in an attempt to take me down and, push their Socialist Agenda & keep us from ever regaining a Senate Majority.**

So, I’m swallowing my pride and humbly asking for your support to keep fighting the good fight to save America and take back the Senate from the grasp of the Left’s Liberal Agenda.

**If you can, I’m asking you to rush whatever you can below:**

clean_body: I gotta tip my hat to you for the incredible support you showed so far this year | Friend, I hope this message finds you well. First things first, I gotta tip my hat to you for the incredible support you showed in 2023 and to start off this year. Now, my mamma has always taught me to be grateful, and I hate to be asking for favors. It just doesn’t sit right with me, but there’s too much at stake. This latest deadline slipped through my fingers, and the Radical Left caught wind. They’re unleashing a storm, calling in the big guns and dumping truckloads of cash into their campaigns, all in an attempt to take me down and, push their Socialist Agenda & keep us from ever regaining a Senate Majority. So, I’m swallowing my pride and humbly asking for your support to keep fighting the good fight to save America and take back the Senate from the grasp of the Left’s Liberal Agenda. If you can, I’m asking you to rush whatever you can below: | Anything will help! Your support means the world to me! God bless, Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?**

A major real estate company released a survey on Friday which found that renters and homeowners are significantly reducing their quality of life to afford housing under President Joe Biden. Nearly one in five homeowners and renters reported skipping meals to afford housing in Biden’s economy, according to a new survey conducted by Redfin.

subject: My husband is facing a nightmare we prayed we’d never have to deal with
body:
| [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kD1vwjAQhn_NZSOyzzbGg4dSMFNVdQChbo59IVYdSJNQmn9fkdKu9_G8j17fdjnVkwW9BsQmxQEQQTwB4nUUB7_fv_TT4va-W-zUAU_3JT4D4jh19H_5gJTU-pTvU70popXoeR0KslxzVCi05EVjpa8CKW1IGSGWVayUXqmV4OR98HXAIllkKJlkGjlDLsqKgiRjmDDBcB0ZSDYHlXVPNDbp_EF99ClPZbi0RbbNOHbDLOYA3SVW5fkaMl2H369waQHdQxnQfQG6o_7etZ-02i5BuLkEsdmujw5f-VvR29jdUs5pWGqQ7PRH-QkAAP__jRhe8A)

| | Dear Friend, I’m sorry to say, I don’t think we’re going to make it.
My dear husband, Officer Jeffery Teng, is right in the thick of a legal mess that’s threatening to blow apart everything we’ve dreamt of for our little family.
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjGPozAQhX_N0BnZYxuHwsXdRaS6MimuOdmeIVgLAYGjLP9-RbTa9r1P731hWsbc7x7cb0AcMm2ACPoXID6LvoXr9e-6i9e_i7jYG96PEv8AYtkX_iG_R2qeQh6P1J0r8gaD6lPFXjmFFrUzqhp8K6MNGk_oZGga2_QmWk0q8SnZE0WqskeJRhrpUElUuo6cDLet1G1qlSMJRr6P6n5lLkN-fPBKIY97neapGv1QyrK9xTrAbuP0XLkOD6a5HARg90gLAXYURUESPAlrBH8W0N02P9fE_9NMDPpMURyo4MmaKKQ01eppeeVxzFvjwMj72yPN01cAAAD__5hNYmw)
---
I’m writing this with a heavy heart, lost and scared.
Just picture it, watching the love of your life, the rock of your
home, getting pulled closer every day to a possible life
sentence. All because he stood up when it mattered –
because he did what was right in the chaos.

The clock’s ticking, each day pushing Jeffery a step closer to
a nightmare we prayed we’d never have to face.
Why? Because he stood up for his community, did his job
with nothing but care and did everything he could to keep
things from getting worse.

That night? It was intense. Jeffery was out there, face to face with real danger, and still, he kept his cool and went for nonlethal ways to handle it.
But now, DA Jose Garcia, backed by Soros’s money, is twisting that bravery into something it’s not, making Jeffery out to be the bad guy.
Friend, your support could be the game changer.
**[Please, if you feel moved to give a gift of any amount towards Jeffery’s defense, we desperately need your support.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjGPozAQhX_N0BnZYxuHwsXdRaS6MimuOdmeIVgLAYGjLP9-RbTa9r1P731hWsbc7x7cb0AcMm2ACPoXID6LvoXr9e-6i9e_i7jYG96PEv8AYtkX_iG_R2qeQh6P1J0r8gaD6lPFXjmFFrUzqhp8K6MNGk_oZGga2_QmWk0q8SnZE0WqskeJRhrpUElUuo6cDLet1G1qlSMJRr6P6n5lLkN-fPBKIY97neapGv1QyrK9xTrAbuP0XLkOD6a5HARg90gLAXYURUESPAlrBH8W0N02P9fE_9NMDPpMURyo4MmaKKQ01eppeeVxzFvjwMj72yPN01cAAAD__5hNYmw)**
Right now, all I’ve got is hope, and the ask for you to stay strong with us. Sincerely,

Samantha Teng
P.S.******[I have some more details you can read here. And please, if you find it in your heart to give a gift today towards Jeffery’s defense, that would mean the world to us.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjGPozAQhX_N0BnZYxuHwsXdRaS6MimuOdmeIVgLAYGjLP9-RbTa9r1P731hWsbc7x7cb0AcMm2ACPoXID6LvoXr9e-6i9e_i7jYG96PEv8AYtkX_iG_R2qeQh6P1J0r8gaD6lPFXjmFFrUzqhp8K6MNGk_oZGga2_QmWk0q8SnZE0WqskeJRhrpUElUuo6cDLet1G1qlSMJRr6P6n5lLkN-fPBKIY97neapGv1QyrK9xTrAbuP0XLkOD6a5HARg90gLAXYURUESPAlrBH8W0N02P9fE_9NMDPpMURyo4MmaKKQ01eppeeVxzFvjwMj72yPN01cAAAD__5hNYmw)**
---
[**GIVE NOW**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjGPozAQhX_N0BnZYxuHwsXdRaS6MimuOdmeIVgLAYGjLP9-RbTa9r1P731hWsbc7x7cb0AcMm2ACPoXID6LvoXr9e-6i9e_i7jYG96PEv8AYtkX_iG_R2qeQh6P1J0r8gaD6lPFXjmFFrUzqhp8K6MNGk_oZGga2_QmWk0q8SnZE0WqskeJRhrpUElUuo6cDLet1G1qlSMJRr6P6n5lLkN-fPBKIY97neapGv1QyrK9xTrAbuP0XLkOD6a5HARg90gLAXYURUESPAlrBH8W0N02P9fE_9NMDPpMURyo4MmaKKQ01eppeeVxzFvjwMj72yPN01cAAAD__5hNYmw)

name: Team Casey
subject: David McCormick is cosplaying as a PA resident 📎
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
nothing says “PA local” like inviting the press to watch you eat a cheesesteak
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2612%2E552475%2EnbiiNn)
Did you see this, Peter?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240407-3?refcode=em20240407-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2612_552475_nbiiNn&akid=2612%2E552475%2EnbiiNn)
Connecticut resident David McCormick was cosplaying as a Pennsylvanian this week when he visited Geno’s in Philly.
And nothing says “PA local” like inviting the press to document the occasion...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240407-3?refcode=em20240407-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2612_552475_nbiiNn&akid=2612%2E552475%2EnbiiNn)
Sorry, Dave. Pennsylvanians aren’t so easily fooled.
The truth is David McCormick is a hedge fund CEO who got rich by shipping jobs overseas at the expense of Pennsylvania workers. He and his Wall Street backers are trying to buy this Senate seat, and we can’t let them.
[**Will you pitch in $15, about the price of a cheesesteak, to help re-elect Bob Casey, a real Pennsylvanian, and send McCormick back to Connecticut?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240407-3?refcode=em20240407-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2612_552475_nbiiNn&akid=2612%2E552475%2EnbiiNn)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: Picture it, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Polling in this race is close. Razor thin. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. | | |
---
Picture it, Peter. President Donald J. Trump getting sworn in on January 20, 2025 -- the start of another four-year term filled with chaos and division. Four long years. We're sorry to put that thought into your head, but it's important we all come to terms with the fact there is a very real chance it happens. Polling in this race is close. Razor thin. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. The MAGA right is mobilizing, and outside spending is only going to ramp up against us as we get closer to the election. The only thing standing in their way is Joe Biden... and you. **Let us be clear: If we have the resources to win this campaign, we will. If we don't, we're in trouble. The answer to that question is up to people who care enough about the outcome to donate.** _And with the general election officially underway, there's no better time than right now. President Biden needs you._ [Can you please use this link to contribute $25 to Joe Biden's reelection campaign? Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. The MAGA right is mobilizing, and outside spending is only going to ramp up against us as we get closer to the election. The only thing standing in their way is Joe Biden... and you. Let us be clear: If we have the resources to win this campaign, we will. If we don't, we're in trouble. The answer to that question is up to people who care enough about the outcome to donate. And with the general election officially underway, there's no better time than right now. name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Why is he raising money with Adam Schiff?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA<-
body:
->-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1853.1.ca373ac37620f1805994ba5a747ef376 )<-<-

Fellow Conservative,

My opponent - who claims to be one of the most moderate members of the Senate – recently sent a fundraising email asking donors to split a contribution between his campaign and Adam Schiff’s.

->\*\*STOP TESTER AND SCHIFF

CHIP IN A COUPLE BUCKS→\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1854.1.26dbf05ee20f67339f074d80393fd4b3 )<-

\*\*Several thoughts come to mind immediately:\*\*

1. How can you fundraise alongside a man who knowingly led the American public to believe that Donald Trump’s 2016 campaign colluded with Russia?

1. How can you continue to call yourself a moderate? It doesn’t make sense to me to use the name of one of America’s most untrustworthy politicians to raise money benefiting a race in a state President Trump won twice \*\*(Montana)\*\*. But then again, he is a reliable vote for Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden - siding with them 95% of the time.

\*\*Stop Schiff and Tester – chip in anything you can. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1855.1.4fd01eb8c756bf53c3428d6f68b69e68 )\*\*

1. How can anyone add their name to the same document as someone who knowingly lied to the American public for their own political gain?

\*\*Adam Schiff wants to remake the rest of America in California’s image.\*\* That’s a FACT. And it seems that by joining hands with this radical leftist, my opponent is silently selling his soul to progressive overlords in hopes of securing another six-year term.

\*\*I’m disgusted.\*\* This is not what Montanans want; this isn’t what most Americans want. \*\*Will you do me a huge favor and chip in anything you can to help me defeat Jon Tester and Adam Schiff? ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1856.1.081c9d73afd988cea5f287e97a4c3b99 )\*\*

-> \*\*STOP TESTER AND SCHIFF→\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1857.1.cc30ce05996a6819b9428166782171a5 )<-

As I’m finding out, the sad reality is that career politicians will say – and do – pretty much anything to get themselves re-elected. And while my opponent isn’t honest, he’s not stupid. _ \*\*Adam Schiff is raising BEAUCOUP bucks from the people he lied to about President Trump for years.\*\* _

More than that, \*\*Jon Tester understands that to get re-elected as a Democrat, he knows he will have to take money from wealthy California progressives, and there is no one better than Adam Schiff to make the introduction.\*\*

The introductions are paying off: \*\*In February, Tester received 20% of his online donations from California.\*\*

\*\*Help me stop these frauds in their tracks. Chip in whatever you can right now.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1858.1.e046ec75bd98d784d6f47d234288b708 )

-> \*\*STOP TESTER AND SCHIFF→\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1859.1.3c55ba073810212f52edc6d45fd174e0 )<-

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy

Former Navy SEAL

Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

->

\* \* \*

“

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY — NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1860.1.4cba1cb9e06bc4d367eca9be84bc1110 )

\* \* \*

<-

->

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1850.1.f19045358b901ddfbae4a849f6fa00e3 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1851.1.1cd1ba37c3f6920a49e2acdf420cf8ce ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=4238329.1852.1.ed960cd7a95e7ef9e71e7138bbe2e45c )

<-

name: CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret.)
subject: Knock knock knock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=934ceddcde2c4889b9d76838c291be4e&_e=_Ku87qs2RCqOJzUBzfd7K901IBDxgM5YZB877-KT-R_NVwNr_bzuzQ-pYE9gUrvkoR0LewdIaBe9hd-OU6fiQJrK3bzJqklAzEKCMOV9BGzSWrjhk5-XOq8nBo6RlKM4AZUfyU5piFB4M7fKC9UTpHNikkwiclls7-KGunCvDpQHbuluMoYb8_l55X1936BBi9ZKXEJLasySyN6vFfcdskwXJEO2wGl0oj3oQWgdJpZkyfnI6UhjG2JtNFzHjEpc9HeAvxBYQA7Vzp9C0k6VcUVt5z0zVTMeR9opwxCr8oKG6j6Qz_n9x2UE5Rq6fZbowkjZyAZiZ8V3mVazSoJ-X-f3YMdCwZKOOdE3hvgwywU%3D)
---
**Knock, knock, knock.**

_It’s the scariest sound you’ll hear when you live in a communist country._

_It’s the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away._

_It’s the sound of always living in fear, and it’s my family’s real-life story._

We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.

**America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back.**

I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world.

I love this country - but right now, it’s taken a dark turn.

Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden’s Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election.

_And he’s doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets._

We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it.

I’ve been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go.

**It’s time to save America while we still have a chance.**

**I’m Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I’m running for the United States Senate.**

**[If you’re all-in to defend the greatest country on Earth, join our team today.](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=934ceddcde2c4889b9d76838c291be4e&_e=_Ku87qs2RCqOJzUBzfd7K901IBDxgM5YZB877-KT-R_NVwNr_bzuzQ-pYE9gUrvkoR0LewdIaBe9hd-OU6fiQJrK3bzJqklAzEKCMOV9BGzSWrjhk5-XOq8nBo6RlKM4AZUfyU5piFB4M7fKC9UTpHNikkwiclls7-KGunCvDpQHbuluMoYb8_l55X1936BBi9ZKXEJLasySyN6vFfcdsmeTxAT-PVCo348fuFNT_ao08iZjUda75OULll4XoiLZginX2h2O7b6xFnDGIPCp3rlqpUuKu06i4-bQwt-nYvrLWEAgsmmJi-H4SXnqU76r89ge1n8gQj6VkXcgl_yFy49F2R1c9l3PE6M2z0jmb-c%3D)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM - STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=934ceddcde2c4889b9d76838c291be4e&_e=_Ku87qs2RCqOJzUBzfd7K901IBDxgM5YZB877-KT-R_NVwNr_bzuzQ-pYE9gUrvkoR0LewdIaBe9hd-OU6fiQJrK3bzJqklAzEKCMOV9BGzSWrjhk5-XOq8nBo6RlKM4AZUfyU5piFB4M7fKC9UTpHNikkwiclls7-KGunCvDpQHbuluMoYb8_l55X1936BBi9ZKXEJLasySyN6vFfcdsnwdx7NIWGl-b4PuG3P9DFjl1IItDnfgGSBKmGZ8_JHM9_7DJRtA0TVY2ZdBX3QzWGh9qVhSWqXNd5BE3P5qyiVoyLAot28WO2xBnMJ-lvSSdCVJnDQvdzXRUTZsv10p1I0Ufw6mmgKzXU4y_i03rbk%3D)
---
I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Friend.

And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it.

We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom-made suits.

If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless. **[It’s time to fight for the American greatness that lies within us. Join our team today - because I know you haven’t given up on America yet either.](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=934ceddcde2c4889b9d76838c291be4e&_e=_Ku87qs2RCqOJzUBzfd7K901IBDxgM5YZB877-KT-R_NVwNr_bzuzQ-pYE9gUrvkoR0LewdIaBe9hd-OU6fiQJrK3bzJqklAzEKCMOV9BGzSWrjhk5-XOq8nBo6RlKM4AZUfyU5piFB4M7fKC9UTpHNikkwiclls7-KGunCvDpQHbuluMoYb8_l55X1936BBi9ZKXEJLasySyN6vFfcdsqe6_RIUeWt9LAFDjGMNgWGP0rFm4keevY88R2MjPxmYLbgisj-7zv8cAewqpryNzLJsvEcojkQXtKkcvlHNdrGXVhSMsk3wH7OIOLF5fJuSFYUJj37Oi-dJc52YMNa8CB3eJam08654nb7Aw-3xs1k%3D)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM - STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=934ceddcde2c4889b9d76838c291be4e&_e=_Ku87qs2RCqOJzUBzfd7K901IBDxgM5YZB877-KT-R_NVwNr_bzuzQ-pYE9gUrvkoR0LewdIaBe9hd-OU6fiQJrK3bzJqklAzEKCMOV9BGzSWrjhk5-XOq8nBo6RlKM4AZUfyU5piFB4M7fKC9UTpHNikkwiclls7-KGunCvDpQHbuluMoYb8_l55X1936BBi9ZKXEJLasySyN6vFfcdstreMeRDEm5HK7syMed9cZYuXnTwdjbCzs-JMOTb_bKEq3vLFQXqbWbK6ZIB4Vu3SaCrC2zeY4MoXhktRzMW-z5ElI3PfTTj8UaKG4sgTyIp_g7f4OMt20T3rXC58jAPHNBrpY-zacQAlfc-6K3CYpk%3D)
---

clean_body: | | | Knock, knock, knock. It’s the scariest sound you’ll hear when you live in a communist country. It’s the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away. It’s the sound of always living in fear, and it’s my family’s real-life story. We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth. America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back. I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world. I love this country - but right now, it’s taken a dark turn. Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden’s Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election. And he’s doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets. We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it. I’ve been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go. It’s time to save America while we still have a chance. I’m Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I’m running for the United States Senate. I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Friend. And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it. We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom-made suits. If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless. Let’s win this. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)Former Navy Special OperationsCandidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Cao for Congress

body:
“Abolish The Police! End Climate Change!” is what they keep screaming

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=52d06bf9428e4067963548f6e55ecc2f&_e=9IDBSAkMA6uW2dUiVC6PP7K8MkB2yMVRXg5OSV7Upqp3W3zyx9u3dwMEZcaZXo3pRsc_n4qiBY9s0aHdqr4AlE7A-4TIqj_yktlx7qKLNFSXyWPBtesnYLDrf5TbN0fIqzXVqElJJ9HZBc-lkOmrmYxvFkeSBBSilyfbO2N68-nXDhtObUZL_2TKNCZNc_mAZBQ-TSpyBwY7qAsNqHFjo0kLSuxhJ22Ar8ZJ8NWqS3GQsNLKsjsupeSRxvNSrvxwwjohwRnthrJemvOe_oVscVpsK4cNpRDS0MPTpR5qwQoNHJF0GjS8o-DADonWay9cLhr8bpji5uRK38TBvv7gD0rmQsBh0TtMx90autcUAjhJi1BOLtUnCM8qpoi7RbYQjgZvL3Lgd67pR9DvMp451w%3D%3D)

Folks,

Any time we have a hearing in the Senate, I find it to be critical to do my research. I always make sure I'm up-to-date on all information pertaining to what we're discussing.

I'll lean on a pot of coffee and work late into the night if I have to to make sure all my I's are dotted and my T's are crossed.

But, sometimes, I like to do a little background research on the witnesses that my colleagues invite to testify.

This comes in handy when someone who is telling you to 'End Climate Change' has also called for 'Abolishing the Police'.

Context matters, folks.
_You see_ , the goat-milk latte crowd will follow the calling of the masses through every single warped, misleading idea any of them have.

He wants us to get rid of CO2, but he couldn't tell me much about what CO2 even is.

I'm fighting to the very end to call out far-left lunacy and keep the woke mob at bay, but without the support of folks like you, I don't stand a chance to do it.

subject: Be careful what you wish for Mr. Schiff

body:
I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | [](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8e51c4e986c74f59b36f2071809bab18&_e=RaCs3sVsVa_Kvd20GagT3skylsEghTCIV435raIoLToLaRMkT4kJpHuNWzwpNdLvs2ihpiEGf-01h86w9_InRFn5bVukco0NxEoyuSvaXkEIyw7Bj-ieEudG4DB9r5oSAZXLgmKEN0M9t0Jrjfxyg1WedL-V4AEjGvMmVK3bU1rtkLLagQnJ1MbclkOhgix2O3ufvT1paO3z-gJSDLMwAbCzoK17CEHZTLOnn_PmfOwQFgdNElB4bL1z7ZbtjlAD_iO9AXsSH1103q0DW9hRMrWn0ip8KOhUM2QaDu4mbBrOmfOBIHgvwonLuf1SN9JXtUSQ_cEP_B8cy22KNN1bGQ_P2k8IdYjRtSQArviC0nOqL3FsjOeHlYPGMwuSx7oYCNEb0TJoYN-gqGSpnUvnJA%3D%3D)

[](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8e51c4e986c74f59b36f2071809bab18&_e=RaCs3sVsVa_Kvd20GagT3skylsEghTCIV435raIoLToLaRMkT4kJpHuNWzwpNdLvs2ihpiEGf-01h86w9_InRFn5bVukco0NxEoyuSvaXkEIyw7Bj-ieEudG4DB9r5oSAZXLgmKEN0M9t0Jrjfxyg1WedL-V4AEjGvMmVK3bU1rtkLLagQnJ1MbclkOhgix2O3ufvT1paO3z-gJSDLMwAbCzoK17CEHZTLOnn_PmfOyR7GFFBFGVJ6SI-u-MDsQjFcyVV8fUJ9IljgM6pisktMTMuIh6BAxEdXoSuNnIYN-Gq_FM33p2b0rfbDxy0F-klsEKV5tRtRujGyJdnaF1pjD9qHlEqAqROO_80n6tYJlZagZ73i87ImYi-uIVY96GO2mnX7Ma2E2TBq3G7DaTkg%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8e51c4e986c74f59b36f2071809bab18&_e=RaCs3sVsVa_Kvd20GagT3skylsEghTCIV435raIoLToLaRMkT4kJpHuNWzwpNdLvs2ihpiEGf-01h86w9_InRFn5bVukco0NxEoyuSvaXkEIyw7Bj-ieEudG4DB9r5oSAZXLgmKEN0M9t0Jrjfxyg1WedL-V4AEjGvMmVK3bU1rtkLLagQnJ1MbclkOhgix2O3ufvT1paO3z-gJSDLMwAbCzoK17CEHZTLOnn_PmfOxnvnaPYD3qtlE7FyJ5ogRNKjlN4uj5imK20NDPxPlDffR4g4iamtX0WTLfmllKqFc3lh_r049Cvb7U4wARplArVi4L86XJpLAl_CNg2L2RuNW4vYR1VWFl9a1WKPF9vBTpc2WIZPkV1zJGfdC-bIyQNye65ogv_FqiDU2WALXc2g%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.freeliberty.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8e51c4e986c74f59b36f2071809bab18&_e=RaCs3sVsVa_Kvd20GagT3skylsEghTCIV435raIoLToLaRMkT4kJpHuNWzwpNdLvs2ihpiEGf-01h86w9_InRFn5bVukco0NxEoyuSvaXkEIyw7Bj-ieEudG4DB9r5oSAZXLgmKEN0M9t0Jrjfxyg1WedL-V4AEjGvMmVK3bU1rtkLLagQnJ1MbclkOhgix2O3ufvT1paO3z-gJSDLMwAbCzoK17CEHZTLOnn_PmfOzP0OAzkNFaPwYDkzlA08yzYwWoAncpi21WIGubMUbuNgoO6WnFTXyeTez1H0pePhl1vllNkGlByHt7D5IAl_twS8bjx7TZMzo-_Vbq74AqKoq787qNFWp575GkFk096gxZ71Ev4G3SRnZqgeoFVBonLT9mygtdOjJkIlGFIpzBSA%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!
---

name: SIGN THE LETTER (VPP)
subject: re: Trump SILENCING Jack Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We hoped it wouldn't come to this...
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨
Trump Calls for Jack Smith’s “Punishment”** Donald Trump has been threatening Special Counsel Jack Smith for indicting him for his crimes — calling for him to be “sanctioned or censured!”

**Trump’s attacks are only going to escalate as this case comes to a head, so we need to make sure every Democrat has Jack Smith’s back!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign our thank you card, , so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65471?t=6&akid=13691%2E878179%2EiaUtZ2) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65471?t=7&akid=13691%2E878179%2EiaUtZ2)
---
TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, we feared he would NEVER be held accountable.

Thanks to you, we’re one step closer to finally booting Trump out of politics for good. _**IT’S ABOUT TIME!**_

I know Trump and his cronies are doing everything they can to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for indicting Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65471?t=8&akid=13691%2E878179%2EiaUtZ2) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65471?t=9&akid=13691%2E878179%2EiaUtZ2)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13691%2E878179%2EiaUtZ2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13691%2E878179%2EiaUtZ2).**

body:
|

Hi there, Peter, did you see me on MSNBC?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82577011/465706193/1286624713?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240407_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkYzc2MDQxLTJkZjUtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=76tzg6mI4S4wYS37bcPxPLO4An66kJv9hCfDPuykbMk=)
The Florida Supreme Court just issued a decision to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect in less than 30 days. But they also just ruled to officially put abortion rights on the ballot this November, which means that Florida voters could _overturn_ the GOP's extreme bans. This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights.

The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. **I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box.**

There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far!_And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from._

[The election year is now well under way, and we can't be caught empty-handed, especially now that we’re officially in the second quarter. Please, will you rush $15 — split with Defeat Republicans — to help my campaign build a grassroots war chest capable of defeating Scott's massive fortune? Your support in our fight to flip Florida blue would mean so much to me, Peter.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82577016/465706196/1286624713?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240407_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkYzc2MDQxLTJkZjUtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=76tzg6mI4S4wYS37bcPxPLO4An66kJv9hCfDPuykbMk=)

Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights. The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box. There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far!And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = I'm so grateful for your support in this fight. — Debbie ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president.

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=eb4c1edf16a74137b9ce63a356376964&_t=gUtaTozs3t9N28ZjZXpwYh60mEeO8gHLOwnaK79LiM0K41Dzb1j3WV-2bw98OewOlxwVbvgOw_Rqvoj-3fj3URNayokf8x7yRnIQJBZwASg%3D)_

## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eb4c1edf16a74137b9ce63a356376964&_e=zozOaILJvyanI9KPlgw7pvxGqbg5VcLsdU3TbeRZoh7n9BSGoPb1wDcOUGxSDs1LbLU722nZ7DXPzdY26H2bFyLzAyv8lvKrftyeG98JYh2uVky_EhFAwbeGraK0eY1t_qGTttaxAkJIRn-znV0ssDL5EetzmrujR9nnv43Mz7jBHlhWfzpa-hXIzXdoCOorJyRvpnF3l8JytnJO1U6edexYQUrmNKGvpMvWf1C1U699ISatEBV5sYfh31602QBbCEDCK4QPr7ecVAOyeSJDNmTC0uMEG3SKaGmBk0jWK7ctsr3CqqXIPzv32xLNZZv_tagWED8jH10DQ6GJiT2oTpL7WB6h5KOfZtQ69inBJTJ5r4c_YFNw5in_2_Ba9luEpyTbSNRK159KnTSBzGPlzFofQbq4WPTsiKKoZ_0qjlk%3D) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eb4c1edf16a74137b9ce63a356376964&_e=zozOaILJvyanI9KPlgw7pvxGqbg5VcLsdU3TbeRZoh7n9BSGoPb1wDcOUGxSDs1LbLU722nZ7DXPzdY26H2bFyLzAyv8lvKrftyeG98JYh2uVky_EhFAwbeGraK0eY1t_qGTttaxAkJIRn-znV0ssDL5EetzmrujR9nnv43Mz7jBHlhWfzpa-hXIzXdoCOorJyRvpnF3l8JytnJO1U6edexYQUrmNKGvpMvWf1C1U699ISatEBV5sYfh31602QBbW4AOpU5DTs-nwdMG6mnxLDbX6io_9mDDGfFbpFg7ZKE_GA28xTegQQ-cZkIpsthlTq8e5W7ALfjYAf5_xgVY2QKddW5IJT7C5riVl-iQSbc4A195hBS4Mf9MqiaKwspqSu4qt1rPYqs748s0PoycBUUWH8QVzK9N_fVC5ziSbRo%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=eb4c1edf16a74137b9ce63a356376964&_e=zozOaILJvyanI9KPlgw7pvxGqbg5VcLsdU3TbeRZoh7n9BSGoPb1wDcOUGxSDs1LbLU722nZ7DXPzdY26H2bFyLzAyv8lvKrftyeG98JYh2uVky_EhFAwbeGraK0eY1t_qGTttaxAkJIRn-znV0ssDL5EetzmrujR9nnv43Mz7jBHlhWfzpa-hXIzXdoCOorJyRvpnF3l8JytnJO1U6edexYQUrmNKGvpMvWf1C1U699ISatEBV5sYfh31602QBbqwWlCwAwvCZrdKqtj6YDiqDrpj09QIlBe0b-aZFvHJJrVZP7LxBfU3jDCJnp8VBYnSCqmfnzWU1MZF4q6dPoiunRzZ9ZLCbkt3oo4_RpCN0QnU9sSIlNwCNW882ZCI45Qd6ZJUqHuKYxYf_XU_gyALiaxZIMbLTs-GW87pDs3cc%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Diane Sare
subject: Leaflet for Eclipse Observers! -- Join the Livestream Monday 6pm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=1)
---
Friend -- All the people watching the total solar eclipse on April 8th, from all over New York State, the US and parts of the world, are being instructed by the same universe. In this we are united -- each sovereign country and all cultures -- in science and exploration of the universe. Let people know about the webcast Diane Sare and her campaign's astronomer and Kepler expert, Roger Ham, will hold at 6 pm after the eclipse! Please see the leaflet attached. Print copies to distribute to fellow observers of the eclipse! | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=KJvmT2HcT3DkpvUHL2Xm9lGXRcq-j87eSlDqCUMPd7T4mPskePjSNfPKY95a4nwmZGJ0oo2NuwSdVsHOWHDL5vw8tSpRj1vVPLTzmb7yamRSd9SKgZE8DqbLi23NM9KB1JdbgbLbCTAGxwdEDTQIEhYHgCyQ232vhdATs0z-PHY&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=2 "Download the leaflet to distribute during the

eclipse!") [Download the leaflet to distribute during the eclipse!](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=KJvmT2HcT3DkpvUHL2Xm9lGXRcq-j87eSlDqCUMPd7T4mPskePjSNfPKY95a4nwmZGJ0oo2NuwSdVsHOWHDL5vw8tSpRj1vVPLTzmb7yamRSd9SKgZE8DqbLi23NM9KB1JdbgbLbCTAGxwdEDTQIEhYHgCyQ232vhdATs0z-PHY&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=2)
---
If you would like to attend the post-eclipse get-together in the Rochester/Fairport area in person, please RSVP below. We will be meeting at 5:30 pm
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/20240408_eclipse_rochester?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=3 "Attend in-person in Rochester/Fairport") [Attend in-person in Rochester/Fairport](https://www.sareforsenate.com/20240408_eclipse_rochester?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=3)
---
So many questions have been raised by eclipses past and present, and so much knowledge has been gained about the universe from our investigations of not only what is seen, but in particular, what is not seen, that we look forward to being inspired on April 8th, once again. We must end the wars and pursue science. Remember what Johannes Kepler (1571-1630) said as he uncovered the laws of planetary motion, and investigated the harmony of the spheres:
_**“The diversity of the phenomena of nature is so great, and the treasures hidden in the heavens so rich, precisely in order that the human mind shall never be lacking in fresh nourishment.”**_
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=yETC60hTW49pK1RQ0ohAUKULhLmXzLzJ8zi5D1bnCOydON6UVmu2Z_-ngKh71p4F&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=4 "Watch the 6 pm livestream on Zoom") [Watch the 6 pm livestream on Zoom](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=yETC60hTW49pK1RQ0ohAUKULhLmXzLzJ8zi5D1bnCOydON6UVmu2Z_-ngKh71p4F&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sare_hand_these_out_to_partici&n=4)
