body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7a3ddca96b&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

Last month, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) voted 3-2 to adopt a radical regulation that will stifle American innovation by endless red tape and regulation in the name of climate change. It was an honor to be the only public official in the entire country to [co-sign](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b56e4cba09&e=a7ab36849c) a letter along with dozens of conservative groups to call on Congress to strike down this controversial rule mandating companies to issue unnecessary reports to its investors on the effects of their operations on climate change. The adoption of this rule will distort our economy and harm America’s culture. The purpose of this letter sent to Congress is to “use all of the legislative powers at your disposal” to overturn this new SEC rule.

On Monday before going to the floor of the Senate, I walked over to the Secretary of State’s office to turn in supplemental signatures for my candidacy for the State Senate. The minimum requirement was 442 signatures. According to the Arizona Secretary of State’s office, we submitted a total of 995 signatures. Thank you to everyone who signed and for our amazing volunteers who hit the pavement to help push us towards our goal. Onward to this competitive primary election on July 30th! If you would like to help us win, please [sign up](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2e5a68c5e4&e=a7ab36849c) to volunteer online.

On Tuesday, we held our weekly Republican caucus to discuss dozens more House-sponsored legislation heading to the Committee of the Whole. Over in the House, my [Senate Bill 1370](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4d1e356e45&e=a7ab36849c) to allow youth entrepreneurs up to the age of 19 years old who have not yet graduated high school to sell lemonade with little government interference went through the Committee of the Whole. We are now awaiting this bill to be added to a third read calendar in the House, so it can come back to the Senate for a final vote.

On Wednesday, I hosted a parent of a young daughter caught up in family reunification camp programming in our state. Let’s hope this [Senate Bill 1372](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3bd6934d5d&e=a7ab36849c) is signed into law by the governor. There have been quite a few states across the country that have had bipartisan legislation enacted prohibiting these types of camps. I want to be on the side of history in protecting our children and will continue to advocate for the passage of this critical legislation. I hope you will join me. Please [contact](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ac12cec1b1&e=a7ab36849c) the governor's office in support of this bill.

It was great to read a positive opinion piece written by [George Will](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=63c2bdb287&e=a7ab36849c) in _The Washington Post_ highlighting Arizona’s universal school choice program. Families are taking their taxpayer dollars and exchanging it for an Empowerment Scholarship Account to best educate their student, while saving our state money. Educational freedom is alive and well in Arizona. Meanwhile, the public education lobby continues to demand more money to pay our public school teachers even though their union publicly shot down the newly crafted Republican-driven Proposition 123 proposal extension offered last fall. The details are still forthcoming, but they wanted a higher percentage even though the State Treasurer suggested doing so was not prudent. Stay tuned as the Republican majority will release its final plan very soon.

Interestingly enough, the Arizona Taxpayer Research Association’s latest [newsletter](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4a7dc81794&e=a7ab36849c) highlights how Arizona has moved up to 31st nationally for teacher pay despite stagnant student enrollment growth according to the National Education Association’s 2023 rankings and estimates report. Arizona’s average teacher salary increased by $11,552, from $48,723 in FY17 to $60,275 in FY23 all under Republican leadership.

Also on Wednesday, I attended a [joint protocol session](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4efd1655c4&e=a7ab36849c) with House and Senate hosting Consul General of Israel to the Pacific Southwest, Israel Bachar for a truthful update on its war with the Hamas in Gaza since the legacy media doesn’t give honest reporting on the attack on Israel on October 7th. The Israeli consul briefly spoke about Arizona’s interests not only our shared values and topography, but how both Arizona and Israel have resourceful and innovative people. I will continue to stand in support of Israel and be on the right side of history. One of my first votes this session was to take a stand against antisemitism in the state. Sadly, many Democrats boycotted this meeting, including my general election opponent. She is known for hiding in her office during important votes. I guess this tactic also now applies to her standing against Israel, too.

Later in the afternoon, I headed over to Arizona State University in Tempe for an event with President Michael Crow and Don Critchlow, the head of the [Center for American Institutions](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9b3766af7a&e=a7ab36849c). Then, back to Central Phoenix for an ESG [debate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e9db1def28&e=a7ab36849c) moderated by Ari Fleischer and Robert Gibbs and University of Arizona’s Center for the Philosophy of Freedom and the National Review Institute. As a legislator, I fully support these programs and as a donor, I will continue to advocate for the continuation of these programs.

Before close of business, I learned my fifth bill this session, [Senate Bill 1367](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9127a64dea&e=a7ab36849c) was signed into law pertaining to occupational licensing. The bill modifies our statutes relating to a petition for review of criminal records for an occupation license. This bill shortens the amount of time from 7 to 3 years that a state agency can use a criminal conviction to deny someone an occupational license, along with other changes to make it easier for people with criminal records to get licenses. Essentially, this will help gets people with old records back to work.

On Thursday, several of my bills were debated and/or voted out of the House, including [Senate Bill 1366](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6bb30f90ae&e=a7ab36849c), [Senate Bill 1369](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a2ce4e0430&e=a7ab36849c), [Senate Bill 1372](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=86eefc0447&e=a7ab36849c), [Senate Bill 1375](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3e7537535d&e=a7ab36849c), and [Senate Bill 1435](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9b5f89bac5&e=a7ab36849c). Senate Bill 1435 is the brainchild of a current Scottsdale Unified School Board candidate aka [Ava’s mom](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ca858afe10&e=a7ab36849c). In this video, the mother of an autistic and non-verbal student exposes the insanity of how her daughter was sexually abused in a public school classroom by a paraprofessional who worked with her daughter alone each day. During the interim, I had four individuals contact me about similar non-existent background check issues in their public schools. Sadly, public school districts are not incentivized to conduct background checks on its employees who work with children. _Let that sink in._ If the school district doesn’t know the employee’s prior employment history or background, the current law says the district is immune when a child is victimized. If you support ensuring all Arizona’s public school students deserve to be protected, please [email](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=697de300e1&e=a7ab36849c) your state senator in support of this bill as the bill was amended in the House and will need a final vote in the Senate before this bill heads to the governor's desk.

Since a few of my bills were amended in the House, they need to be sent back to the Senate for a final vote. I concurred with the amendments made to Senate Bills 1369 and 1435. Those bills will receive a final vote in the Senate before going to the governor’s desk for either her signature or a veto.

[Senate Bill 1376](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ad313422fa&e=a7ab36849c) is a bill that will help save lives. Last year, over 700 deaths in Arizona occurred due to unsecured loads. I worked on this legislation with ABATE of Arizona, Inc., Arizona’s largest non-profit motorcycle rights organization, who are dedicated to the freedom of the road for all motorcyclists. When the House passes this legislation, it will apply the same vehicle load restrictions already in effect on our highways to our streets and roadways to ensure the safety of all motorists. Once passed it will head back to the Senate after I concur with the House’s amendments for a final vote.

On Friday afternoon, I stopped by the Palo Verde Republican Women’s Education Committee to give a legislative update and catch up with some of its members on a variety of issues. As of my last tally, there are about 11 education-related bills either signed this session, or bills that have passed the House and Senate. _Stay tuned_ : next week I am going to set aside some time dissecting the state of this session’s education bills since I currently serve as a [member](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e7873021f7&e=a7ab36849c) on the Senate Committee on Education.

On Saturday morning, I attended the celebration of life for long-time Republican educate advocate, [Johanna Haver](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b1b1ca2788&e=a7ab36849c). I met Johanna in 2013 during our battle against the federal government’s top-down common core initiative while she was running to serve as a member on the Maricopa County Community College Governing Board. Johanna led a vibrant life. She also spent a lot of time educating us on supporting legislation that would truly benefit English language learners and keep our state in compliance with Proposition (Prop.) 203, the voter protected initiative passed in 2000. Prop. 203 specified that classes for English Language Learners must be taught in English: ‘all children in Arizona public schools shall be taught English by being taught in English and all children shall be placed in English language classrooms.’ Please keep her widow, Lloyd, and her daughter and other family members in your prayers.

We are nearing the end of this year’s legislative session. The 100th day of session is approaching on April 16th. The governor’s office has pretty much been MIA over the past several months when it comes to negotiating the state’s budget. Low and behold, the House and Senate finally started budget negotiations with the executive office last week. Keep an eye out for state revenue projections that will likely be released later this week.

Meanwhile, the Senate is busy wrapping up its few remaining final bills, including legislation on our water supply, the continuation of our state agencies with needed reforms and improvements as outlined by recent audits from the Arizona Auditor General, the newest iteration of this year’s “teacher pay fund” plan to deliver salary increases for K-12 public school teachers, and critical bills to safeguard Arizonans from crime associated with Biden’s border invasion.

Moving forward, the state legislature will likely be meeting on a weekly basis for the next month one day a week until we have a workable state budget to vote.

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

---
| P.S. [_I really need your help defending this State Senate seat._ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7f91689936&e=a7ab36849c) We cannot do it on our own and it is going to cost a lot of money to keep it. We are going to need boots on the ground and reserves in our brigade. From making phone calls, sending text messages, writing post cards, delivering yard signs, installing 4x4 signs, and hosting events, we are going to need all hands on the deck to keep the legislative majority.

If you would like to help, just reply to this email, and tell us how you can best help.

**Will you please help? **

[_Can you donate so we can save our state from Hobbs’ radical agenda? If you can give $25, $50, or $100 we would truly be thankful._](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0099314823&e=a7ab36849c)

If you don’t want to donate by credit card, you can donate by mail using a check, and mail it to: Vote Bolick; 610 E. Bell Road #2-142; Phoenix, AZ 85022.

---
| | **ICYMI**

If you live in Legislative District 2 near the 16th Street exit off the 101, [ADOT](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bfdd3db2cd&e=a7ab36849c) is continuing to add the street screen wall project area residents requested. Residents contacted my office back in the spring of 2020. Our office-initiated town halls with ADOT, the former governor’s office and Congressman Schweikert’s office, and the project is slated to finish later this summer.

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: CLOBBERED in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, as you read this message we are getting absolutely clobbered out in Arizona.
Did you see that Kari Lake raised $1 million in one night at a Mar-a-Lago fundraiser? Trump himself was there, and he personally tore into Ruben and helped funnel money to her campaign.
And the polls lately — several over the last few months have shown Ruben trailing behind Kari Lake. Anywhere from one to six points.
Kari Lake is attacking Ruben day in, day out. Nonstop, around the clock, with Trump’s endorsement and the official backing of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.
With control of the Senate coming down to just a handful of seats, Arizona is going to be a key pickup. The only way we’ll hold power there is by defeating Kari Lake.
But even after all of that, we’re struggling to raise enough money to hit our fundraising goals. Arizona will be one of the most expensive states in the country this year, and if we don’t hit our goals we won’t be able to defeat Kari Lake and Donald Trump.
We need to show everyone that we can win this race. And we need your help to do it.
So we are humbly asking:
[**Please, whatever you can give, chip that in. It could be $3, it could be more, it could be less. But every donation counts and they add up fast when lots and lots of people are chipping in alongside you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240407-2-90&t=1&akid=2180%2E734936%2EBQ0CID)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: We’re at a crossroads
body:
Our individual freedoms, the nation’s respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. |
---
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=50113e8a2fce4464982a43ef933a8618&_t=tXxuiI9RQPXmMysvMXo3ADmmeOshKW9VzRKtUdiDiz0vyQs_dKQOgL4M2xHV3gt1rOfcx_h7agPS0uNxSQC3kl7-3bD7MrkFYLW8wDD6zfA%3D)_
---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=50113e8a2fce4464982a43ef933a8618&_e=tm0ahDNaUMDGomG1IoIaTcyX5w5xLyD-lY4mrFfkehVadpRnB4YycomsnajXFBz1TJcB_e3e5V4MqeH5VOsJCffQIp_aqgQgDV1DR6kAqSmc4FXKRHHDa_MaARhui1ehiN1qkxvKyghTsVtESvCPc5FdynM9ja9irVE6132YpQOFBIrbVWzQTHl4MV9GveasuDqn-rgJl2dUap0SaffuYclFlbk4u5S24kVW3NE8bg69lGCqfZltwEOCkJ0qYW9_DyjlMsA2y3FBDxWsKjepf-4xF9UayizU8zsxR4Loe3U7DANQvnxe0LyHSdvME4SIOBh0AESTuWWc0r4IIGoif3o6Y_VWtyML6Ebuxp0mEReGZVXZROHoHm140DLaiaPLUVBdsn6CiYyygFhi8V3OQA%3D%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I believe that America stands at a crossroads. Our individual freedoms, the nation's respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. Shifts in our society threaten to dilute our nation's character while biased media and divisive politics amplify it greater than ever.

The people that this impacts the most are not you and I-_It is our future generation._ Our children and grandchildren are being taught that that is their skin that defines them, not the content of their character. They are being taught that our nation's history is something to be ashamed of. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=50113e8a2fce4464982a43ef933a8618&_e=tm0ahDNaUMDGomG1IoIaTcyX5w5xLyD-lY4mrFfkehVadpRnB4YycomsnajXFBz1TJcB_e3e5V4MqeH5VOsJCffQIp_aqgQgDV1DR6kAqSmc4FXKRHHDa_MaARhui1ehiN1qkxvKyghTsVtESvCPc5FdynM9ja9irVE6132YpQOFBIrbVWzQTHl4MV9GveasuDqn-rgJl2dUap0SaffuYclFlbk4u5S24kVW3NE8bg69lGCqfZltwEOCkJ0qYW9_lPnzWQzXSZJdJ9hSi0ftnPbU7X_325HUmVxb_r4YE6tUti96BOKn7vWkII_S-91H9Qbx3Dy3h_E81LILxy_8jaobCPwN9UZI--i5XA9cVjEsrwvbJodmy0zjFbtWwhx_JkAd9eeXRaGEztqWPXjKKg%3D%3D) Candidly, it just doesn't make any sense.

But, I believe we can change this. I believe we can build a future that upholds the values of faith, liberty, community, and life - a future where all Americans are free to pursue their ideas, goals, and faith.

This won't be possible without your involvement. I've created a simple pledge; a way to align us all around a set of shared beliefs. [I want to invite you to take the Common Sense Pledge.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=50113e8a2fce4464982a43ef933a8618&_e=tm0ahDNaUMDGomG1IoIaTcyX5w5xLyD-lY4mrFfkehVadpRnB4YycomsnajXFBz1TJcB_e3e5V4MqeH5VOsJCffQIp_aqgQgDV1DR6kAqSmc4FXKRHHDa_MaARhui1ehiN1qkxvKyghTsVtESvCPc5FdynM9ja9irVE6132YpQOFBIrbVWzQTHl4MV9GveasuDqn-rgJl2dUap0SaffuYclFlbk4u5S24kVW3NE8bg69lGCqfZltwEOCkJ0qYW9_IGaXw1DZtktNSwC6Z2OtIF1sW1CS9zBh6TsZU4B-pMGua2fLIKJvhCr_MdzJrKz2xIKYLmiAnzJ3lsEKeimQKFs7ERa2ZT-0FL4Fd49WDx5UPXTBh9GNXwLMrSp7cr9NhfLHevuzoUrzCx1sK2XThA%3D%3D)

We cannot bring about this necessary change without you. By signing this pledge, you are committing to uphold the principles our nation was founded on and teach them to the next generations. **Just one person can make a difference, and it can start with you.**

This is not a passive petition; it's an active pledge to uphold the common sense values that shaped our great nation.

Sign the Common Sense Pledge today using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/common-sense-pledge/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=50113e8a2fce4464982a43ef933a8618&_e=tm0ahDNaUMDGomG1IoIaTcyX5w5xLyD-lY4mrFfkehVadpRnB4YycomsnajXFBz1TJcB_e3e5V4MqeH5VOsJCffQIp_aqgQgDV1DR6kAqSmc4FXKRHHDa_MaARhui1ehiN1qkxvKyghTsVtESvCPc5FdynM9ja9irVE6132YpQOFBIrbVWzQTHl4MV9GveasuDqn-rgJl2dUap0SaffuYclFlbk4u5S24kVW3NE8bg69lGCqfZltwEOCkJ0qYW9_eFqJovUydwAfUr7jm-ffgxdxxPAgtKDG8kDjrMAF66NtvnjmUCL-7yuwXm9HvXYUtmP4tkiXjy6Nw8xlbDP02_rw4lnye6V9_OLN0zqVcEeAnRF4bOzjIU5oAezNbxN8DSOMzdssVJem1XDowZVapg%3D%3D)

Together, we can shape a future that respects our shared history, protects our hard-earned freedoms, and prioritizes common sense. Your involvement is critical - are you ready to take action?

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---

---

name: Jacky
subject: the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than where we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me neck and neck in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**

I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. **[That's why I'm humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue this critical work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82577523/465708041/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3671-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTY3ZTY4Zi0zMmY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Jl_lvXjREaMUoynB0YtwY2wYtWDkKR4rh3xvigd9qc=)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than where we found it. It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. But right now, I need your help. National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me neck and neck in a race that experts say could decide Senate control. I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support. It’s such a blessing to have you on my team. Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. name: ColinAllred.com
subject: $46 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| **This is amazing, folks, TWO polls in a row show Colin Allred TIED with Ted Cruz! **

**But here's the bad news:** Now that we’ve officially kicked off the general election campaign, Ted Cruz is calling in every favor he's got. GOP mega donors have already poured more than $46 MILLION into his campaign, and as you read this, they're flooding him with even more to try to defeat Colin.

Our best defense is reaching as many voters as we can between now and Election Day – at their doors, on their phones, and on their TVs. But that gets expensive real fast.

**That's why we need your help:** [**Will you please rush $10 right now to Colin and NewDems so that we can keep this momentum going through November? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82578066/465710202/1575385346?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4947-su-nd&refcode=jtk4947-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgwNTc1Ni0zNWY1LWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nK-tvJwjjM7mZCmT9plirOaM8Ta9IqSNWrBvzVi9Nfo=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. name: Team Morse
subject: “Our health, our right”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
Americans are facing more barriers to achieving good health than ever. Jessica is fighting to change that.

[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/E7ivWeE3iAEdxEosJ9LORA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRn9bAGP0QhaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9yc2Vmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmYQGSsTZo6zetxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt)
| | **“Our health, our right.”** It’s not just the theme of this year’s World Health Day, NAME/friend — it’s the core principle of Jessica’s campaign for Congress. Across the country, the healthcare of *millions* of Americans is at risk. From access to critical, often _life-saving_ reproductive care to unaffordable prescription drug costs, **Americans are facing more barriers to achieving good health and a strong quality of life than ever before.** [**Addressing these threats to our public health in Congress will require pragmatism, policy expertise, and most importantly, compassion — all of which Jessica Morse is ready to bring to the House floor. If you’re ready to send a true advocate for our health to Congress, will you pitch in to support Jessica’s campaign in honor of World Health Day today?**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/W1NladKLBzCfQgOCdku-8A~~/AAUS1gA~~) | | [SEND A PUBLIC HEALTH ADVOCATE TO CONGRESS](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Qq0UVIuiKoMzQ6CYW4susg~~/AAUS1gA~~)
---
Folks, our current congressman is _actively_ working to strip away critical programs, like the Affordable Healthcare Act, which provides coverage for **1,736,391 Californians** , including some of the 6,093,000 with pre-existing conditions who would **_likely be denied coverage_** without the ACA’s protections.
Not only that — he’s fighting in lockstep with his party leaders to enact Trump’s nationwide, no-exceptions abortion ban.
**But at least Kevin Kiley is consistent: In the California Legislature, he not only voted against critical abortion protections but also voted against**** __****wildfire relief and prevention funding, which would have benefited OUR district most.**
[**Now, with only one House seat standing between Americans and key healthcare access protections, we need YOUR help to flip CA-03, take back the House, and send Jessica Morse to Washington to defend our healthcare rights. Can you spare $5, $10, or even $25 to help us get a true healthcare advocate in Congress on this World Health Day, Peter? **](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/W1NladKLBzCfQgOCdku-8A~~/AAUS1gA~~)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Donald Trump tore into me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)
Friends,
Donald Trump just visited Michigan to rally his supporters -- and he called me out. He knows that our campaign is the only thing stopping Republicans from flipping the Senate, and this is unfortunately just the start of his attacks.
I would deeply appreciate your help to fight back and keep Michigan blue in November. Please, use this link to donate now:
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/keep-Michigan-blue](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=2&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
At his event, Trump stood with Mike Rogers directly behind him and emphasized how important this Senate race will be to him taking back the White House in November. In between a fountain of misleading and downright falsehoods, Trump also said that, with his support, Mike Rogers will have “tremendous success” against me in this race.
I’m counting on you to help prove him wrong.
Last week's event is an indication that Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they can at Michigan, and that Michigan Democrats can’t take anything for granted.
No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state -- full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.
We can't let that happen. Want to help? [**Chip in what you can and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=3&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr24.V4GRCl&amount=3&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=22&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-apr24.WaQHpq&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=23&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-apr24.p-WIIy&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=24&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-apr24.xlCj6c&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=25&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-apr24.a-wBJH&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=26&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr24.V4GRCl&refcode=em240407-2-30&t=27&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)**
---
****
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1317%2E135344%2EigagiV)

body:
| Today, we’re asking for just $1. Yes, you read that correctly.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2375%2E35263%2EakRRX7)
Team — we’ll cut right to the chase: Today, we’re asking for just $1. Yes, you read that correctly. $1 can help us protect Social Security and Medicare against a Republican opponent who wants to cut these benefits for millions of seniors. $1 can help us prevent a national abortion ban — a ban that Eric Hovde would help Senate Republicans pass if he wins this seat and flips the Senate majority. $1 can help us power our efforts to run television ads that fight back against the millions of dollars Hovde and his right-wing allies are spending to flood the airwaves. It may not seem like a lot, but $1 can go a long way when thousands of people step up and pitch in: **[Will you chip in $1 (or more!) to send Tammy back to the Senate and defend our razor-thin Democratic majority?
